src: Major British charity Comic Relief has invested money in arms, alcohol and tobacco firms, according to a BBC Panorama investigation to be broadcast this evening.
ref: Badan kebajikan utama Britain Comic Relief telah melaburkan wang ke syarikat-syarikat senjata, alkohol dan tembakau, menurut penyiasatan BBC Panorama yang akan ditayangkan malam ini.

src: The probe discovered evidence of hundreds of thousands of pounds going towards shares in weapons firms like BAE Systems and alcohol company Diageo.
ref: Penyiasatan itu menjumpai bukti beratus ribu paun untuk saham syarikat-syarikat senjata seperti BAE Systems dan syarikat alkohol Diageo.

src: It is also alleged to have pledged upwards of £3 million into tobacco firms.
ref: Ia juga telah dikatakan menyandar sehingga £3 juta kepada syarikat-syarikat tembakau.

src: Ethical fund manager Helen Wildsmith told Panorama: "If people who've been giving them money, after watching the television, next year think twice and don't give that money, because they're concerned about their investment policy, then that could be argued to be a breach of fiduciary duty.
ref: Pengurus dana etika Helen Wildsmith memberitahu Panorama: "Jika orang yang telah memberi mereka wang, selepas menonton televisyen ini, berfikir dua kali pada tahun depan dan tidak memberi wang itu, kerana mereka risau akan polisi pelaburan mereka, jadi ia boleh dipertikaikan sebagai memecahkan tugas fidusiari.

src: They're risking their reputation, and a charity's reputation is very precious."
ref: Mereka mempertaruhkan reputasi mereka, reputasi sebuah badan kebajikan adalah amat berharga".

src: Comic Relief was founded in 1985, and since then has taken in nearly £1 billion in donations.
ref: Comic Relief telah ditubuhkan pada tahun 1985, dan sejak itu telah menerima hampir £1 bilion derma.

src: It funds charitable organisations in the United Kingdom as well as overseas.
ref: Ia membiayai organisasi kebajikan di United Kingdom dan juga di luar negera.

src: It uses a range of managed funds, which invests the money in the charity's name - including on the stock market - in order to maximise return.
ref: Ia juga menggunakan sejulat tabung yang diuruskan, yang melaburkan wang dengan nama kebajikan itu - termasuk ke dalam bursa saham - untuk memaksimumkan pulangan.

src: A spokesperson for the charity told the British newspaper The Daily Telegraph: "We put the money into large managed funds, as many other leading charities and pension funds do.
ref: Seorang jurucakap untuk badan kebajikan itu memberitahu akhbar Britain The Daily Telegraph: "Kami memasukkan wang ke tabung-tabung besar yang diuruskan, sebanyak mana kebajikan utama dan dana pencen yang lain turut lakukan.

src: On balance, we believe this is the approach that will deliver the greatest benefits to the most vulnerable people."
ref: Setelah pertimbangan, kami percaya inilah pendekatan yang boleh memberikan faedah yang terbesar kepada orang yang paling mudah terjejas".

src: The controversial investments were made between 2007 and 2009, Panorama explains.
ref: Pelaburan yang menimbulkan kontroversi itu telah dibuat di antara tahun 2007 dan 2009, Panorama menjelaskan.

src: Peter Bennett-Jones, former chair of the company, defended the investments in a post on The Guardians website.
ref: Peter Bennett-Jones, bekas pengerusi syarikat itu, mempertahankan pelaburan di dalam artikel di laman web The Guardians.

src: He said: "The Charity Commission guidance is quite clear that trustees must invest for the best possible financial return, while taking a level of risk appropriate for money in their care.
ref: Dia berkata: "Panduan Suruhanjaya Kebajikan adalah agak jelas menyatakan yang pemegang amanah mesti melabur untuk kemungkinan pulangan kewangan yang paling terbaik, sambil mengambil tahap risiko yang sesuai untuk wang yang dijaga.

src: They should only adopt an ethical investment approach with specific justification and not on the grounds of individual moral views.
ref: Mereka harus hanya mengambil pendekatan pelaburan beretika dengan penjelasan yang tertentu dan bukan berasaskan pendapat moral individu.

src: A politician from Spain's ruling Socialist Party has been killed in Spain's northern Basque region, in the town of Mondragon.
ref: Seorang ahli politik daripada parti berpengaruh Sepanyol Socialist Party telah dibunuh di utara Sepanyol daerah Basque, di bandar Mondragon.

src: The shooting came just two days before general elections in Spain.
ref: Tembakan berlaku hanya dua hari sebelum pilihanraya umum di Sepanyol.

src: Isaías Carrasco, 42, was shot outside his house in front of his wife and daughter and was taken to hospital, where he died of his wounds.
ref: Isaias Carrasco, 42, ditembak di luar rumah beliau di hadapan isteri dan anak perempuannya dan dibawa ke hospital, di mana beliau meninggal akibat luka.

src: No group has claimed the attack but Spanish sources said the attack was probably carried out by the Basque separatist group, considered as a terrorist group by European Union and United States, ETA.
ref: Tiada kumpulan mengaku atas serangan tersebut namun sumber Sepanyol menyatakan bahawa serangan tersebut berkemungkinan dilakukan oleh kumpulan pemisah Basque, yang dianggap sebagai kumpulan pengganas oleh Kesatuan Eropah dan Amerika Syarikat, ETA.

src: Spain is in the final day of official campaigning ahead of Sunday's general election, in which the Socialist prime minister Rodriguez Zapatero is seeking a second term.
ref: Sepanyol yang sedang dalam hari terakhir kempen rasmi berikutan pilihanraya umum pada Ahad, di mana perdana menteri Socialist Rodriguez Zapatero ingin mendapatkan penggal kedua.

src: The conservative opposition Partido Popular has focused his campaign in the terrorism and separatism, especially that of the Basque.
ref: Kempen oleh pembangkang konservatif Partido Popular memberi fokus dalam pengganasan dan pemisahan, terutamanya di Basque.

src: After the shooting the main parties announced a halt to campaigning.
ref: Selepas tembakan parti-parti utama mengumumkan pemberhentian untuk berkempen.

src: According to the polls, the two parties are neck and neck in the race for the election.
ref: Menurut tinjauan, kedua-dua parti bersaing rapat dalam pilihanraya tersebut.

src: An exchange of handshakes at a Latin American summit Friday marked the end of the bitter dispute that had taken place between the nations of Colombia, Ecuador, and Venezuela over the past week.
ref: Pertukaran jabat tangan di sidang kemuncak Amerika Latin pada hari Jumaat menandakan berakhirnya pertikaian sengit yang telah berlaku antara negara-negara Colombia, Ecuador dan Venezuela lebih seminggu yang lalu.

src: The presidents of each country agreed to end the conflict, and said political ties would be reinstated.
ref: Presiden setiap negara bersetuju untuk menamatkan konflik itu, dan berkata hubungan politik akan dikembalikan semula.

src: "With the commitment of never attacking a brother country again and by asking forgiveness, we can consider this very serious incident resolved," said Ecuadorian president Rafael Correa, as the other Latin American leaders applauded.
ref: "Dengan komitmen untuk tidak menyerang lagi sebuah negara saudara dan dengan meminta maaf, kita boleh mengambil kira insiden sangat serius ini telah diselesaikan," kata Presiden Ecuador, Rafael Correa, sementara pemimpin-pemimpin lain Amerika Latin bertepuk tangan.

src: The dispute was over Colombia's air strike against FARC rebels, which Ecuador accused of entering their territory.
ref: Pertikaian itu adalah mengenai serangan udara Colombia menentang pemberontak FARC, yang Ecuador tuduhi memasuki wilayah mereka.

src: As a result, Ecuador and their ally Venezuela had sent troops to their borders and severed ties with Colombia.
ref: Hasilnya, Ecuador dan sekutu mereka Venezuela telah menghantar angkatan tentera ke sempadan mereka dan memutuskan hubungan dengan Colombia.

src: At the summit, Uribe charged Correa's government of having links with the FARC rebels, a charge that Correa quickly denied.
ref: Pada sidang kemuncak itu, Uribe mendakwa kerajaan Correa mempunyai kaitan dengan pemberontak FARC, dakwaan yang Correa segera nafikan.

src: He admitted there had been communication with the FARC, but only regarding the release of hostages held by the rebels, including French-Colombian politician Íngrid Betancourt.
ref: Beliau mengakui terdapat komunikasi dengan Farc, tetapi hanya mengenai pembebasan tebusan yang ditahan oleh pemberontak, termasuk ahli politik Perancis-Colombia Ingrid Betancourt.

src: Uribe insisted that Ecuador has not done enough to fight the rebels, which was the reason the operation had to remain a secret, he said.
ref: Uribe menegaskan bahawa Ecuador tidak melakukan secukupnya untuk melawan pemberontak-pemberontak, yang merupakan sebab operasi harus dirahsiakan, katanya.

src: "We have not gotten cooperation from President Correa in the fight against terrorism."
ref: "Kami tidak mendapat kerjasama daripada Presiden Correa dalam memerangi keganasan".

src: Correa then advocated the creation of an international peacekeeping force to control the border, saying that Ecuador has become a victim of the fighting in Colombia.
ref: Correa kemudian menyokong pembentukan sebuah pasukan pengaman antarabangsa untuk mengawal sempadan itu, mengatakan Ecuador telah menjadi mangsa pertempuran di Colombia.

src: Finally, it was Dominican president Leonel Fernandez plea for peace that ended the feud.
ref: Akhirnya, presiden Dominican Leonel Fernandez yang meminta kedamaian itu yang menamatkan persengketaan.

src: He requested that the presidents shake hands with each other, which they did, in a televised gesture viewed live across Latin America.
ref: Beliau meminta agar presiden berjabat tangan antara satu sama lain, yang mereka lakukan, dalam satu rawak televisyen dilihat secara langsung di seluruh Amerika Latin.

src: Nicaragua's president, Daniel Ortega, also agreed to reinstate diplomatic ties with Colombia after shaking hands with their president.
ref: Presiden Nicaragua, Daniel Ortega, juga bersetuju untuk mengembalikan semula hubungan diplomatik dengan Colombia selepas berjabat tangan dengan presiden mereka.

src: The leaders at the summit later approved a declaration in which Uribe apologized for the military operation and vowed never again to violate another nation's sovereignty.
ref: Para pemimpin di sidang kemuncak itu kemudian meluluskan pengisytiharan di mana Uribe memohon maaf atas operasi ketenteraan dan berikrar untuk tidak lagi melanggar kedaulatan negara lain.

src: It also mentioned a commitment to fight against threats posed by "irregular or criminal groups."
ref: Ia juga mengatakan satu komitmen untuk melawan ancaman yang ditimbulkan oleh "kumpulan yang tidak teratur atau jenayah".

src: An International Committee of the Red Cross (ICRC) spokesman in Washington revealed Wednesday it had documented and reported to the United States credible information concerning desecration of the Koran by Guantanamo Bay personnel between January 2002 and January 2003.
ref: Jurucakap kepada Badan Antarabangsa untuk Palang Merah (ICRC) di Washington mendedahkan pada hari Rabu yang ia telah mendokumen dan melaporkan kepada Amerika Syarikat maklumat yang boleh dipercayai mengenai penghinaan terhadap Quran oleh pegawai Guantanamo Bay di antara Januari 2002 dan Januari 2003.

src: The ICRC rarely discloses publicly the contents of the confidential reports it gives to governments.
ref: Jarang untuk ICRC mendedahkan kepada awam kandungan laporan rahsia yang ia serahkan kepada kerajaan.

src: Simon Schorno, Red Cross spokesman, said the ICRC's concerns were mentioned multiple times to Pentagon officials in their reports.
ref: Simon Schorno, jurucakap Palang Merah, berkata yang kebimbangan ICRC dinyatakan berulang kali kepada pegawai-pegawai Pentagon di dalam laporan mereka.

src: ICRC delegates have had access to Guantanamo Bay detainees since 2002 and have compiled and corroborated independent reports from detainees about desecration of the Koran numerous times to Guantanamo Bay commanders and Pentagon officials, said Mr. Schorno.
ref: Perwakilan ICRC telah dapat berhubung dengan tahanan Guantanamo Bay sejak 2002 dan telah menyusun dan menyokong laporan bebas tahanan mengenai penghinaan Quran berulang kali kepada komander Guantanamo Bay dan pegawai-pegawai Pentagon, kata Encik Schorno.

src: The ICRC representatives never observed any such incidents themselves, however.
ref: Wakil kepada ICRI tidak pernah memerhati kejadian seperti itu dengan sendiri, walaubagaimanapun.

src: Pentagon spokesman Bryan Whitman, acknowledged that allegations were made on "rare occasions" but were uncorroborated.
ref: Jurucakap Pentagon Bryan Whitman, mengesahkan yang dakwaan tersebut telah dibuat di atas "peristiwa yang jarang berlaku" tetapi tidak disokong.

src: Mr. Schorno disputed the Pentagon's denial saying, "All information we received were corroborated allegations."
ref: Encik Schorno mempertikaikan penafian Pentagon dengan berkata "Semua maklumat yang kami terima adalah dakwaan dengan sokongan."

src: He added that, "We certainly corroborated mentions of the events by detainees themselves," and that "the ICRC considers such reports very seriously, and very carefully, and [we] document everything."
ref: Dia menambah yang, "Kami dengan yakin menyokong kenyataan kejadian tersebut diberitahu oleh tahanan sendiri," dan bahawa "ICRC memgambil laporan tersebut dengan sangat serius, dan dengan sangat berhati-hati, dan [kami] mendokumenkan semuanya."

src: The reports ceased after January 19, 2003, when the Defense Department issued three pages of guidelines on proper treatment of Korans, according to Mr. Schorno.
ref: Laporan tersebut dihentikan pada 19 Januari, 2003, apabila Jabatan Pertahanan mengeluarkan tiga muka garis panduan mengenai cara sesuai unutk mengendalikan Quran, menurut Encik Schorno.

src: On Wednesday Mr. Schorno gave credit for addressing the issue, saying, "We brought it up to the attention of the authorities, and it was followed through."
ref: Pada hari Rabu, Encik Schorno telah memuji kerana menangani isu tersebut, mengatakan, "Kami membangkitkannya untuk perhatian pihak berkuasa, dan ia telah ditangani dengan sepatutnya."

src: Some Muslim news agencies are still reacting to last week's Newsweek article alleging Korans had been thrown into Guantanamo Bay toilets.
ref: Beberapa agensi berita Muslim masih bertindak balas terhadap artikel Newsweek minggu lalu yang mendakwa Quran telah dibuang ke dalam tandas Guantanamo Bay.

src: The Jordanian newspaper Al-Dustur reported that some Middle Eastern TV stations were broadcasting images of Korans shredded by US forces in one Iraqi mosque.
ref: Surat khabar Jordan Al-Dustur melaporkan yang beberapa stesen TV Timur Tengah menyiarkan imej Quran dikoyakkan oleh tentera US di dalam satu masjid di Iraq.

src: New York-based Human Rights Watch special counsel Reed Brody said Wednesday that the White House's response to Newsweek's report of the desecrations should be fully investigated and that "those who ordered or condoned this abuse, [should] not attack those who have tried to report on it."
ref: Penasihat istimewa Hak Kemanusiaan berpusat di New York Reed Brody berkata pada hari Rabu yang reaksi Rumah Putih terhadap laporan Newsweek mengenai penghinaan tersebut patut disiasat sepenuhnya dan bahawa "mereka yang mengarahkan atau membenarkan penyalahgunaan ini, [sepatutnya] tidak menyerang mereka yang cuba melaporkannya."

src: However, Scott McClellan explained in a press conference last Tuesday that the White House is not trying to tell Newsweek what to print.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, Scott McClellan menerangkan di dalam satu sidang akhbar Selasa lepas yang Rumah Putih tidak cuba memberitahu Newsweek apa yang patut dicetak.

src: McClellan said, "Look, this report caused serious damage to the image of the United States abroad."
ref: McClellan berkata, "Lihat, laporan ini menyebabkan kemusnahan serius kepada imej Amerika Syarikat di luar negara."

src: "We appreciate the step that they took by retracting the story."
ref: "Kami menghargai langkah yang mereka ambil dengan menarik balik cerita tersebut."

src: "Now we would encourage them to move forward and do all that they can to help repair the damage that has been done by this report."
ref: "Kini kami akan menggalakkan mereka untuk maju ke hadapan dan lakukan semua yang mereka mampu untuk membantu membaiki kerosakan yang telah terjadi dari laporan tersebut."

src: "But, no, you're absolutely right, it's not my position to get into telling people what they can and cannot report."
ref: "Tetapi, tidak, kamu sangat benar, ia bukan kedudukan saya untuk pergi memberitahu orang apa yang mereka boleh dan tidak boleh laporkan."

src: A protester from the resident's association HACAN Clearskies today pushed a pie into the face of UK Transport Minister Alistair Darling.
ref: Seorang penunjuk perasaan daripada persatuan penduduk HACAN Clearskies hari ini menolak pai ke muka Menteri Pengangkutan UK Alistair Darling.

src: Mr Darling was attending the launch of the pro-aviation industry pressure group Future Heathrow.
ref: Encik Darling menghadiri pelancaran pro- penerbangan kumpulan pendesak industri Future Heathrow.

src: HACAN describe themselves on their website as an "independent lobbying group which campaigns for quieter, cleaner and safer conditions for residents living under Heathrow's flight paths".
ref: HACAN menggambarkan diri mereka di laman web mereka sebagai "kumpulan melobi bebas yang berkempen untuk keadaan lebih tenang, bersih dan selamat bagi penduduk di bawah laluan penerbangan Heathrow".

src: Future Heathrow believe that Heathrow airport is crucial to prosperity of the Thames Valley region, and are in favour of building a third runway at the airport.
ref: Future Heathrow percaya bahawa lapangan terbang Heathrow adalah penting untuk kemakmuran rantau Thames Valley, dan memihak kepada pembinaan landasan ketiga di lapangan terbang.

src: Robert Mugabe, the Zimbabwean president who has recently been widely criticized by world leaders, has claimed the current results show that he will have a 'sweeping victory' in the unopposed presidential run-off elections.
ref: Robert Mugabe, Presiden Zimbabwe yang baru-baru ini telah dikritik hebat oleh para pemimpin dunia, telah menyatakan keputusan semasa menunjukkan bahawa dia akan mempunyai 'kemenangan menyeluruh'tanpa bertanding dalam pilihan raya presiden yang dijalankan secara dua pusingan.

src: Mugabe announced his victory on one of the state run television networks.
ref: Mugabe mengumumkan kemenangannya pada salah satu rangkaian televisyen milik kerajaan.

src: "The returns show that we are winning convincingly, that we have won in all the 26 constituencies in Harare, an MDC stronghold where we won in only one constituency in March," he said.
ref: "Keputusan menunjukkan bahawa kami menang dengan kukuh, yang mana kami menang di semua 26 kawasan pilihanraya di Harare, sebuah kubu kuat MDC di mana kita hanya menang dalam satu bahagian pada pilihan raya bulan Mac," katanya.

src: Robert Mugabe was recently under a large amount of pressure to postpone the election after the main opposition candidate, Morgan Tsvangirai, pulled out due to fears of violence.
ref: Robert Mugabe baru-baru ini berada di bawah tekanan hebat untuk menangguhkan pilihanraya selepas calon pembangkang utama, Morgan Tsvangirai, menarik diri disebabkan oleh kebimbangan keganasan.

src: For example, Ban Ki-moon, secretary general of the United Nations yesterday called for the election to be postponed.
ref: Sebagai contoh, Ban Ki-moon, Setiausaha Agung Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu semalam meminta untuk pilihanraya tersebut ditangguhkan.

src: He said that he "strongly supports the statement of the Chairman of SADC (Southern African Development Community) that conditions do not exist for a run-off election to be held at this time and that they should be postponed."
ref: Beliau mengatakan beliau "menyokong penuh kenyataan Pengerusi SADC (Komuniti Pembangunan Afrika Selatan) yang keadaan sebegitu tidak wujud untuk pilihan raya secara dua pusingan dijalankan pada masa ini dan ia seharusnya ditangguhkan".

src: A wax model of British singer Amy Winehouse was unveiled on Wednesday at Madame Tussauds in London.
ref: Model lilin penyanyi British Amy Winehouse telah diperkenalkan pada hari Rabu di Madame Tussauds di London.

src: The model, nearly six feet tall and clad in a yellow dress with a microphone in hand, is said to bear a strong likeness to the singer.
ref: Model itu, hampir enam kaki tinggi dan berpakaian dalam dress kuning dengan mikrofon di tangan, dikatakan sangat menyerupai penyanyi tersebut.

src: Her tattoos have even been reproduced to the last detail, including one of a lightning bolt.
ref: Tatu beliau telah dihasilkan semula sehingga ke butiran yang terakhir, termasuk salah satu sambaran kilat.

src: While her parents attended the event, Winehouse herself was too busy working to attend.
ref: Sementara ibu bapanya menghadiri acara tersebut, Winehouse sendiri terlalu sibuk dengan kerja untuk hadir.

src: Her father Mitch remarked that "This is the reward for her musical achievements and her talent".
ref: Bapanya Mitch mengatakan bahawa "Ini adalah ganjaran untuk pencapaian muzik dan bakat beliau".

src: The troubled singer, 24, is well known for her drug use, and last month was thought to have been suffering from the early stages of emphysema.
ref: Penyanyi bermasalah itu, 24, terkenal dengan penggunaan dadah, dan pada bulan lalu disangka telah mengalami peringkat awal emfisema.

src: A 54-year-old German farmer who lost both arms in a farming accident six years ago has become the first patient to receive a complete double arm transplant.
ref: Seorang petani Jerman berusia 54 tahun yang kehilangan kedua-dua tangannya dalam kemalangan semasa bertani enam tahun lalu telah menjadi pesakit pertama yang menerima pemindahan kedua-dua tangan yang lengkap.

src: In a press statement released by the clinic, it was revealed that the patient had been thoroughly physically checked and had psychological counselling prior to the surgery to ensure he was mentally stable enough to cope with the procedure.
ref: Dalam satu kenyataan akhbar yang dikeluarkan oleh klinik itu, ia mendedahkan bahawa pesakit telah diperiksa sepenuhnya secara fizikal dan mempunyai kaunseling psikologi sebelum pembedahan untuk memastikan dia mempunyai mental yang cukup stabil untuk menghadapi prosedur.

src: Since completion of the surgery, the patient has been on immuno-suppressant drugs to prevent rejection of the new limbs.
ref: Sejak selesai pembedahan, pesakit tersebut telah diberikan ubat penahan imunisasi untuk mengelakkan penolakan anggota baru.

src: Indications from the clinic suggest that the double attachment went well, although it could be up to 2 full years before the patient is able to move the arms.
ref: Petunjuk dari klinik mencadangkan bahawa kedua-dua sambungan tersebut berkeadaan baik, walaupun ia berkemungkinan memakan masa sehingga genap 2 tahun sebelum pesakit boleh menggerakkan tangan tersebut.

src: The donor arms came from an unnamed teenager, who is believed to have died in a car accident.
ref: Penderma tangan tersebut datang dari seorang remaja yang tidak dinamakan, yang dipercayai telah meninggal dunia dalam kemalangan kereta.

src: The 12-year-old son of neuroscientist and MIT graduate Dr. Aafia Siddiqui, Mohammad Ahmed, was handed over to his aunt Fauzia Siddiqui in Islamabad after years of detention in a US military base in Afghanistan.
ref: Anak lelaki kepada neurosaintis dan graduan MIT Doktor Aafia Siddiqui yang berusia 12 tahun, Mohammad Ahmed, telah diserahkan kepada ibu saudaranya di Islamabad setelah bertahun-tahun penahanannya di kem tentera U.S. di Afghanistan.

src: Dr. Aafia Siddiqui is still currently facing trial charged with attempting to kill American soldiers in Afghanistan.
ref: Doktor Aafia Siddiqui kini masih lagi menghadapi perbicaraan untuk dakwaan cubaan membunuh askar Amerika di Afghanistan.

src: Siddiqui and her three children disappeared after leaving her parent's house in Karachi on 30th March, 2003.
ref: Siddiqui dan tiga anaknya hilang selepas meninggalkan rumah ibubapanya di Karachi pada 30 Mac 2003.

src: She was married to a nephew of Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, the accused mastermind of the September 11 attacks.
ref: Dia berkahwin dengan sepupunya Khalid Sheikh Mohammed, yang dituduh menjadi dalang serangan 11 September.

src: Her husband was captured in 2003 and is now held at the Guantanamo Bay Detention Center.
ref: Suaminya yang ditangkap pada 2003 dan kini ditahan di Pusat Tahanan Guantanamo Bay.

src: In 2004, Dr. Aafia was identified by the FBI as an "Al-Qaeda operative and facilitator who posed a clear and present danger to America".
ref: Pada 2004, Doktor Aafia telah dikenalpasti oleh FBI sebagai "Penggerak Al-Qaeda dan pemudah cara yang mengakibatkan bahaya malapetaka terhadap Amerika."

src: Mohammad Ahmed was only six when he and his mother, brother and sister were abducted from Karachi in 2003 and later handed over to US authorities.
ref: Mohammad Ahmed hanya berusia enam tahun semasa dia dan ibu, abang, dan kakaknya dilarikan dari Karachi pada 2003 dan kemudiannya diserahkan kepada pihak berkuasa Amerika.

src: Dr. Fauzia told journalists after the boy had been given to her by officials of the interior ministry and intelligence agencies.
ref: Doktor Fauzia memberitahu wartawan selepas budak lelaki itu diserahkan kepadanya oleh pegawai dari kementerian dalaman dan agensi perisikan.

src: Mohammad Ahmed arrived at the Benazir International Airport in Islamabad from Kabul in a PIA flight and was taken to his aunt’s residence.
ref: Mohammad Ahmed tiba di Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Benazir, Islamabad dari Kabul menaiki pesawat PIA dan dibawa ke kediaman ibu saudaranya.

src: Human Rights Commission of Pakistan co-chairman Iqbal Haider said that the daughter of Dr. Aafia was also in Afghanistan.
ref: Naib Pengerusi Suruhanjaya Hak Kemanusiaan Pakistan Iqbal Haider berkata bahawa anak perempuan Doktor Aafia juga berada di Afghanistan.

src: He regretted that despite having U.S. nationality, the U.S. government did nothing for the release of its four citizens, stating that "this is [a] severe violation of the US laws and constitution."
ref: Dia kesal bahawa mekipun mempunyai kerakyatan U.S., kerajaan U.S. tidak berbuat apa-apa untuk melepaskan empat rakyatnya, menyatakan "Ini adalah [satu] pencabulan undang-undang dan perlembagaan U.S. yang teruk."

src: Muhammad Ahmed landed back to his home in Karachi from where he had disappeared five years back, with his family.
ref: Muhammad Ahmed mendarat balik ke rumahnya di Karachi dimana dia telah hilang lima tahun lepas bersama keluarganya.

src: Dr. Fauzia and her family are hoping that the other two missing children would also be back home soon, by taking some positive steps from the Government of Pakistan.
ref: Doktor Fauzia dan keluarganya berharap dua lagi kanak-kanak yang hilang akan segera pulang, dengan mengambil langkah-langkah positif dari kerajaan Pakistan.

src: An Austrian man is in jail after authorities say he used a flamethrower to burn his two elderly in-law parents to death as they slept in their home located in Hartberg in the state of Styria.
ref: Lelaki Austria di dalam penjara selepas pihak berkuasa berkata dia menggunakan penyembur api untuk membakar dua orang mentua nya sehingga mati selepas mereka tidur dalam rumah mereka yang terletak di Hartberg di negeri di Styria.

src: The man, 48, is said to have first doused the bedroom with gasoline and then used a canister filled with propane to light the room on fire.
ref: Lelaki itu, 48 tahun, berkata mulanya dia membasahkan katil dengan minyak tanah dan kemudian menggunakan tabung kecil yang diisi propan kepada lampu dalam bilik dan terbakar.

src: The suspect left the scene of the crime, but was apprehended by police shortly after the incident.
ref: Suspek meninggalkan tempat kejadian, tetapi ditahan oleh pihak polis sejurus selepas kejadian.

src: In the process, the man stabbed himself in the stomach in an apparent suicide attempt.
ref: Dalam proses itu, lelaki itu menikam diri sendiri di perut dalam cubaan membunuh diri yang ketara.

src: He is currently in a drug induced coma at a local hospital.
ref: Dia sekarang berada di hospital tempatan yang koma kerana dadah.

src: The Icelandic internet bank, Icesave, has suspended all 300,000 of its UK customer accounts, leaving account holders in the United Kingdom unable to withdraw or deposit any funds.
ref: Bank internet Iceland, Icesave, telah menggantung kesemua 300,000 akaun pelanggan UK, menyebabkan pemegang akaun di United Kingdom tidak dapat mengeluarkan atau mendepositkan apa-apa dana.

src: "We are not currently processing any deposits or any withdrawal requests through our Icesave internet accounts."
ref: "Kami sekarang tidak memproses apa-apa deposit atau mana-mana permintaan pengeluaran melalui akaun internet Icesave."

src: "We apologise for any inconvenience this may cause our customers."
ref: "Kami memohon maaf atas sebarang kesulitan yang dihadapi oleh pelanggan kami."

src: The internet bank, owned by the Icelandic bank, Landsbanki (Landsbankinn), which was recently nationalised in an attempt to rescue it, has been hit by the global financial crisis.
ref: Bank internet, yang dimiliki oleh bank Iceland, Landsbanki (Landsbankinn), yang baru-baru ini dimiliknegarakan dalam usaha untuk menyelamatkannya, telah dilanda krisis kewangan global.

src: Reports from the United Kingdom suggest that the traders and city are preparing for the parent company to be declared insolvent, leaving customers to recover their monies through a financial compensation scheme being backed by the Icelandic Government.
ref: Laporan dari United Kingdom menunjukkan bahawa peniaga dan bandar sedang membuat persediaan untuk syarikat induk untuk diisytiharkan muflis, menyebabkan pelanggan mereka untuk mendapatkan kembali wang mereka melalui skim pampasan kewangan yang disokong oleh Kerajaan Iceland.

src: The plan will cover the first € 20,887 (Approx £16,300 / $28,720), the remainder of the customers funds being recovered through the UK's own financial compensation system.
ref: Pelan ini akan melindungi €20,887 yang pertama (Lebih kurang £16,300 / $28,720), baki dana pelanggan didapatkan melalui sistem pampasan kewangan di UK sendiri.

src: Following the decision to nationalise Landsbanki, the Icelandic Prime Minister, Geir Haarde, who introduced and signed the emergency legislation into law, stated:"What we are doing here is saving a banking system - saving the domestic banking system - and making sure that it can function properly."
ref: Berikutan keputusan memiliknegarakan Landsbanki, Perdana Menteri Iceland, Geir Haarde, yang memperkenalkan dan menandatangani undang-undang darurat ke dalam undang-undang, menyatakan: "Apa yang kami lakukan di sini adalah menyelamatkan sistem perbankan - menyelamatkan sistem perbankan domestik - dan memastikan bahawa ia dapat berfungsi dengan baik."

src: In describing and explaining its actions in nationalising the bank, the Icelandic Financial Supervisory Authority issued this brief statement: In response to the deepening world financial situation, the Dutch government has this afternoon increased its savers protection from €38,000 to €80,000 effective immediately, to help secure the financial status of its savers within Holland.
ref: Dalam menerangkan dan menjelaskan tindakannya dalam pemiliknegaraan bank, Lembaga Penyeliaan Kewangan Iceland mengeluarkan kenyataan ringkas ini: Sebagai tindak balas ke atas keadaan kewangan dunia yang semakin meruncing, kerajaan Belanda pada petang ini meningkatkan perlindungan penyimpan daripada €38,000 ke €80,000 yang berkuatkuasa serta-merta, untuk membantu menjamin kedudukan kewangan penyimpan wang di Belanda.

src: Icesave also has a Dutch branch, icesave.nl - their website was unreachable at the time of this article.
ref: Icesave juga mempunyai cawangan Belanda, icesave.nl - laman web mereka tidak dapat dicapai pada masa artikel ini diterbitkan.

src: American author and producer Michael Crichton has died in Los Angeles, California at the age of 66, according to a statement released by his family.
ref: Pengarang dan pengeluar buku Amerika, Michael Crichton telah meninggal dunia di Los Angeles, California pada usia 66 tahun, menurut satu kenyataan yang dikeluarkan oleh keluarganya.

src: According to Entertainment Tonight, Crichton died after a long and quiet battle with cancer.
ref: Menurut Entertainment Tonight, Crichton meninggal dunia selepas perlawanan yang lama dan senyap dengan kanser.

src: While the world knew him as a great storyteller that challenged our preconceived notions about the world around us — and entertained us all while doing so — his wife Sherri, daughter Taylor, family and friends knew Michael Crichton as a devoted husband, loving father and generous friend who inspired each of us to strive to see the wonders of our world through new eyes, said a statement by his family.
ref: Walaupun dunia mengenalinya sebagai penglipur lara hebat yang telah mencabar tanggapan awal kita tentang dunia di sekeliling kita - dan menghiburkan kita semua dengan berbuat begitu - isterinya Sherri, anak perempuannya Taylor, keluarga serta rakan-rakannya mengenali Michael Crichton sebagai suami berdedikasi, bapa penyayang dan rakan pemurah yang mengilhamkan setiap daripada kita untuk terus berusaha bagi melihat keajaiban dunia kita melalui pandangan yang baru, kata sebuah keterangan oleh keluarganya.

src: Crichton, who was born in Chicago, Illinois in 1942, was most famous for the writing of his Jurassic Park novels.
ref: Crichton, yang dilahirkan di Chicago, Illinois pada tahun 1942, paling terkenal dengan penulisan novel Jurassic Park beliau.

src: He also published The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline, Eaters of the Dead, all of which became major motion pictures.
ref: Beliau juga menerbitkan The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline dan Eaters of the Death yang semuanya menjadi filem utama.

src: He also created, and was an active executive producer of the hit television show ER.
ref: Beliau juga mencipta dan merupakan seorang penerbit eksekutif aktif rancangan televisyen terkenal ER.

src: Scotland has refused bail to the Libyan man convicted of the bombing of Pan Am Flight 103 despite his terminal cancer, as he can receive treatment in prison.
ref: Scotland menolak ikat jamin kepada lelaki warga Libya yang disabitkan dengan mengebom Pesawat Pan Am 103 walaupun ada kanser terminal, akan menerima rawatan di penjara.

src: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi was jailed in 2001 for the 1988 bombing of the transatlantic airliner, killing 270 people, but is seeking to have his conviction overturned.
ref: Abdelbaset Ali Mohmed Al-Megrahi telah dipenjarakan pada 2001 kerana pengeboman pesawat transatlantik 1988, membunuh 270 orang, tetapi ingin membatalkan sabitannya.

src: Minutes after Edinburgh's Appeals Court rejected bail on compassionate grounds Jim Swire, spokesman for the victim's families who lost his daughter in the disaster, complained about the ruling.
ref: Beberapa minit selepas Mahkamah Rayuan Edinburgh menolak ikat jaminan atas dasar belas kasihan Jim Swire, jurucakap kepada keluarga mangsa yang kehilangan anaknya dalm nahas itu, mengadu tentang keputusan.

src: "It has never been a goal of our group to seek revenge," said a lawyer outside the court reading from his statement.
ref: "Ia tidak pernah menjadi gol kepada kumpulan ini untuk membalas dendam," kata peguam di luar mahkamah membaca dari kenyataannya.

src: "The refusal of a return to his family for a dying man whose verdict is not even yet secure looks uncomfortably like either an aspect of revenge -- or perhaps timidity."
ref: "Penolakan terhadap kepulangannya kepada keluarga untuk orang yang sedang tenat terlihat seperti belum lagi selamat dan dilihat tidak selesa seperti aspek membalas dendam -- atau mungkin penakut".

src: Al-Megrahi, a former intelligence officer, is 54 and serving a minimum of 27 years for the bombing.
ref: Al-Megrahi, bekas pegawai perisikan, berumur 54 tahun dan telah berkhidmat selamasa 27 tahun sebelum kes bom itu.

src: He has advanced prostate cancer which is spreading through his body.
ref: Dia mempunyai kanser prostat yang tersebar di seluruh badannya.

src: His request for bail was rejected by Lord Hamilton, Scotland's head judge, who said that as doctors say he could live a few more years he should not be released unless and until after his appeal succeeds or his condition worsens.
ref: Permohonan untuk mengikat jamin telah ditolak oleh Lord Hamilton, ketua hakim Scotland, yang berkata bahawa seperti kata doktor dia hanya boleh hidup beberapa tahun sahaja lagi melainkan dia betul-betul bertaubat atau keadaannya semakin bururk.

src: Some other doctors give his time as just months, as the cancer has reached his bones.
ref: Sesetengah doktor memberi masa selama beberapa bulan, kerana kanser itu telah sampai ke tulang.

src: Hamilton however said that palliative hormone treatment could prolong his life.
ref: Hamilton bagaimanapun berkata bahawa rawatan palliatif hormon mungkin memanjangkan hidupnya.

src: Hamilton also said Al-Megrahi was not suffering "material pain or disability".
ref: Hamilton juga berkata bahawa Al-Megrahi tidak menderita "kesakitan dan kelumpuhan".

src: The Scottish Criminal Cases Review Commission ruled last year that the conviction may be a miscarriage of justice.
ref: Suruhanjaya Semakan Kes Jenayah Scotland yang digariskan tahun lepas mungkin melaksanakan keadilan.

src: It said there was significant doubts to be raised over several key pieces of evidence in the original trial.
ref: Dikatakan ada sedikit keraguan untuk membangkitkan beberapa bukti di perbicaraan asal.

src: French police are holding a 31-year-old who managed to convince social workers and fellow students that he was a 15-year-old Spanish orphan and spent a whole month attending school.
ref: Polis Perancis menahan seorang berusia 31 tahun yang telah berjaya meyakinkan pekerja sosial dan rakan-rakan pelajar bahawa dia adalah seorang anak yatim Sepanyol berusia 15 tahun dan menghabiskan sepanjang bulan menghadiri sekolah.

src: Frederic Bourdin's alias was discovered when a teacher watched a television program about his exploits and his numerous identities.
ref: Alias ​​Frederic Bourdin telah ditemui apabila seorang guru menonton program televisyen mengenai eksploitasi dan pelbagai identitinya.

src: Claire Chadourne, headmistress at the College Jean-Monnet, said, "He seemed a little older than his classmates, two or three years at the most.
ref: Claire Chadourne, Guru Besar di Kolej Jean-Monnet, berkata: "Dia nampaknya sedikit lebih tua daripada rakan-rakannya, dua atau tiga tahun paling banyak.

src: Bourdin, who speaks at least five languages, told social workers and classmates that his name was Francisco Hernandez-Fernandez and that his parents had been killed in a car crash in 2000 and that he'd spent three months in a coma.
ref: Bourdin, yang boleh bercakap sekurang-kurangnya dalam lima bahasa, memberitahu pekerja sosial dan rakan-rakan sekelas yang namanya Francisco Hernandez-Fernandez dan bahawa ibu bapanya telah terbunuh dalam kemalangan jalan raya pada tahun 2000 dan bahawa dia telah berada dalam keadaan koma selama tiga bulan.

src: He claimed that after being placed into foster care, he was sexually abused and that he escaped to France.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa selepas ditempatkan di penjagaan angkat, dia telah didera secara seksual dan bahawa dia melarikan diri ke Perancis.

src: He told his teacher that he had horrible scars that he wished to hide and was given special permission to wear a cap to hide his balding.
ref: Dia memberitahu gurunya bahawa dia mempunyai parut dahsyat yang dia ingin sembunyikan dan telah diberi kebenaran khas untuk memakai topi untuk menyembunyikan kebotakannya.

src: In 1997, Bourdin was arrested and imprisoned for six years in the United States for posing a Texas couple's 14-year-old son, who disappeared three years earlier.
ref: Pada tahun 1997, Bourdin telah ditangkap dan dipenjarakan selama enam tahun di Amerika Syarikat kerana menyamar sebagai anak lelaki pasangan Texas yang berusia 14 tahun, yang hilang tiga tahun sebelum itu.

src: He managed to convince the couple that he was their son even though he had brown eyes and a heavy French accent.
ref: Dia berjaya meyakinkan pasangan itu bahawa dia adalah anak mereka walaupun dia mempunyai mata coklat dan loghat Perancis yang berat.

src: Bourdin lived with the couple for three months before a journalist exposed him and his lies were confirmed by a DNA test.
ref: Bourdin hidup dengan pasangan itu selama tiga bulan sebelum wartawan mendedahkannya dan pembohongan beliau telah disahkan dengan ujian DNA.

src: Returning from the United States in 2003, Bourdin showed up in the southeastern Alps, where he claimed to be Leo Balley, who went missing in 1996 when he was seven-years-old and camping with his father.
ref: Pulang dari Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2003, Bourdin muncul di Alps tenggara, di mana dia mengenalkan dirinya sebagai Leo Balley, yang hilang pada tahun 1996 ketika dia berumur tujuh tahun dan berkhemah dengan bapanya.

src: He says he assumes other identities as a way of receiving the attention he never got as a child.
ref: Katanya, dia menganggap identiti lain sebagai cara untuk mendapat perhatian yang dia tidak pernah dapat semasa kecil.

src: A trio of Canadian trekkers said Friday they completed the fastest unaided on-foot trek using the traditional route from Hercules Inlet on the Ronne Ice Shelf to the South Pole in a record time of 33 days, 23 hours and 30 minutes.
ref: Pengembara Kanada kumpulan tiga orang berkata pada hari Jumaat bahawa mereka telah menamatkan perjalanan tanpa bantuan dengan berjalan kaki menggunakan laluan tradisional dari Hercules Inlet di Ronne Ice Shelf ke Kutub Selatan dalam rekod masa 33 hari, 23 jam dan 30 minit.

src: Ottawa ultra-runner Ray Zahab, age 39, adventure journalist and architect Kevin Vallely, age 44, of Lynn Valley, North Vancouver and North Pole expeditionist Richard Weber, age 49, said they completed the 700-mile (1,130-kilometer) journey, at 10,000 feet altitude, finally arriving early Wednesday morning.
ref: Pelari-Ultra Otawa, Ray Zahab, umur 39, wartawan pengembaraan dan arkitek Kevin Vallely, umur 44, Lynn Valley, Ahli ekspedisi utara Vancouver dan Kutub utara Richard Weber, umur 49, berkata bahawa mereka telah menamatkan perjalanan sepanjang 700 batu (1,130 kilometer), pada ketinggian 10,000 kaki, akhirnya tiba pada awal pagi Rabu.

src: They endured a white-out but survived on a 7,000-calorie-a-day diet of pemmican, Gatorade drink powder, outdated salami, deep-fried bacon, cheese and butter.
ref: Mereka mengharungi white-out, kerosakan mata akibat terdedah pada cahaya terang secara tiba-tiba tetapi terselamat dengan diet sebanyak 7,000 kalori sehari seperti pemmican, serbuk minuman Gatorade, salami luput tarikh, daging goreng, keju dan mentega.

src: "If you took a cloud, wrapped it around your head and then duct-taped it, that's what a white-out is like," Mr Zahab, explained.
ref: "Jika kamu mengambil awan, balutnya di sekeliling kepala kamu dan kemudian lekatkannya, itulah yang dimaksudkan dengan white-out," Encik Zahab, menjelaskan.

src: The trio also suffered altitude sickness, vertigo, massive, painful blisters, and temperatures as low as minus 40.
ref: Ketiga-tiga orang itu juga mengalami penyakit ketinggian, gayat, lepuh yang menyakitkan, dan besar dan suhu serendah negatif 40.

src: Zahab had to pull 170-lb (77-kg) sleds of equipment, traveling on foot and on snowshoes while the other two men skied.
ref: Zahab terpaksa menarik kereta lucur dengan peralatan seberat 170-lb (77 kg), dan berjalan kaki dengan kasut salji sementara dua lelaki lain berski.

src: According to ExplorersWeb.com's founder, Tom Sjogren, the trio erased the previous record of 39 days, 7 hours and 49 minutes, which was set by American Todd Carmichael, the first American to cross Antarctica to the South Pole alone, on foot and with no assistance.
ref: Menurut pengasas ExplorersWeb.com, Tom Sjogren, kumpulan tiga orang itu memecahkan rekod sebelumnya sepanjang 39 hari, 7 jam dan 49 minit, yang dipegang oleh warganergara Amerika Todd Carmichael, lelaki Amerika pertama yang menyeberangi Antartika ke Kutub Selatan, dengan berjalan kaki dan tiada bantuan.

src: Guinness World Records spokesman, Damian Field, in London, however, said that "Guinness monitors a category for fastest unsupported trek to the South Pole, but it has no record currently listed."
ref: Jurucakap Guinness World Records, Damian Field, bagaimanapun, berkata di London bahawa "Guinness memantau kategori untuk perjalanan terpantas tanpa bantuan ke Kutub Selatan tetapi ia tidak mempunyai rekod yang tersenarai kini."

src: Prior to Carmichael, the record was held by Briton Hannah McKeand.
ref: Sebelum Carmichael, rekod itu dipegang oleh Hannah McKeand dari Britain.

src: In the fastest journey to the South Pole (600 nautical mile journey), she completed solo and in just 39 days, 9 hours and 33 minutes.
ref: Dalam perjalanan yang paling cepat ke Kutub Selatan (600 perjalanan batu nautika), dia menghabiskan perjalanan seorang dan mencatatkan masa 39 hari, 9 jam dan 33 minit.

src: In March 2008 she attempted to reach the North Pole alone and unsupported but had to abandon the trip after falling through the ice and badly damaging her shoulder.
ref: Pada bulan Mac 2008, dia cuba mengembara ke Kutub Utara seorangan dan tanpa bantuan, tetapi terpaksa membatalkan lawatan itu selepas jatuh dari ais dan bahunya cedera teruk.

src: Ray Zahab is a Canadian ultramarathon runner, personal trainer, and motivational speaker.
ref: Ray Zahab adalah seorang pelari marathon-ultra Kanada, pelatih peribadi, dan penceramah motivasi.

src: He lives in Chelsea, Quebec, and is famous for his 4,300-mile (6,920-kilometer) epic run across the Sahara Desert in 2007, which was the subject of a documentary narrated by actor Matt Damon's "Running the Sahara."
ref: Dia tinggal di Chelsea, Quebec, dan terkenal dengan larian epik merentasi Gurun Sahara sepanjang 4,300 batu (6920 kilometer) pada tahun 2007, yang merupakan subjek dokumentari yang dikisahkan oleh pelakon Matt Damon "Running the Sahara."

src: He heads Impossible2Possible, a nonprofit organization which advocates planet protection.
ref: Beliau mengetuai Impossible2Possible, sebuah pertubuhan amal yang menggalakkan perlindungan planet.

src: "I started looking at impossible places on the planet in the past year, and I said Antarctica is one of those impossible places, and if we can create an expedition, perhaps we can inspire a bunch of young people to realize they can achieve," Zahab said.
ref: "Saya mula melihat tempat-tempat yang mustahil di dunia ini pada tahun lepas, dan saya berkata Antartika adalah salah satu tempat yang mustahil, dan jika kita boleh mewujudkan satu ekspedisi, mungkin kita boleh memberi inspirasi kepada anak-anak muda untuk menyedari bahawa mereka boleh berjaya," Zahab katanya.

src: Richard Weber, M.S.M.
ref: Richard Weber, M.S.M.

src: (born June 9, 1959 in Edmonton, Alberta) is a world-renowned Canadian Arctic and polar adventurer, from Alcove (near Wakefield).
ref: (lahir 9 Jun 1959 di Edmonton, Alberta) adalah pengembara Artik dan kutub dari Kanada yang terkenal di dunia, berasal dari Alcove (berhampiran Wakefield).

src: From 1978 to 2006, he participated in, lead and organized more than 45 Arctic expeditions.
ref: Dari tahun 1978 hingga 2006, dia mengambil bahagian, mengetuai dan menganjurkan lebih daripada 45 ekspedisi ke Artik.

src: Richard is the only person to have completed six full North Pole expeditions.
ref: Richard ialah satu-satunya orang yang telah menamatkan enam ekspedisi penuh ke Kutub Utara.

src: He has therefore trekked to the North Pole more than anyone in history.
ref: Oleh itu, dia telah merentas masuk ke Kutub Utara lebih daripada orang lain dalam sejarah.

src: The trio were waiting out a storm before boarding a flight to Chile for Ottawa.
ref: Ketiga-tiga mereka sedang menunggu ribut reda sebelum menaiki penerbangan ke Chile dari Ottawa.

src: "I'm pretty tired, actually," said Kevin Vallely, calling from Patriot Hills, Antarctica.
ref: "Saya sebenarnya agak letih," kata Kevin Vallely, menelefon dari Patriot Hills, Antartika.

src: During the saga, Vallely was solely burdened with carrying the high-tech gear in his sled consisting of video cameras, satellite phones, hand-held computers, different kinds of solar panels, batteries and wires chargers.
ref: Dalam perjalanan itu, hanya Vallely dibebankan dengan membawa gear berteknologi tinggi di kereta luncurnya bersendirian yang terdiri daripada kamera video, telefon satelit, komputer tangan, pelbagai jenis panel solar, bateri dan wayar pengecas.

src: "Had we not brought all that stuff we probably would have got it done faster because we wouldn't have had to carry all that weight, but then it doesn't matter as much," he explained.
ref: "Sekiranya kami tidak membawa semua barang itu kita mungkin akan melakukannya dengan lebih cepat kerana kita tidak perlu membawa beban seberat itu, tetapi kemudian ia tidak begitu penting," jelasnya.

src: Vallely said he also intends to produce a documentary of the expedition.
ref: Vallely berkata dia juga bercadang untuk menghasilkan dokumentari ekspedisi.

src: Mount Redoubt, a volcano in Alaska, erupted on Saturday, sending out clouds of ash thousands of feet high.
ref: Gunung Redoubt, sebuah gunung berapi di Alaska, meletup pada hari Sabtu, mengeluarkan abu setinggi berapa ribu kaki tingginya.

src: According to the Federal Aviation Administration, the Ted Stevens Anchorage International Airport was shut down after ash reached the airport.
ref: Menurut Pentadbiran Penerbangan Persekutuan, Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Ted Stevens Anchorage ditutup selepas abu mencapai lapangan terbang.

src: Jeremy Lindseth, a spokesman for the airport, said that only small amount of ash reached the airport, but was significant enough to disrupt operations, as ash can cause engine problems for aircraft.
ref: Jeremy Lindseth, seorang jurucakap untuk lapangan terbang, berkata bahawa hanya sedikit jumlah abu sampai ke lapangan terbang, tetapi sudah mencukupi untuk menggangu operasi, kerana abu boleh menberikan masalah enjin kepada kapal terbang.

src: He said that he was uncertain of how many flights were affected due to the eruption.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia tidak tahu berapa penerbangan yang terjejas kerana letupan itu.

src: The eruption happened at around 1:30 PM local time, the United States Geological Survey reported.
ref: Letupan berlaku sekitar jam 1:30 PM waktu tempatan, Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat melaporkan.

src: The volcano had erupted four times on Friday, billowing ash up to 51,000 feet up into the air.
ref: Gunung berapi itu meletus empat kali pada hari Jumaat, mengembangkan abu sehingga 51,000 kaki keatas udara.

src: These are the latest in a series of eruptions from Mount Redoubt, which started on March 22.
ref: Ini adalah letupan yang terbaru daripda Gunung Redoubt, yang bermula pada Mac 22.

src: The volcano had not erupted since a four-month period in 1989-90.
ref: Gunung berapi itu tidak meletus semenjak tempoh empat bulan pada tahun 1989-90.

src: The Alaska Volcano Observatory set its alert level at red, the highest possible level, meaning that an eruption is imminent, and that it would send a "significant emission of volcanic ash into the atmosphere."
ref: Tempat Pemerhatian Gunung Berapi Alaska menetapkan tahap amaran pada warna merah, tahap yang paling tinggi, bermakna letusan akan berlaku, dan ia akan menghantar "pelepasan abu yang besar ke atmosfera."

src: An act signed into law by Afghan President Hamid Karzai last month dramatically rolled back the rights of women in that country, according to human rights groups and a United Nations report on the bill by the United Nations Development Fund for Women.
ref: Satu tindakan yang dimeterai dalam undang-undang oleh Presiden Afghanistan Hamid Karzai bulan lepas telah memperkenalkan semula hak-hak wanita di negara itu secara mendadak, menurut kumpulan hak asasi manusia dan laporan PBB tentang rang undang-undang oleh Dana Pembangunan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu untuk Wanita.

src: The Afghan government has not provided a copy of the text of the Shia Family Law to the UN or to other outside groups requesting it, citing "technical problems", however, the UN and opposition politicians say that the bill contains numerous provisions restricting the rights of women, such as giving their husbands priority in court; requiring the husband's permission to leave the house, obtain education or employment, or to see a doctor; and reserving the custody of children to male relatives.
ref: Kerajaan Afghanistan tidak memberikan salinan teks Undang-Undang Keluarga Syiah kepada PBB atau kumpulan-kumpulan lain di luar yang memintanya, dengan alasan "masalah teknikal," bagaimanapun, PBB dan ahli politik pembangkang mengatakan bahawa rang undang-undang tersebut mengandungi pelbagai peruntukan yang menyekat hak-hak wanita, seperti memberi keutamaan kepada suami mereka di mahkamah; memerlukan kebenaran suami untuk keluar rumah, mendapatkan pendidikan atau pekerjaan, atau untuk berjumpa doktor; dan menempah jagaan anak-anak kepada saudara lelaki.

src: According to the head of Kenyan seafarer's program, Somali pirates have hijacked another vessel from the United States.
ref: Menurut ketua program pelaut Kenya, lanun Somalia telah merampas sebuah lagi kapal dari Amerika Syarikat.

src: An American-owned tugboat from Italy along with its 16 member crew was hijacked around 11 am EST on Saturday in the Gulf of Aden.
ref: Satu kapal tunda milik Amerika dari Itali bersama-sama dengan 16 anggota anak-anak kapal dirampas sekitar 11 pagi EST pada hari Sabtu di Teluk Aden.

src: The Italian Ambassador, Pierandrea Magistrati, confirmed that "there is a boat that has been hijacked, I believe by Somali pirates."
ref: Duta Besar Itali, Pierandrea Magistrati, mengesahkan bahawa "terdapat satu bot yang telah dirampas, saya percaya oleh lanun Somalia".

src: Additionally, Shona Lowe, a spokeswoman at NATO's Northwood maritime command center reported that the Italian-flagged tugboat was hijacked this morning off of Somalia's northern coast.
ref: Tambahan pula, Shona Lowe, seorang jurucakap di Northwood pusat kawalan maritim NATO melaporkan bahawa kapal tunda yang berbendera Itali dirampas pagi ini di luar pantai utara Somalia.

src: Lowe also confirmed that Italian government officials along with the company that owned the tugboat were trying to secure the release of the crew, ten of which were Italians.
ref: Lowe juga mengesahkan bahawa pegawai-pegawai kerajaan Itali bersama-sama dengan syarikat yang dimiliki kapal tunda itu telah cuba untuk membebaskan anak-anak kapal, sepuluh daripadanya adalah orang Itali.

src: Andrew Mwangura, the head of the East African Seafarers' Assistance Program, said that maritime industry sources also reported that the U.S. tugboat was towing two barges at the time it was attacked.
ref: Andrew Mwangura, ketua Program Bantuan Pelaut Afrika Timur, berkata bahawa sumber-sumber industri maritim juga melaporkan bahawa kapal tunda A.S. telah menunda dua tongkang pada masa ia diserang.

src: The contents of those barges is not known at this time.
ref: Kandungan tongkang-tongkang itu tidak diketahui pada masa ini.

src: Meanwhile, U.S. Captain Richard Phillips of the U.S. Maersk Alabama is still being held hostage, for a fourth day, by four other Somali pirates.
ref: Sementara itu, Kapten Amerika Syarikat Richard Phillips dari Maersk Alabama A.S. masih ditahan, untuk hari keempat, oleh empat lanun Somalia lain.

src: Phillips, who voluntarily surrendered himself to the pirates in order to protect his crew, is being held in a lifeboat despite an attempt to escape.
ref: Phillips, yang secara sukarela menyerah diri kepada lanun untuk melindungi anak-anak kapal, ditahan dalam bot penyelamat walaupun mencuba melarikan diri sekali.

src: The government has announced 13 June as the date for the upcoming Mount Albert by-election.
ref: Kerajaan telah mengumumkan 13 Jun sebagai tarikh untuk pilihan raya kecil Gunung Albert akan datang.

src: The by-election has been caused by former Prime Minister Helen Clark's departure to head the United Nations Development Program.
ref: Pilihan raya kecil telah disebabkan oleh pemergian bekas Perdana Menteri Helen Clark untuk mengetuai Program Pembangunan Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa.

src: While it is considered to be a safe Labour seat, the by-election is expected to be heavily contested.
ref: Walaupun ia dianggap sebagai kerusi Buruh yang selamat, pilihan raya kecil dijangka akan banyak yang dipertandingkan.

src: So far four candidates have put their names forward: Auckland city councillor Glenda Fryer, former candidate Hamish McCracken, University of Auckland political studies lecturer Meg Bates and employment lawyer Helen White.
ref: Setakat ini empat calon telah meletakkan nama mereka ke hadapan: ahli majlis bandar Auckland Glenda Fryer, bekas calon Hamish McCracken, pensyarah kajian politik Universiti Auckland Meg Bates dan peguam pekerjaan Helen White.

src: List MP Phil Twyford, widely expected to succeed Ms Clark, has not put his name forward.
ref: Ahli Parlimen Phil Twyford, yang dijangka menggantikan Cik Clark, tidak meletakkan namanya ke hadapan.

src: The National Party has narrowed its possible candidates down to two: list MP Melissa Lee or unsuccessful 2008 candidate Ravi Musuku.
ref: Parti Kebangsaan telah mengurangkan calon kepada dua orang: Ahli Parlimen Melissa Lee atau calon yang tidak berjaya pada tahun 2008 Ravi Musuku.

src: The decision will be made at a party meeting on 4 May.
ref: Keputusan akan dibuat dalam mesyuarat parti pada 4 Mei.

src: The Greens and ACT New Zealand will both contest the by-election, but have yet to select candidates.
ref: The Greens dan ACT New Zealand kedua-duanya akan bertanding dalam pilihan raya kecil, tetapi masih belum memilih calon.

src: Two Palestinian families who have been living in East Jerusalem since 1956, were evicted from their homes on Sunday after an Israeli court rejected their appeal filed against the eviction.
ref: Dua keluarga berbangsa Palestin yang telah tinggal di Timur Jurusalem sejak 1956, diusir keluar daripada rumah mereka pada Ahad selepas mahkamah Israel menolak fail rayuan mereka menentang dakwaan tersebut.

src: The eviction comes after increasing international pressure on Israel to stop settlement activity and end home evictions.
ref: Pengusiran itu terjadi selepas peningkatan tekanan antarabangsa terhadap Israel untuk memberhentikan aktiviti penempatan dan pengusiran keluar rumah.

src: Israeli security forces entered the homes at 6:00 a.m. (local time) and forcibly removed the family and international activists who were also living in the homes.
ref: Tentera keselamatan Israel memasuki rumah tersebut pada 6:00 am (waktu tempatan) dan dengan cara paksaan menyingkirkan keluarga itu beserta aktivis antarabangsa yang juga tinggal dirumah itu.

src: Al Jazeera reports that a family was beaten with batons as they tried to get back into their house.
ref: Al Jazeera melaporkan bahawa keluarga tersebut telah dipukul dengan belantan semasa mereka cuba untuk memasuki kembali ke rumah mereka.

src: JTA reports that Jewish families moved into the homes shortly after the Palestinian families were evicted.
ref: JTA melaporkan keluarga yahudi berpindah masuk ke rumah tersebut sebaik sahaja keluarga Palestin itu diusir.

src: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu has laid biblical claim to the areas of East Jerusalem and has stated that Jews have the right to live anywhere in the city.
ref: Perdana Menteri Israel Benjamin Netanyahu telah membentangkan tuntutan kitab bible terhadap kawasan Timur Jurusalem dan telah menyatakan bahawa Yahudi mempunyai hak untuk tinggal dimana sahaja didalam bandar tersebut.

src: Although Jerusalem is internationally recognized as occupied territory, Israel continues to evict Palestinians and instead build Jewish only apartments in the area, an action which is considered to be illegal under the Fourth Geneva Convention.
ref: Walaupun Jurusalem dikenali pihak antarabangsa sebagai wilayah yang diduduki, Israel lantas mengusir rakyat Palestin dan sebagai ganti membina bangunan penempatan untuk Yahudi sahaja di kawasan tersebut, satu tindakan yang diambil kira sebagai tidak sah dibawah Persetujuan Geneva Keempat.

src: Israel has plans for 350 new apartment buildings in East Jerusalem.
ref: Israel mempunyai rancangan untuk membina 350 buah bangunan penempatan baru di Timur Jurusalem.

src: U.N special coordinator for Middle East Peace, Robert Serry, condemned the evictions as "totally unacceptable".
ref: Penyelaras khas UN untuk keamanan Timur Tengah, Robert Serry, mendakwa pengusiran itu sebagai "lansung tidak boleh diterima."

src: The international community, including the United States, has called on Israel to stop settlement activity and allow for the creation of a Palestinian state.
ref: Komuniti antarabangsa itu, termasuk Amerika Syarikat, telah memanggil Israel untuk memberhentikan aktiviti penempatan dan membenarkan pembentukan negara Palestin.

src: A fifth child has died as a result of a police pursuit that ended in a crash in Dinuba, California on Sunday, August 9.
ref: Kanak-kanak kelima telah meninggal dunia akibat pemburuan polis yang berakhir dengan kemalangan di Dinuba, California pada hari Ahad, 9 Ogos.

src: Carlos Eric Salazar, aged 8, was the eighth victim to die as a result of the crash.
ref: Carlos Eric Salazar, berusia 8 tahun, adalah mangsa kelapan yang meninggal dunia akibat kemalangan tersebut.

src: On Sunday, four children were among seven that were killed when the pursued suspect who, after refusing to stop for police, slammed into the GMC Sierra pickup truck carrying a family, two adults and five children.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, empat kanak-kanak daripada tujuh orang maut, apabila suspek yang dikejar enggan berhenti ketika disuruh polis, merempuh ke arah trak pikap GMC Sierra yang membawa keluarga, dua orang dewasa dan lima kanak-kanak.

src: The family was on their way to attend a football game for youths when the crash occurred.
ref: Keluarga itu sedang dalam perjalanan mereka untuk menghadiri perlawanan bola sepak belia semasa kemalangan itu berlaku.

src: Four of the children were ejected from the truck and died at the scene.
ref: Empat kanak-kanak telah dikeluarkan dari trak itu dan meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian.

src: The two adults and one child were taken to Community Regional Medical Center located in Fresno.
ref: Kedua-dua dewasa dan seorang kanak-kanak telah dibawa ke Pusat Perubatan Wilayah Komuniti yang terletak di Fresno.

src: Both vehicles collided with lemon trees at an orchard near the intersection of Avenue 424 and Road 120 in Dinuba.
ref: Dua kenderaan berlanggar dengan pokok-pokok limau di kebun berhampiran persimpangan Avenue 424 dengan Jalan 120 di Dinuba.

src: Three people, including the suspect, were in a stolen 2005 Dodge Neon and also died at the scene.
ref: Tiga orang, termasuk suspek, berada dalam Dodge Neon 2005 yang dicuri dan juga meninggal dunia di tempat kejadian tersebut.

src: Their identities are not yet known as none of them were carrying identification.
ref: Identiti mereka masih belum diketahui kerana tiada seorang pun daripada mereka yang membawa kad pengenalan.

src: The other children were named Sienna Salazar aged 1, Michael aged 3, Monique aged 4 and Jocelyn aged 7.
ref: Kanak-kanak lain bernama Sienna Salazar berumur 1 tahun, Michael berumur 3 tahun, Monique berumur 4 tahun dan Jocelyn berumur 7 tahun.

src: The two adults, Carlos Salazar Jr., 29, and Jennifer, 26, remain in the hospital where they are recovering from their injuries.
ref: Dua orang dewasa, Carlos Salazar Jr., berumur 29 tahun, dan Jennifer, berumur 26 tahun, masih tinggal di hospital di mana mereka pulih daripada kecederaan.

src: None of the victims in the pickup were wearing seat belts, according to Fox News.
ref: Tiada mangsa dalam pikap itu yang memakai tali pinggang keledar, menurut Fox News.

src: Astronomers have discovered an extrasolar planet that may eventually collide into its sun.
ref: Ahli astronomi telah menemui sebuah planet suria yang mungkin akan berlanggar dengan mataharinya.

src: The planet, called WASP-18b, orbits its star in under one day, and is 10 times larger than Jupiter.
ref: Planet itu, dipanggil WASP-18b, mengorbit bintangnya dalam satu hari, dan 10 kali lebih besar dari Musytari.

src: The planet's name is derived from the group that discovered it, WASP (Wide Angle Search for Planets).
ref: Nama planet itu diambil dari nama kumpulan yang menjumpainya, WASP (Sudut Luas Carian Planet).

src: Tidal interactions between the planet and its star are pulling them together, and it will likely crash into its star in under one million years.
ref: Pasang surut antara planet dan bintang itu menariknya bersama, akan berkemungkinan berlanggar ke bintang yang berusia satu juta tahun.

src: The planet is relatively much closer to its star than Earth is to the Sun.
ref: Planet ini lebih dekat dengan bintangnya jika dibandingkan dengan Bumi kepada Matahari.

src: Earth is a distance of 93 million miles from the sun, whereas WASP-18b is only 1.4 million miles from its star.
ref: Jarak Bumi dari Matahari ialah 93 juta batu, manakala WASP-18b hanyalah 1.4 juta batu dari bintangnya.

src: Professor Andrew Collier Cameron of St. Andrew's University commented on the inherent problems with the planet: "The problem with this planet is that it's very massive and very close to its star."
ref: Profeser Andrew Collier Cameron dari Universiti St. Andrew memberi komen bahawa masalah dengan kewujudan planet itu: "Masalah dengan planet itu ialah ianya sangat tumpat dan sangat dekat dengan bintang nya".

src: "It should be creating tidal bulging that makes it spiral into its star."
ref: "Ia sepatutnya mencipta pasang surut membonjol yang membuatkan ianya melingkar ke dalam bintang".

src: Coel Hellier of Keele University led a group of researchers that discovered the planet.
ref: Coel Hellier dari Universiti Keele mengetuai kumpulan penyelidik yang menemui planet itu.

src: Their study of WASP-18b was published in the August 27 issue of the journal Nature.
ref: Penyelidikan mereka tentang WASP-18b telah disiarkan dalam jurnal Semula Jadi keluaran 27 Ogos.

src: Scientists had a 1 in 2,000 chance of discovering the planet.
ref: Sainstis mempunyai 1 dalam 2000 peluang untuk menemui sebuah planet.

src: There are 300 planets which are known to orbit stars other than the Sun.
ref: Terdapat 300 planet-planet yang diketahui mengorbit bintang selain dari Matahari.

src: Two CH-47 Chinook helicopters were called in on Wednesday, September 2nd, to help contain the wildfires on the Hawaiian Island of Molokai.
ref: Dua buah helikopter CH-47 Chinook telah dipanggil pada hari Rabu, 2 September, untuk membantu membendung kebakaran hutan di Pulau Molokai Hawaii.

src: Smaller helicopters that were fighting the fire since it started around noon on August 29th were redeployed as well.
ref: Helikopter yang lebih kecil yang telah cuba memadamkan api sejak ia bermula sekitar tengah hari pada 29 Ogos juga telah ditugaskan semula.

src: According to Gen Iinuma, Maui County Civil Defense administrator, the CH-47s carry 2000-gallon buckets of water, whereas the smaller helicopters only have 100-gallon buckets.
ref: Menurut Gen Iinuma, pentadbir Pertahanan Awam Maui County, CH-47 membawa 2000-gelen baldi air, manakala helikopter kecil hanya mempunyai 100 gelen baldi.

src: The Chinooks can dump more water in fewer trips than the smaller helicopters.
ref: Chinooks boleh menumpahkan lebih banyak air dengan lebih sedikit perjalanan berbanding helikopter yang lebih kecil.

src: On the other hand, the tremendous downdraft from the bigger aircraft may make the fire worse.
ref: Sebaliknya, penyimbahan air yang amat banyak dari pesawat yang lebih besar mungkin boleh membuat api menjadi lebih teruk.

src: "If they don't do it right, they'll fan the fire," Iinuma said.
ref: "Jika mereka tidak melakukannya dengan betul, mereka akan memarakkan api," kata Iinuma.

src: According to Iinuma, ground crews are continuing to maintain the fire's perimeter, which remained unchanged from Tuesday.
ref: Menurut Iinuma, krew tanah berterusan untuk mengekalkan perimeter api, yang tidak berubah sejak hari Selasa.

src: The helicopters are being used to fight the fires where ground crews can't reach, such as steep mountain passes and valleys.
ref: Helikopter digunakan untuk melawan kebakaran di kawasan yang tidak dapat dicapai krew tanah, seperti laluan gunung curam dan lembah.

src: Iinuma also expressed concern about a red flag advisory the National Weather service put out for all leeward areas of the Hawaiian Islands, meaning conditions are ripe for fires.
ref: Iinuma juga melahirkan kebimbangan mengenai nasihat bendera merah yang diletak oleh perkhidmatan Cuaca Kebangsaan untuk semua kawasan bawah angin di Kepulauan Hawaii, bermakna ia adalah keadaan yang mudah terbakar.

src: Lieutenant Governor James "Duke" Aiona, who took an aerial survey of Molokai's brush fire area, said it was "no immediate threat".
ref: Leftenan Gabenor James "Duke" Aiona, yang membuat kajian aerial di kawasan belukar berapi di Molokai, berkata ia "tiada ancaman segera".

src: He also noted that the fire seemed to come right up to the perimeter of some properties, but almost always stopped there.
ref: Beliau juga menyatakan bahawa api itu seolah-olah datang sehingga ke perimeter beberapa aset, tetapi selalunya berhenti di sana.

src: Aiona's observations are mirrored by a local business owners' story.
ref: Pemerhatian Aiona ini adalah sama dengan cerita dari pemilik perniagaan tempatan.

src: The wildfires destroyed the beehives of Molokai Meli, a family-owned honey business in Kapaakea, but residents admit that the beehives were not their main concern.
ref: Kebakaran hutan memusnahkan sarang lebah Molokai Meli, perniagaan madu milik keluarga di Kapaakea, tetapi penduduk mengakui bahawa sarang lebah bukan kebimbangan utama mereka.

src: "We were just beating the edges with wet towels and sheets to try and keep it from getting to the houses that are just right over that ridge," said co-owner Brenda Kaneshiro.
ref: "Kami hanya memukul setiap sudut dengan tuala basah dan kain untuk mencuba dan memastikan ia daripada merebak ke rumah-rumah yang berdekatan rabung itu," kata pemilik bersama Brenda Kaneshiro.

src: "All that metal right there, that's where they all were, there were 33 of them," said Elijah Kaneshiro, the owner's son.
ref: "Semua logam yang di sana, itulah tempat mereka pernah berada, terdapat 33 kesemuanya," kata Elia Kaneshiro, anak pemilik.

src: Pope Benedict XVI has announced that he will be coming to the United Kingdom in January 2010.
ref: Paus Benedict XVI telah mengumumkan bahawa beliau akan datang ke United Kingdom pada Januari 2010.

src: The information was announced that the Pope had accepted an invitation to visit the United Kingdom from Prime Minister Gordon Brown.
ref: Maklumat itu telah mengatakan bahawa Paus telah menerima jemputan untuk melawat United Kingdom dari Perdana Menteri Gordon Brown.

src: The latter had visited the Vatican City three times and had invited the Pope to come to Great Britain in February 2009.
ref: Beliau telah melawat Vatican City sebanyak tiga kali dan telah menjemput Paus untuk datang ke Great Britain pada Februari 2009.

src: Downing Street is expected to confirm the arrangements later today.
ref: Downing Street dijangka mengesahkan perkara tersebut lewat hari ini.

src: This visit would make the first Papal visit to the UK since Pope John Paul II's visit in 1982.
ref: Lawatan ini akan menjadikan lawatan pertama Paus ke UK sejak lawatan Paus John Paul II pada tahun 1982.

src: However, John Paul's visit was on a pastoral basis, so this is set to be the first state visit to the UK by a pope in that it is the first to follow an official invitation.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, lawatan John Paul adalah atas dasar pastoral, maka ini merupakan lawatan negara pertama ke United Kingdom oleh seorang Paus kerana ia adalah lawatan pertama yang mengikuti jemputan rasmi.

src: John Paul's six-day tour through England, Scotland and Wales was hugely popular, attracting hundreds of thousands of people from the Catholic religion.
ref: Lawatan selama enam hari John Paul menerusi England, Scotland dan Wales menjadi sangat popular, menarik beratus-ratus ribu orang dari agama Katolik.

src: It became the first ever UK visit from the Pope, which will make Pope Benedict's visit the second papal one.
ref: Ia menjadi satu-satunya lawatan pertama Paus ke UK, yang menjadikan lawatan Paus Benedict sebagai paus kedua.

src: John Paul's visit was likely to be cancelled due to the Falklands War and assasination attempts.
ref: Lawatan John Paul telah hampir dibatalkan kerana Perang Falklands dan cubaan membunuh.

src: The government of Saudi Arabia removed an eleven-year ban on livestock imports from Somalia after fears of Rift Valley Fever were allayed, senior Somali officials said on Thursday.
ref: Kerajaan Arab Saudi telah mengeluarkan sebelas-tahun sekatan terhadap haiwan ternakan import dari Somalia selepas taku jangkitan dari Demam Rift Valley tersebar, kata pegawai atasan Somali pada Khamis.

src: The decision was well received across Somalia, as hundreds of thousands of farmers heavily rely on animal exports to the oil-rich Middle East.
ref: Keputusan itu diterima Somalia, selepas beratus ribu peladang sangat bergantung kepada pengeksoprtan haiwan ke negara kaya dengan minyak Timur tengah.

src: Under the new arrangement, Saudi officials will closely examine animals before they are shipped off to Saudi soil.
ref: Tertakluk dibawah susunan baru, pejabat Saudi akan mengkaji lebih dekat haiwan itu sebelum dihantar keluar ke tanah Saudi.

src: "This is a tremendous decision for Somalis across the Horn of Africa," said Idiris Ibrahim Abdi, the livestock minister of Somaliland, the self-declared republic in northern Somalia, which has developed one of the most sophisticated animal processing plants in its port town of Berbera.
ref: "Ini adalah keputusan drastik untuk Somalia merentas Tanah Afrika," kata Idiris Ibrahim Abdi, Menteri ternakan tanah Somalia, republik diutara Somalia yang mengisytuhar sendiri, yang telah membangun sebagai pusat pemprosesan haiwan yang canggih di bandar pelabuhan Berbera.

src: According to news accounts, the Saudi agricultural ministry said the decision is based on years of cross-examination and monitoring of animal farms in Somalia.
ref: Menurut akaun berita, kementerian pertanian Saudi berkata keputusan itu dibuat berdasarkan kajian bertahun dan pemerhatian kepada ladang-ladang di Somalia.

src: Animal trade is one of the few surviving economic engines of Somalia's largely destroyed economy.
ref: Dagangan haiwan merupakan salah satu dari enjin kehidupan ekonomi Somalia yang musnah.

src: Business leaders and animal farmers have largely welcomed the Saudi decision.
ref: Ketua perusahaan dan penternak haiwan secara berbesar hati mengalu-alukan keputusan Saudi.

src: The corpse of former Cypriot President Tassos Papadopoulos has been stolen by grave robbers.
ref: Mayat bekas Presiden Cypriot Tassos Papadopoulos telah dicuri oleh perompak kubur.

src: Officials report that his body was taken overnight from the Deftera Cemetery in Nicosia.
ref: Para pegawai melaporkan bahawa mayatnya diambil semalaman daripada Perkuburan Deftera di Nicosia.

src: The theft was reported one day before the anniversary of his death.
ref: Perompakan itu dilaporkan sehari sebelum ulang tahun kematiannya.

src: Police reported that fresh mounds of dirt were piled up beside the grave.
ref: Polis melaporkan bahawa busut kotoran yang baru menimbun di tepi kubur.

src: The leader of the Diko party, Papadopoulos’s former alliance, released a statement.
ref: Pemimpin parti Diko, bekas perikatan Papadopoulos, mengeluarkan satu kenyataan.

src: Marios Garoyan called the act a "heinous and terrible crime".
ref: Marios Garoyan memanggil tindakan ini sebagai "jenayah kejam dan dahsyat".

src: A heavy smoker, Papadopoulos died on the 12th of December, 2008 after a battle with lung cancer.
ref: Perokok berat, Papadopoulos meninggal dunia pada 12 Disember 2008 selepas pertempuran dengan kanser paru-paru.

src: He was the President of Cyprus from the 23rd of February, 2003 until 23 February 2008.
ref: Beliau merupakan Presiden Cyprus dari 23 Februari 2003 hingga 23 Februari 2008.

src: A second day of winter weather and snow has caused further disruption in the UK.
ref: Hari kedua musim sejuk dan salji telah menyebabkan gangguan lanjut di UK.

src: At 15:13 GMT last Saturday, one Wikinews contributor in West Lothian described the conditions there as 'white-out', although later conditions were reported to have improved.
ref: Pada 15:13 GMT Sabtu lalu, seorang penyumbang Wikinews di Utara Lothian menggambarkan keadaan di sana seperti 'putih seputihnya', walaupun keadaan selepas itu dilaporkan telah semakin baik.

src: Forecasters had indicated further snow in Scotland later into Saturday evening, with some higher ground experiencing as much as 15 centimetres into Sunday.
ref: Peramal cuaca telah menandakan lebih banyak salji turun di Scotland petang Sabtu nanti, dengan sebahagian tanah tinggi akan menghadapi sebanyak 15 centimetres memasuki hari Ahad.

src: Heavy snow for parts of Northern England had also been forecast.
ref: Salji tebal di bahagian-bahagian Utara England juga telah diramal.

src: In South of England the wintry weather has also affected cross channel services, with Operation Stack being brought into effect due to issues at the Port of Calais.
ref: Di Selatan England cuaca sejuk akan turut memberi kesan kepada servis saluran, dengan Operasi Stack diaktifkan atas beberapa isu di Pelabuhan Calais.

src: Eurostar and Channel tunnel services were also disrupted for an extended period, when trains broke down temporarily stranding at least 2000 passengers according to both BBC and Guardian reports.
ref: Servis terowong Eurostar dan Channel juga turut terganggu untuk tempoh yang dilanjutkan, apabila semua keretaapi rosak buat sementara waktu dan menyebabkan sekurang-kurangnya 2000 orang penumpang terkandas menurut kedua-dua laporan dari BBC dan Guardian.

src: The cause is still under investigation, but it has been suggested, temperatures changes on entering the Channel tunnel may have been responsible.
ref: Puncanya masih di dalam penyiasatan, tetapi ada dikatakan, yang perubahan suhu semasa memasuki terowong Channel mungkin menjadi sebab.

src: In addition to transport disruption, a number of sports have been affected.
ref: Sebagai tambahan kepada gangguan pengangkutan, sejumlah sukan juga telah terjejas.

src: At least twenty football fixtures across the UK have been postponed, with some rugby matches also affected.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya dua puluh perlawanan bola sepak di seluruh UK telah ditangguhkan, dengan beberapa perlawanan rugbi juga terganggu.
