src: Race meetings at Haydock, Newcastle were cancelled due to the conditions, a planned meet at Ascot having been abandoned earlier.
ref: Perlumbaan kuda di Haydock, Newcastle juga telah dibatalkan atas sebab keadaan itu, satu rancangan perlumbaan di Ascot telah diabaikan awal tadi.

src: A National Hunt meeting at Carlisle yesterday was also abandoned.
ref: Satu perlumbaan National Hunt di Carlisle semalam juga turut diabaikan.

src: The Ulster Defense Association (UDA), a paramilitary group in Northern Ireland that wants Northern Ireland to remain in the United Kingdom, said today that it has rid itself of its weapons.
ref: Kesatuan Pertahanan Ulster (UDA), sebuah kumpulan separa tentera di Ireland Utara yang mahu Ireland Utara kekal di United Kingdom, berkata hari ini bahawa ia telah menghapuskan senjatanya.

src: A statement by the group read, "The Ulster Defense Association was formed to defend our communities."
ref: Satu kenyataan oleh kumpulan tersebut berkata, "Kesatuan Pertahanan Ulster telah ditubuhkan untuk mempertahankan masyarakat kita."

src: "We state quite clearly and categorically that this responsibility now rests with the government and its institutions where legitimacy resides."
ref: "Kami menyatakan dengan jelas dan mutlak bahawa tanggungjawab ini kini terletak di tangan kerajaan dan institusi di mana kesahihan berada."

src: UDA spokesperson Frankie Gallagher spoke at a press conference in Belfast, stating that the group regrets the approximately 400 people, primarily Catholic civilians, that they were responsible for the murder of between 1971 and 2001.
ref: Jurucakap UDA Frankie Gallagher bercakap di sidang akhbar di Belfast, menyatakan bahawa kumpulan itu kesal dengan kira-kira 400 orang, terutamanya orang awam Katolik, bahawa mereka yang bertanggungjawab ke atas pembunuhan antara tahun 1971 dan 2001.

src: He added, "But we are determined and are willing to play our full part in ensuring that tragedy of the last 40 years will never happen again."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Tetapi kami berazam dan bersedia untuk memainkan peranan penuh kami dalam memastikan tragedi 40 tahun lalu tidak akan berlaku lagi."

src: The destruction of ammunition and explosives was verified by the Independent International Commission on Decommissioning, stating that other groups have a deadline of February 9 to destroy arms they may still hold, after which they may potentially face imprisonment.
ref: Pemusnahan peluru dan bahan letupan telah disahkan oleh Suruhanjaya Antarabangsa Bebas dalam Penyahtauliahan, yang menyatakan bahawa kumpulan-kumpulan lain mempunyai tarikh akhir 9 Februari untuk memusnahkan senjata yang mereka masih miliki, dan selepas itu mereka mungkin menghadapi hukuman penjara.

src: Ireland's Foreign Affairs Minister, Micheál Martin, said in a statement, "This is a statement of confidence in the political process and in the devolved institutions."
ref: Menteri Luar Ireland, Micheal Martin, katanya dalam satu kenyataan, "Ini adalah satu kenyataan keyakinan dalam proses politik dan di institusi diturunkan."

src: Irish President Mary McAleese said the group's choice was "a very positive milestone on the journey of peace."
ref: Presiden Ireland Mary McAleese berkata pilihan kumpulan itu adalah "satu peristiwa yang sangat positif atas perjalanan mencapai kedamaian."

src: The other main "loyalist" groups, the Ulster Volunteer Force (UVF) and Red Hand Commandos (RHC), are reported to have destroyed their arms last June, with the Irish Republican Army (IRA) having destroyed their arms four years ago.
ref: Kumpulan "setia" utama yang lain, Pasukan Sukarelawan Ulster (UVF) dan Komando Tangan Merah (RHC), dilaporkan telah memusnahkan senjata mereka pada bulan Jun lepas, dengan Republik Ireland Army (IRA) telah memusnahkan senjata mereka empat tahun lalu.

src: However, two republican splinter groups, the Continuity Irish Republican Army (CIRA) and the Real Irish Republican Army (RIRA), have refused to lay down their arms and have continued to undertake attacks including three murders in March of 2009.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kedua-dua kumpulan serpihan republik, Kesinambungan Irish Republican Army (CIRA) dan Real Irish Republican Army (RIRA), telah menolak untuk meletakkan senjata mereka dan terus menjalankan serangan termasuk tiga pembunuhan pada bulan Mac 2009.

src: The Real IRA attacked the Massereene Barracks in Antrim, County Antrim on March 7 and killed two British soliders.
ref: Real API menyerang Barracks Massereene di Antrim, County Antrim pada 7 Mac dan membunuh dua orang askar British.

src: Three days later, The Continuity IRA claimed responsibility for the murder of Police Service of Northern Ireland officer Stephen Carroll, who was shot by a sniper responding to a call.
ref: Tiga hari kemudian, Kesinambungan API mengaku bertanggungjawab atas pembunuhan pegawai Polis Perkhidmatan Ireland Utara Stephen Carroll, yang telah ditembak oleh penembak hendap bertindak balas kepada satu panggilan.

src: There is also concern that the power-sharing government between Sinn Féin and the Democratic Unionist Party may collapse because of disagreements between the parties on the issue of transferring policing and justice powers from London.
ref: Terdapat juga kebimbangan bahawa kerajaan perkongsian kuasa antara Sinn Féin dan Parti Demokrat Unionist boleh runtuh kerana perbezaan pendapat antara pihak-pihak itu mengenai isu memindahkan kuasa polisi dan keadilan dari London.

src: A circus elephant managed to escape from her handler on Sunday night in the city of Zurich, Switzerland before being recaptured by local police and circus animal keepers.
ref: Seekor gajah sarkas telah berjaya melarikan diri dari jurulatihnya pada malam hari Ahad di bandar Zurich, Switzerland sebelum ditangkap semula oleh polis tempatan dan penjaga haiwan sarkas.

src: The 26-year-old female elephant, named Sabu, is from Switzerland's Zirkus Knie.
ref: Gajah betina berusia 26 tahun itu, yang dinamakan Sabu, ialah dari Zirkus Knie Switzerland.

src: She was able to make her escape just before being put into a trailer, while the keeper was not paying attention.
ref: Ia mampu melarikan diri sejurus sebelum dimasukkan ke dalam treler, ketika penjaga tidak memberi perhatian kepadanya.

src: Around 1930 local time (1730 UTC), Sabu was seen wading in Lake Zurich for a short time before walking back onto city streets.
ref: Sekitar 1930 waktu tempatan (1730 UTC), Sabu telah dilihat mengharungi Tasik Zurich untuk masa yang seketika sebelum berjalan kembali ke jalan bandar.

src: Zurich police said that Sabu wandered along the Bahnhofstrasse avenue of Zurich, which is known as the city's most exclusive shopping street.
ref: Polis Zurich berkata yang Sabu telah merayau-rayau di sepanjang lebuh Bahnhofstrasse di Zurich, yang dikenali sebagai pusat membeli-belah paling ekslusif di bandar itu.

src: She also passed by Zürich Hauptbahnhof (the city's main rail station) and Paradeplatz, a square of Bahnhofstrasse, where both Credit Suisse Group AG and UBS AG have headquarters.
ref: Ia turut melalui Zurich Hauptbahnhof (stesen kereta api utama bandar tersebut) dan Paradeplatz, sebuah medan di Bahnhofstrasse, di mana ada ibu pejabat kedua-dua kumpulan Kredit Suisse AG dan UBS AG.

src: For nearly an hour, police chased the elephant around the city before she was finally peacefully recaptured in the Talstrasse section of Zurich.
ref: Untuk hampir dua jam, polis telah mengejar gajah itu di sekitar bandar tersebut sebelum ia akhirnya ditangkap semula secara aman di seksyen Talstrasse di Zurich.

src: Circus officials and police followed Sabu, but a circus spokesperson said that she did not respond to their calls.
ref: Para pengawai sarkas dan polis telah mengikut Sabu, tetapi seorang jurucakap sarkas berkata yang ia tidak memberi respon kepada panggilan mereka.

src: Sabu was also said to have been moving so fast that police had difficulty keeping up with her.
ref: Sabu turut dikatakan bergerak dengan amat pantas sehingga polis mempunyai kesusahan menghampirinya.

src: At about 2000 local time (1900 UTC), a keeper was able to control the animal and load her onto a truck to take her to Winterthur, where the other circus animals were.
ref: Di sekitar jam 2000 waktu tempatan (1900 UTC), seorang penjaga telah berjaya mengawal haiwan tersebut dan memasukkannya ke dalam trak untuk membawanya ke Winterthur, di mana haiwan sarkas lain berada.

src: There were no reports of any damage or injuries during the incident, and although police held back onlookers, at least one bystander managed to capture video of the event.
ref: Tidak ada laporan sebarang kerosakan atau kecederaan semasa kejadian itu, dan walaupun polis menahan orang ramai yang melihat, sekurang-kurangnya seorang yang berada di tempat kejadian berjaya merakam video kejadian itu.

src: The circus said that Sabu may have escaped after being frightened by storms near Zurich.
ref: Pihak sarkas berkata yang Sabu mungkin telah melarikan diri setelah ditakutkan oleh ribut berdekatan Zurich.

src: After returning to the circus, she was said to be tired, but "pleased to be back."
ref: Selepas kembali ke sarkas, ia dikatakan dalam kepenatan, tetapi "gembira untuk kembali".

src: Traralgon bounced back after their loss to Morwell with a 73 point victory over Sale in round thirteen of the Gippsland Football League.
ref: Traralgon bangkit semula selepas tewas kepada Morwell dengan kemenangan 73 mata menewaskan Sale di pusingan tiga belas Liga Ragbi Gippsland.

src: The Gippsland League is the only major Australian rules football competition in the Gippsland region according to the Victorian Country Football League.
ref: Liga Gippsland adalah satu-satunya pertandingan ragbi dikuasai Australia utama di kawasan Gippsland mengikut Liga Bolasepak Negara Victoria.

src: Traralgon's defence held strong as the team went inside their attacking fifty 63 times to Sales 57.
ref: Pertahanan Traralgon bertahan kuat pada masa pasukan itu masuk ke dalam serangan mereka lima puluh 63 kali berbanding Sales 57.

src: Sale, however, lead the centre clearances 35 to Traralgon's 27.
ref: Sale, bagaimanapun, mengetuai pengeluaran bola di tengah padang pada 35 berbanding Traralgon 27.

src: The victory moves Traralgon back to second, a game clear of Morwell, who lost to Maffra by 32 points.
ref: Kemenangan itu membawa Traralgon kembali ke tempat kedua, satu permainan tanpa Morwell, yang tewas kepada Maffra sebanyak 32 mata.

src: Berlin's Neukoellner Opera House is causing a stir with its new production, The Yellow Princess.
ref: Neukoellner Panggung Opera Berlin menyebabkan kekacauan dengan pengeluarannya yang baru, Puteri Kuning.

src: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."
ref: Kisah ini dipersembahkan dalam opera Perancis, oleh Camille Saint-Saens, iaitu seorang artis "yang hidupnya ditentukan oleh kecintaannya terhadap ubat-ubatan dan negara Jepun".

src: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.
ref: Hasilnya, pelakon merokok sendi ganja di atas pentas, dan teater itu sendiri menggalakkan penonton untuk menyertainya.

src: Artistic director Bernhard Glocksin says that the theatre is claiming the metaphorical "artistic licence", to excuse the actions of the actors and audience, which are against German law.
ref: Pengarah artistik Bernhard Glocksin mengatakan bahawa teater menuntut metafora "lesen seni," untuk menghalalkan tindakan pelakon dan penonton, yang menyalahi undang-undang Jerman.

src: Glocksin was quoted by Ananova as saying opera would be "improved with a few joints and some appetising lines", noting the production was partly an experiment, to see what they could "get away with."
ref: Glocksin sebagai yang dipetik oleh Ananova berkata opera akan "bertambah baik dengan beberapa babak merokok sendi ganja dan beberapa skrip yang menarik," mencatatkan produksi sebahagiannya adalah percubaan, untuk melihat apa yang mereka boleh "terlepas" dari persembahan itu.

src: "Artistic licence" is at par to an "artistic liberty", where something is exaggerated or changed for the sake of the art itself.
ref: "Lesen seni" adalah setanding dengan "kebebasan seni," di mana sesuatu itu dibesar-besarkan atau berubah demi seni itu sendiri.

src: For example a visual artist painting a landscape might move a tree to another area of their work, for better balance, or a poet ignoring pentameter when writing a traditional sonnet.
ref: Sebagai contoh seorang artis visual yang melukis lukisan landskap mungkin menggerakkan pokok ke kawasan lain pada karya mereka, untuk lebih keseimbangan, atau seorang penyair mengabaikan sajak bersuku lima apabila menulis sonnet tradisional.

src: A huge wildfire that has been burning in the High Desert of Southern California since 2:00 pm (2200 UTC) yesterday continues to threaten residents in the city of Palmdale in the Antelope Valley region of the Los Angeles County this afternoon.
ref: Satu kebakaran besar yang telah menimpa Gurun Tinggi California Selatan sejak 2:00 petang (2200 UTC) semalam terus mengancam penduduk bandar Palmdale di kawasan Lembah Antelope di Los Angeles petang ini.

src: Mandatory evacuation orders have been set in place, affecting 2,000 homes.
ref: Perintah pemindahan mandatori telah dikeluarkan, melibatkan 2,000 rumah.

src: The fire is one of three that ignited yesterday in the Mojave Desert and San Gabriel Mountains.
ref: Kebakaran tersebut merupakan salah satu daripada tiga yang tercetus semalam di Gurun Mojave dan pergunungan San Gabriel.

src: The first was a 30-acre fire that began to the west of Lancaster in the Fairmont area.
ref: Kebakaran pertama merupakan kebakaran 30-ekar yang mula merebak ke barat Lancaster di kawasan Fairmont.

src: It was contained and suppressed by mid-afternoon, but the other two fires ignited while firefighters were battling the first.
ref: Ia surut dan disekat pada pertengahan petang, tetapi dua kebakaran lagi mencetus semasa ahli bomba masih melawan kebakaran pertama.

src: The second fire, the "Briggs Fire", began shortly after 2:00 pm near 8334 Soledad Canyon Road and Briggs Road, south of the freeway.
ref: Kebakaran kedua, "Briggs Fire," mula sejurus selepas 2:00 petang sekitar 8334 Soledad Canyon Road dan Briggs Road, selatan lebuh raya.

src: It burned 500 acres south of the 14 Freeway, but the Los Angeles County Fire Department (LACFD) now has it contained, and firefighters are hopeful that it will burn itself out as it edges closer to the 160,577-acre burn area of last year's Station Fire.
ref: Ia membakar 500 ekar selatan lebuh raya 14, tetapi Jabatan Bomba Daerah Los Angeles (LACFD) kini telah menghentikannya, dan ahli bomba berharap ia akan mati sendiri berikutan ia mendekati 160,577-ekar kawasan bakar Station Fire tahun lepas.

src: The third fire, the "Crown Fire", broke out at around the same time as the Briggs Fire on the northern side of the 14 Freeway near Acton.
ref: Kebakaran ketiga, "Crown Fire," tercetus sekitar masa yang sama dengan Briggs Fire di sebelah selatan Lebuh raya 14 berdekatan Acton.

src: The Crown fire has so far burned 13,000 acres and has been heading north into Leona Valley and Palmdale.
ref: Crown fire sehingga kini telah membakar 13,000 ekar dan menuju selatan ke Leona Valley dan Palmdale.

src: Over 800 firefighters are now tackling the Crown Fire on the ground, Boeing 747 and McDonnell Douglas DC-10 fixed-wing aircraft have taken to the skies to drop Phos-Chek slurry (a red powdery fire retardant that is a mixture of mostly water and fertilizer, and doesn't evaporate) on the fire, and modified Sikorsky UH-60 Black Hawk helicopters known as "Firehawks" are making water-drops.
ref: Lebih daripada 800 ahli bomba kini mengatasi Crown Fire di lapangan, Boeing 747 dan McDonnell Douglas DC-10 pesawat bersayap tetap telah diterbangkan untuk menurunkan buburan Phos-Chek (serbuk merah kalis api yang merupakan campuran kebanyakannya air dan baja, dan tidak mengewap) atas api, dan helikopter Sikorsky UH-60 Black Hawk yang diubah suai dikenali sebagai "Firehawks" membentuk titik air.

src: As well as LACFD, firefighters from Los Angeles City Fire Department, California Department of Forestry and Fire Protection (Cal Fire) are also helping to battle the fire.
ref: Seperti mana LACFD, ahli bomba dari Balai Bomba Bandar Los Angeles, Jabatan Perhutanan dan Perlindungan Kebakaran (Cal Fire) juga membantu untuk memerangi kebakaran.

src: Weather conditions and topography have hindered their efforts, as temperatures rose to 98 degrees Fahrenheit today, with windspeeds of 25mph.
ref: Keadaan cuaca dan topografi telah menghalang usaha mereka, berikutan suhu naik ke 98 darjah Fahrenheit hari ini, dengan angin kelajuan 25mpj.

src: Tonight, the National Weather Service predicts winds will reach as high as 50mph.
ref: Malam ini, Servis Cuaca Negara meramalkan angin akan mencecah setinggi 50mpj.

src: The fire burned down a Los Angeles County Sheriff Department communications tower, forcing Lancaster and Palmdale-based deputies to set up mobile operations bases and coordinate their efforts using cell phones and computers.
ref: Kebakaran tersebut membakar menara komunikasi Jabatan Syeriff Daerah Los Angeles, memaksa timbalan pangkalan Lancaste dan Palmdale untuk menubuhkan pangkalan operasi mudah alih dan menyelaraskan usaha mereka menggunakan telefon bimbit dan komputer.

src: Last night, the California Aqueduct acted as a barrier to the fire.
ref: Malam semalam, Akueduk California bertindak sebagai penyekat kebakaran tersebut.

src: Residents of Leona Valley, Lake Elizabeth, Ritter Ranch, Rancho Vista, Ana Verde and Palmdale received Reverse 911 telephone calls last night alerting them of mandatory evacuations.
ref: Penduduk Leona Valley, Lake Elizabeth, Ritter Ranch, Rancho Vista, Ana Verde and Palmdale menerima panggilan telefon Reverse 911 malam semalam memaklumkan mereka pemindahan mandatori.

src: Many of the evacuation orders were lifted this morning as the spread of the fire decreased.
ref: Kebanyakan arahan pemindahan dibatalkan pagi ini berikutan rebakan api telah menurun.

src: However, as winds picked up in the afternoon, fire embers were carried across the aqueduct and the fire is now heading towards a highly-populated area of Palmdale.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, berikutan angin kencang pada waktu petang, bara api dibawa merentasi saluran air dan kebakaran kini menuju kawasan berpopulasi tinggi di Palmdale.

src: Residents who were allowed back into their homes were re-evacuated to Red Cross shelters set up in local schools and parks.
ref: Penduduk yang dibenarkan kembali ke rumah mereka dipindah semula ke tempat perlindungan Palang Merah yang dibina di sekolah dan taman tempatan.

src: The fire is also threatening five high-voltage power lines that supply electricity to much of Southern California.
ref: Kebakaran tersebut jugan mengancam lima talian elektrik bervoltan tinggi yang menyalurkan elektrik kepada kebanyakan California Selatan.

src: 21 customers in the immediate vicinity have been without power since yesterday.
ref: 21 pelanggan di kawasan terdekat mengalami keadaan tanpa bekalan elektrik sejak semalam.

src: At 5:00 pm, California Governor Arnold Schwarzenegger, police and fire officials held a press conference.
ref: Pada pukul 5:00 petang, Gabenor Arnold Schwarzenegger, pegawai polis dan bomba mengadakan satu sidang akhbar.

src: The governor said that the fire was 20% contained and had burned 13,000 acres.
ref: Gabenor menyatakan yang kebakaran telah dikawal sebanyak 20% dan telah membakar 13,000 ekar.

src: It is thought that the fire began when workers in Agua Dulce caused sparks by hammering the bolts when they were removing a tire from a rim.
ref: Difahamkan bahawa kebakaran bermula apabila pekerja di Agua Dulce mengakibatkan percikan api semasa mengukul bolt apabila mereka mengeluarkan tayar daripada rim.

src: US professional wrestler and former World Wrestling Entertainment star Lance Cade has been found dead at the age of 29.
ref: Ahli gusti profesional Amerika Syarika dan bekas World Wrestling Entertainment bintang Lance Cade telah ditemui mati pada usia 29.

src: The cause of death was announced by Cade’s father as apparent heart failure.
ref: Punca kematian telah diumumkan oleh bapa Cade sebagai kegagalan jantung.

src: Cade, whose real name is Lance McNaught was trained by former world champion Shawn Michaels and made his professional debut in 1999.
ref: Cade, atau nama sebenarnya Lance McNaught telah dilatih oleh bekas juara dunia Shawn Michaels dan membuat penampilan profesionalnya pada tahun 1999.

src: After working in Japan, Cade signed with World Wrestling Entertainment, the largest wrestling promotion in the United States.
ref: Selepas bekerja di Jepun, Cade ditandatangani World Wrestling Entertainment, promosi gusti yang terbesar di Amerika Syarikat.

src: In 2003 Cade made his first appearance on television and teamed with Mark Jindrak.
ref: Pada tahun 2003 Cade membuat penampilan pertama di televisyen dan bekerjasama dengan Mark Jindrak.

src: After one year the team split and Cade was tagged with another wrestler.
ref: Selepas setahun berpecah pasukan dan Cade telah ditandakan dengan ahli gusti lain.

src: With Trevor Murdoch, Cade won the World Tag Team Championship three times in as many years.
ref: Dengan Trevor Murdoch, Cade memenangi tag World Championship pasukan tiga kali pada tahun-tahun banyak.

src: After five years in the company Cade was released from his contract in October 2008.
ref: Selepas lima tahun di syarikat Cade dibebaskan dari kontraknya pada Oktober 2008.

src: He was later re-hired in 2009 but again released the next year.
ref: Beliau kemudiannya telah diupah semula pada tahun 2009 tetapi sekali lagi dikeluarkan tahun akan datang.

src: World Wrestling Entertainment released a statement on the death Cade through its website.
ref: World Wrestling Entertainment mengeluarkan kenyataan mengenai kematian Cade melalui laman webnya.

src: It read “World Wrestling Entertainment was informed Friday morning by Lance McNaught’s father that he has passed away of apparent heart failure.
ref: Ia membaca "World Wrestling Entertainment telah dimaklumkan pagi Jumaat oleh bapa Lance McNaught bahawa beliau telah meninggal dunia akibat kegagalan jantung jelas.

src: Former Tag Team Champion Matt Hardy and WWE legend Mick Foley paid tributes to Cade.
ref: Bekas Tag Team Champion Matt Hardy dan legenda WWE Mick Foley memberi penghormatan kepada Cade.

src: BP released their report into the causes of the Deepwater Horizon disaster earlier this year on Wednesday, and shifted much of the blame for the explosion and subsequent oil spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the largest accidental marine oil spill in the history of the petroleum industry, onto , the company managing the rig.
ref: BP telah mengeluarkan laporan mengenai sebab bencana Deepwater Horizon awal tahun ini pada hari Rabu, dan meletakkan hampir semua kesalahan untuk letupan dan kemudiannya tumpahan minyak di dalam Teluk Mexico, tumpahan minyak di marin secara tidak sengaja terbesar di dalam sejarah industri petroleum, kepada, syarikat yang menguruskan rig.

src: The report concludes by stating that decisions made by "multiple companies and work teams" contributed to the accident which it says arose from "a complex and interlinked series of mechanical failures, human judgments, engineering design, operational implementation and team interfaces."
ref: Laporan itu merumuskan dengan menyatakan keputusan itu dibuat oleh "banyak syarikat dan pasukan kerja" yang terlibat dalam kemalangan tersebut di mana ia menyatakan timbul dari "kegagalan siri mekanikal yang rumit dan bersambung, pertimbangan manusia, reka bentuk kejuruteraan, pelaksanaan operasi dan antara muka pasukan."

src: The report, the product of a four-month investigation conducted by BP's Head of Safety Operations, Mark Bly, criticizes the oil rig's fire prevention systems, the crew of the rig for failing to realize and act upon evidence that oil was leaking from the surface of the ocean, and describes how BP and Transocean "incorrectly accepted" negative pressure test results.
ref: Laporan itu, hasil dari empat-bulan penyiasatan oleh Ketua Keselamatan Operasi BP, Mark Bly, mengkritik sistem pencegahan kebakaran rig minyak, krew rig kerana gagal menyedari dan bertindak apabila ada bukti minyak sedang bocor dari permukaan laut, dan menggambarkan bagaimana BP dan Transocean "tersalah menerima" keputusan ujian tekanan negatif.

src: The document goes on to note that the blow-out preventer failed to operate, likely because critical components were not operational.
ref: Dokumen itu terus mencatatkan bahawa alat pencegah semburan gagal berfungsi, berkemungkinan disebabkan komponen kritikal yang tidak boleh berfungsi.

src: Bob Dudley, who will become chief executive of BP, described the accident as "tragic".
ref: Bob Dudley, yang akan menjadi Ketua Eksekutif BP, menggambarkan kemalangan itu sebagai suatu "tragedi."

src: He said, "we have said from the beginning that the explosion on the Deepwater Horizon was a shared responsibility among many entities."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Kami sudah katakan dari awal bahawa letupan di Deepwater Horizon adalah tanggungjawab bersama banyak entiti."

src: "This report makes that conclusion even clearer, presenting a detailed analysis of the facts and recommendations for improvement both for BP and the other parties involved."
ref: "Laporan ini menjelaskan lagi kesimpulan itu, dengan mengemukakan analisis fakta yang terperinci dan cadangan untuk pembaikan bagi kedua-dua BP dan pihak lain yang terlibat."

src: "We have accepted all the recommendations and are examining how best to implement them across our drilling operations worldwide."
ref: "Kami telah menerima semua cadangan tersebut dan sedang meneliti cara terbaik bagi melaksanakannya di dalam operasi penggerudian kami di seluruh dunia."

src: The report included 25 recommendations, according to a press release, "designed to prevent a recurrence of such an accident."
ref: Laporan tersebut turut mengandungi 25 cadangan, yang menurut siaran akhbar, "direka untuk mencegah kemalangan sebegitu dari berulang semula."

src: The oil company has previously blamed Transocean and Halliburton, the well contractor, for the disaster and BP executives feel they have been unfairly blamed by US politicians for the disaster, and the report continues this view.
ref: Syarikat minyak itu sebelumnya menyalahkan Transocean dan Halliburton, kontraktor telaga, untuk bencana itu dan eksekutif BP merasa mereka telah disalahkan dengan tidak adil oleh ahli politik US ke atas bencana itu, dan laporan itu meneruskan pandangan ini.

src: Tony Hayward, who was fired from the position of BP's chief executive following multiple public relations issues, squarely places the blame for the disaster on Halliburton.
ref: Tony Hayward, yang telah dipecat dari jawatan ketua eksekutif BP berikutan dari beberapa isu perhubungan awam, secara jujurnya meletakkan tanggungjawab ke atas bencana itu kepada Halliburton.

src: "To put it simply, there was a bad cement job," he said in a statement, also claiming that BP should not be the only company to take the blame for the explosion.
ref: "Secara mudahnya, ada kerja simen yang tidak dilakukan dengan baik," dia berkata di dalam satu kenyataan, dia juga mendakwa BP tidak patut menjadi satu-satunya syarikat yang dipersalahkan ke atas letupan itu.

src: "It would appear unlikely that the well design contributed to the incident," he argues.
ref: "Kemungkinan besar reka bentuk telaga itu yang menyumbang kepada kemalangan tersebut," dia berhujah.

src: The report blames the type of cement used by Halliburton, designed to prevent harmful hydrocarbons from reaching the seabed, as well as criticizing the crew of Deepwater Horizon, for failing to realize for forty minutes that oil had started to leak from the well, and once it was realized, the crew "vented" the hydrocarbons "directly onto the rig".
ref: Laporan itu menyalahkan jenis simen yang telah digunakan oleh Halliburton, direka bentuk untuk menghalang hidrokarbon yang berbahaya dari sampai ke dasar laut, dan juga mengkritik krew Deepwater Horizon, kerana gagal menyedari selama empat puluh minit yang minyak sudah mula bocor dari telaga, dan setelah disedari, krew telah "melepaskan" hidrokarbon "tepat ke rig."

src: Describing how the explosion, which killed eleven rig personnel, occurred, the report states that "the heating, ventilation and air conditioning system probably transferred a gas-rich mixture into the engine rooms," where the hydrocarbons ignited and a fireball engulfed the rig.
ref: Menggambarkan bagaimana letupan, yang telah membunuh sebelas kakitangan rig berlaku, laporan menyatakan bahawa "pemanasan, pengudaraan dan sistem penyaman udara mungkin memindahkan campuran tinggi dengan gas ke dalam bilik enjin," di mana hidrokarbon dinyalakan dan bola api menelan rig tersebut.

src: But, the report states, the blowout preventer, the ultimate failsafe on the Deepwater Horizon failed, likely due to the fire on the rig.
ref: Bagaimanapun, laporan menyatakan, pencegah semburan, sistem pasti selamat terakhir di Deepwater Horizon gagal, kemungkinan disebabkan api di rig.

src: An automated system was not operational because the batteries powering it, located in a control pod, had gone flat, and another control pod contained a faulty solenoid valve.
ref: Satu sistem berautomat tidak dapat berfungsi kerana ia menggunakan kuasa bateri, diletakkan di pod kawalan, sudah mati, dan pod kawalan yang lain pula mempunyai injap solenoid yang rosak.

src: The report was likely, however, written with the company's legal liability for the disaster in a prominent position, since they are facing hundreds of lawsuits and criminal charges as a result of the spill.
ref: Laporan itu, bagaimanapun, kemungkinan ditulis dengan liabiliti undang-undang syarikat untuk bencana itu di kedudukan utama, memandangkan mereka sedang menghadapi ratusan tuntutan mahkamah dan tuduhan jenayah akibat daripada tumpahan itu.

src: The executive summary is four and a half pages long and the first page is made up entirely of legal disclaimers saying if BP was found to be negligent in their operations of the rig, they could be fined a good deal more.
ref: Ringkasan eksekutif itu sebanyak empat dan separuh muka surat panjang dan di muka surat pertama tertulis penafian undang-undang semata-mata yang mengatakan jika BP ditemui cuai di dalam operasi rig mereka, mereka boleh disaman dengan lebih banyak lagi.

src: Questions have also been raised as to why BP has chosen to release their report before authorities examine the blowout preventer.
ref: Persoalan juga timbul tentang mengapa BP telah memilih untuk mengeluarkan laporan mereka sebelum pihak berkuasa memeriksa pencegah semburan.

src: The energy editor of The Guardian, Terry Macalister, wrote that the "catalogue of errors - both human and mechanical" in the report "demolish" the oil industry's "much quoted mantra" of safety first.
ref: Editor tenaga The Guardian, Terry Macalister, menulis bahawa "katalog ralat-ralat - dari manusia dan mekanikal" di dalam laporan tersebut "memusnahkan" "mantera yang sering dipetik" oleh industri minyak tentang keselamatan diutamakan.

src: "It may come first in the board room but it does not down at the wellhead where the real dangers are faced," he wrote.
ref: "Ia mungkin menjadi keutamaan di dalam bilik lembaga tetapi tidak di kepala telaga di mana bahaya sebenar sedang dihadapi," dia menulis.

src: "It is worth remembering that BP, its rig operator Transocean and the main well contractor Halliburton are the blue chip companies in the wider oil and gas sector."
ref: "Adalah berbaloi untuk diingati bahawa BP, operator rignya Transocean dan kontraktor telaga utama Halliburton adalah syarikat cip biru di dalam sektor minyak dan gas yang lebih luas."

src: "If the shoddy work practices highlighted here are what the best-in-class do, then what is happening in the lower reaches of this industry?"
ref: "Jika amalan kerja tidak bermutu yang ditekankan di sini adalah apa yang sedang dilakukan syarikat kelas terbaik, jadi apakah yang sedang berlaku di dalam kelas bawah industri ini?"

src: Transocean described the report as a "self-serving" attempt to "conceal the critical factor that set the stage for the Macondo incident: BP's fatally flawed well design."
ref: Transocean menggambarkan laporan tersebut sebagai cubaan "swadiri" untuk "menyembunyikan faktor kritikal yang menyediakan pentas kepada kejadian Macondo: BP telah memusnahkan reka bentuk telaga sehingga membawa maut."

src: "In both its design and construction, BP made a series of cost-saving decisions that increased risk - in some cases, severely."
ref: "Dalam kedua-dua reka bentuk dan binaannya, BP telah membuat beberapa siri keputusan untuk menjimatkan kos yang menambah risiko - dalam sesetengah kes, dengan teruk."

src: In a statement, the company listed five issues they felt had contributed to the disaster that were no fault but BP's.
ref: Di dalam satu kenyataan, syarikat tersebut menyenaraikan lima isu yang mereka fikir menyumbang kepada bencana itu yang kesalahannya terletak hanya pada BP.

src: "Transocean's investigation is ongoing, and will be concluded when all of the evidence is in, including the critical information the company has requested of BP but has yet to receive."
ref: "Penyiasatan Transocean sedang dilaksanakan, dan akan disimpulkan apabila semua bukti telah ada, termasuklah maklumat kritikal yang syarikat tersebut telah meminta daripada BP tetapi masih belum menerimanya."

src: Members of Congress, who are also carrying out a review into the disaster, also dismissed the report.
ref: Ahli-ahli Kongres, yang turut mengeluarkan ulasan tentang bencana ini, juga menolak laporan tersebut.

src: Ed Markey, the Massachusetts democrat who has been investigating the spill in Congress, said that he felt the report was simply a lengthy defense of the oil company's handling of the spill.
ref: Ed Markey, demokrat Massachusetts yang sedang menyiasat tumpahan ini di Kongres, berkata yang beliau merasakan laporan ini hanyalah satu pertahanan yang panjang dari syarikat yang menguruskan tumpahan itu.

src: "BP is happy to slice up blame, as long as they get the smallest piece," he said.
ref: "BP dengan gembira mahu membahagikan kesalahan, asalkan mereka mendapat bahagian yang terkecil," katanya.

src: Bly acknowledged during a press conference in Washington that the report did not detail the charges raised against the company in Congress and that BP permitted a culture of recklessness to flourish.
ref: Bly mengakui semasa persidangan akhbar di Washington bahawa laporan itu tidak memperincikan tuduhan-tuduhan yang dihadapi syarikat itu di Kongres dan BP membenarkan budaya kecuaian berkembang.

src: He did, however, reject suggestions that cost-cutting had put lives at risk and the rig was a disaster waiting to happen.
ref: Beliau, bagaimanapun, menolak dakwaan bahawa pemotongan kos telah meletakkan banyak nyawa di dalam bahaya dan rig tersebut adalah bencana yang menunggu untuk berlaku.

src: "What we see instead is, where there were errors made they were based on poor decision-making process or using wrong information," he said.
ref: "Apa yang kami nampak adalah, ada ralat yang dibuat dan itu adalah disebabkan proses membuat keputusan yang lemah atau menggunakan maklumat yang salah," kata beliau.

src: The Guardian reported that "the report is narrowly focused on the final days before the explosion rather than on earlier decisions about well design and safety procedures."
ref: The Guardian melaporkan bahawa "laporan itu terlalu memfokuskan kepada hari-hari terakhir sebelum letupan berbanding keputusan-keputusan awal berkaitan reka bentuk telaga dan prosedur keselamatan."

src: "No BP officials have been sacked for their role in the explosion, and Bly said there was no indication of any blame beyond the well-site managers."
ref: "Tiada seorang pun pengawai BP yang dipecat kerana peranan mereka di dalam letupan itu, dan Bly berkata tidak ada tanda-tanda untuk menyalahkan sesiapa yang atas dari pengurus tapak-telaga."

src: The Associated Press reported that Bly "said at a briefing in Washington that the internal report was a reconstruction of what happened on the rig based on the company's data and interviews with mostly BP employees and was not meant to focus on assigning blame."
ref: The Associated Press melaporkan bahawa Bly "berkata di dalam satu taklimat di Washington yang laporan dalaman adalah penyusunan semula apa yang terjadi di rig berpandukan data syarikat dan temubual yang kebanyakannya dengan pekerja BP dan bukan memfokuskan untuk mengagihkan kesalahan."

src: "The six-person investigating panel only had access to a few workers from other companies, and samples of the actual cement used in the well were not released."
ref: "Enam-orang panel penyiasatan hanya mempunyai akses ke beberapa pekerja dari syarikat lain, dan sampel simen sebenar yang digunakan di telaga tidak dikeluarkan."

src: The report continued, "Steve Yerrid, special counsel on the oil spill for Florida Gov.
ref: Laporan itu menyambung, "Steve Yarrid, peguam khas untuk tumpahan minyak kepada Florida Gov.

src: Charlie Crist, said the report clearly shows the company is attempting to spread blame for the well disaster, foreshadowing what will be a likely legal effort to force Halliburton and Transocean, and perhaps others, to share costs such as paying claims and government penalties."
ref: Charlie Crist, berkata laporan itu dengan jelasnya menunjukkan yang syarikat itu sedang cuba untuk membahagikan kesalahan bencana telaga, membayangi apa yang mungkin sekali usaha undang-undang bagi memaksa Halliburton dan Transocean, dan mungkin yang lain, untuk berkongsi kos-kos seperti membayar tuntutan dan penalti dari kerajaan."

src: Head of Greenpeace's energy campaign Jim Footner said that it was "highly likely that a truly independent report would be even more damning for BP."
ref: Ketua kempen tenaga Greenpeace Jim Footner berkata bahawa "besar kemungkinan satu laporan yang betul-betul peribadi akan lebih menjahanamkan BP."

src: However, he said, "the real problem is our addiction to oil, which is pushing companies like BP to put lives and the environment at risk."
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, kata beliau, "masalah yang sebenar ialah ketagihan kita terhadap minyak, yang memaksa syarikat-syarikat seperti BP meletakkan nyawa dan alam sekitar di dalam risiko."

src: "The age of oil is coming to an end and companies like BP will be left behind unless they begin to adapt now."
ref: "Zaman minyak semakin hampir sampai ke penghujung dan syarikat-syarikat seperti BP akan ketinggalan melainkan mereka mula menyesuaikan diri dari sekarang."

src: "The time has come to move beyond oil and invest in clean energy."
ref: "Masanya telah tiba untuk beralih ke tenaga selain minyak dan melabur dalam tenaga bersih."

src: Alfred R Sunsen, whose oyster company operating in the Gulf of Mexico is facing the prospect of going out of business after 134 years, reacted angrily the the report.
ref: Alfred R Sunsen, yang mengusahakan syarikat tiram di Teluk Mexico dan sedang menghadapi kemungkinan bankrap selepas 134 tahun, marah dengan laporan itu.

src: "The report does not address the people, businesses, animals, or natural resources that have been impacted by the disaster and will be dealing with the consequences of their inadequate and slow response to the disaster," he said.
ref: "Laporan itu tidak menumpukan perhatian kepada orang ramai, perniagaan-perniagaan, binatang-binatang, atau sumber asli yang telah terimpak dari bencana itu dan mereka yang akan menghadapi akibat dari respon mereka yang lambat dan tidak mencukupi dalam menghadapi bencana itu," katanya.

src: The New York Times said that the report is "unlikely to carry much weight in influencing the Department of Justice, which is considering criminal and civil charges related to the spill," and described it as "a public relations exercise" and a "probable legal strategy as it prepares to defend itself against possible federal charges, penalties and hundreds of pending lawsuits."
ref: The New York Times berkata laporan itu "tidak mungkin akan memberi kesan dalam mempengaruhi Jabatan Keadilan, yang sedang mempertimbangkan tuduhan jenayah dan awam kepada yang berkenaan dengan tumpahan itu," dan menggambarkan ia sebagai "satu bidang kuasa perhubungan awam" dan "mungkin satu strategi undang-undang kerana mereka sedang bersedia untuk mempertahankan diri dari tuduhan persekutuan yang mungkin ada, penalti-penalti dan ratusan tuntutan mahkamah yang masih belum selesai."

src: Wayne Pennington, head of the geological engineering department at Michigan Technical University, also alleged that BP was wrong to blame other parties involved with the disaster.
ref: Wayne Pennington, ketua jabatan kejuruteraan geologi di Universiti Teknikal Michigan, turut mendakwa BP adalah bersalah kerana menyalahkan pihak lain yang terlibat dengan bencana itu.

src: "The blowout and subsequent explosion and spillage appear to the result of an overall attitude that encouraged unwarranted optimism in the quality of each component of the job, allowing the omission of standard testing procedures, and the misinterpretation of other tests in the most-favorable light."
ref: "Semburan dan letupan susulan dan tumpahan itu adalah akibat dari sikap keseluruhan yang menggalakkan sikap optimis yang tidak wajar di dalam kualiti setiap komponen kerja, seterusnya membenarkan pengabaian prosedur pengujian standard, dan salah tafsir ke atas ujian lain di dalam keadaan yang difikirkan terbaik."

src: He continued: "Instead, skepticism should reign on any drilling job, and testing and evaluation at each stage of the drilling and completion would then be routine; instead of questioning the need for such things as the cement bond log, the companies involved should insist on checking and double-checking quality at each step of the process."
ref: Beliau menambah: "Tetapi seharusnya, sikap meragui perlu meliputi sebarang kerja penggerudian, dari itu ujian dan penilaian di setiap tahap penggerudian dan penyempurnaan akan menjadi satu rutin; daripada menyoal keperluan untuk setiap perkara seperti log susunan simen, syarikat-syarikat yang terlibat perlu menegaskan semakan dan semakan kali kedua bagi kualiti di setiap langkah proses."

src: "This was clearly not done, repeatedly, in the case of the Macondo well, and disaster resulted."
ref: "Ini amat jelas tidak dilaksanakan, berulang kali, di dalam kes telaga Macando, dan kesannya adalah satu bencana."

src: 4.9 million barrels of crude oil leaked into the Gulf of Mexico, causing damage to marine and wildlife habitats as well as the Gulf's fishing and tourism industries.
ref: 4.9 juta tong minyak mentah bocor ke dalam Teluk Mexico, menyebabkan kerosakan marin dan habitat hidupan liar dan juga kepada industri perikanan dan pelancongan Teluk.

src: Extensive measures were used to prevent the oil from reaching the coastline of Louisiana, including skimmer ships, floating containment booms, anchored barriers, and sand-filled barricades.
ref: Langkah secara besar-besaran telah diambil bagi menghalang minyak dari sampai ke garis pantai Louisiana, termasuk kapal penyiring, bum pembendungan terapung, pengadang bersauh, dan sekatan berisi pasir.

src: Scientists have also reported immense underwater plumes of dissolved oil not visible at the surface.
ref: Ahli saintis turut melaporkan kepulan larutan minyak yang amat besar di dalam air yang tidak dapat dilihat di permukaan.

src: The U.S. Government has named BP as the responsible party, and officials have committed to holding the company accountable for all cleanup costs and other damage.
ref: Kerajaan U.S. telah menamakan BP sebagai pihak yang bertanggungjawab, dan pihak berkuasa komited untuk mengikat syarikat itu supaya menanggung semua kos pembersihan dan kerosakan lain.

src: Dudley went on to say that BP "deeply regret" the disaster.
ref: Dudley berkata BP "amat kesal" terhadap bencana itu.

src: "We have sought throughout to step up to our responsibilities."
ref: "Kami telah diminta semua pihak untuk bangun menerima tanggungjawab kami."

src: "We are determined to learn the lessons for the future and we will be undertaking a broad-scale review to further improve the safety of our operations."
ref: "Kami berazam mahu belajar dari kesilapan demi masa hadapan dan akan mengambil ulasan berskala luas bagi meningkatkan lagi keselamatan di dalam operasi kami."

src: "It will be incumbent on everyone at BP to embrace and implement the changes necessary to ensure that a tragedy like this can never happen again."
ref: "Semua orang di BP wajib untuk menerima dan melaksanakan sebarang perubahan yang perlu bagi memastikan tragedi seperti ini tidak berulang semula."

src: A Polish soldier was killed yesterday by a roadside bomb in eastern Afghanistan.
ref: Seorang askar Poland terbunuh semalam oleh bom tepi jalan di timur Afghanistan.

src: Kazimierz Kasprzak was killed in the province of Ghazni when a roadside bomb exploded underneath the patrol vehicle in which he was travelling.
ref: Kazimierz Kasprzak telah terbunuh di wilayah Ghazni apabila sebutir bom tepi jalan meletup di bawah kenderaan peronda yang dinaikinya.

src: His death was announced by the Polish Defence Ministry and Lt. Sebastian Kostecki, a spokesman for the Polish military.
ref: Kematiannya telah diumumkan oleh Kementerian Pertahanan Poland dan Lt. Sebastian Kostecki, jurucakap tentera Poland.

src: Kasprzak was airlifted to a military base after the explosion but died during surgery.
ref: Kasprzak diterbangkan ke sebuah pangkalan tentera selepas letupan tersebut tetapi meninggal dunia semasa pembedahan.

src: With his death the toll of Polish forces killed in Afghanistan has risen to 21.
ref: Dengan kematiannya bilangan tentera yang terbunuh di Afghanistan telah meningkat kepada 21.

src: Polish forces joined NATO in their fight with the Taliban in March 2002.
ref: Tentera Poland menyertai NATO dalam perjuangan mereka dengan Taliban pada Mac 2002.

src: President of Poland Bronislaw Komorowski has said he has planned to pull Polish troops out of Afghanistan by 2012.
ref: Presiden Poland Bronislaw Komorowski berkata beliau telah merancang untuk menarik tentera Poland keluar dari Afghanistan pada tahun 2012.

src: Many Polish citizens favor pulling troops out of the war zone.
ref: Ramai rakyat Poland memihak supaya menarik tentera keluar dari zon perang.

src: Saddam Hussein pleaded "not guilty" at the opening of the al-Dujail trial on Wednesday.
ref: Saddam Hussein mengaku "tidak bersalah" di pembukaan perbicaraan al-Dujail pada hari Rabu.

src: The court recessed for 6 weeks during which time his defense will be prepared.
ref: Perbicaraan berehat selama 6 minggu sepanjang masa pembelaan beliau disediakan.

src: During the proceeding, Hussein argued that the judge was not appointed by him, and thus was not legitimate.
ref: Dalam prosiding itu, Hussein mempertikaikan bahawa hakim tidak berpihak kepadanya, maka tidak sah di sisi undang-undang.

src: A tribunal of five Iraqi judges headed by Rizgar Mohammed Amin, with the death penalty vested in them, will decide his sentence.
ref: Mahkamah undang-undang yang terdiri daripada lima orang hakim Iraq yang diketuai oleh Rizgar Mohammed Amin, dengan hukuman mati terletak pada mereka, akan menentukan hukuman beliau.

src: Wednesday night, the Houston Astros, a professional baseball team in North America, won the 2005 National League Pennant by defeating the St. Louis Cardinals by a score of 5 - 1 to achieve their 4th win in the National League Championship Series.
ref: Pada malam Rabu, Houston Astros, satu pasukan besbol profesional di Amerika Utara, memenangi Panji Liga Kebangsaan 2005 dengan mengalahkan St Louis Cardinals dengan mata 5-1 untuk mencapai kemenangan ke-4 mereka dalam Siri Kejohanan Liga Kebangsaan.

src: In this series, the Astros won 4 games and the Cardinals won 2 games.
ref: Dalam siri ini, Astros memenangi 4 perlawanan dan Kardinal menang 2 permainan.

src: Now that the Houston Astros are finally in the World Series, they couldn't be set up any better.
ref: Sekarang disebabkan Astros Houston akhirnya berada dalam Siri Dunia, mereka tidak boleh ditempatkan di kedudukan yang lebih baik lagi.

src: Their stellar rotation of Roger Clemens, Andy Pettitte and Roy Oswalt is lined up to start the first three games against the White Sox on full rest.
ref: Putaran cemerlang Roger Clemens, Andy Pettitte dan Roy Oswalt dijadualkan untuk memulakan tiga perlawanan pertama melawan White Sox pada rehat penuh.

src: And hard-throwing closer Brad Lidge will be refreshed physically and mentally after an exhausting stretch.
ref: Dan pembaling penyelamat yang membaling dengan kuat Brad Lidge akan disegarkan secara fizikal dan mental selepas usaha yang meletihkan.

src: "We've put ourselves in a great situation, and have a wonderful chance," said Clemens, who will start Game 1 on Saturday night in Chicago against former Yankees teammate Jose Contreras.
ref: "Kami telah meletakkan diri kami dalam keadaan hebat, dan mempunyai peluang yang baik," kata Clemens, yang akan memulakan Permainan 1 pada malam Sabtu di Chicago melawan bekas rakan sepasukan Yankees Jose Contreras.

src: Thanks to Scot McKenzie, who has won 20 games each of the past two seasons, the Astros didn't need Game 7 in the NL championship series against the St. Louis Cardinals.
ref: Terima kasih kepada Scot McKenzie, yang telah memenangi 20 perlawanan dalam setiap dua musim lalu, Astros tidak perlu Permainan 7 dalam siri kejohanan NL melawan St Louis Cardinals.

src: For the second time in the NLCS, Scot allowed just one run over seven innings at Busch Stadium, leading Houston to a series-ending 5-1 victory Wednesday night.
ref: Buat kali kedua dalam NLCS, Scot membenarkan hanya satu larian dalam tujuh pusingan di Stadium Busch, yang membawa Houston ke satu siri berkesudahan kemenangan 5-1 malam tadi.

src: So instead of having to play again Thursday night, the Astros got to go home for a day off before traveling to Chicago -- though they were only an hour-long flight from the Windy City when they beat the Cardinals.
ref: Jadi, daripada terpaksa bermain lagi malam Khamis, Astros dapat pulang ke rumah untuk cuti sehari sebelum ke Chicago - walaupun mereka hanya berjarakkan penerbangan sepanjang satu jam dari Bandar Windy apabila menewaskan Kardinal.

src: It still was extra rest for the pitchers, and everybody else.
ref: Ia masih merupakan rehat tambahan untuk pembaling, dan orang lain.

src: The city of Houston waited 44 seasons for its first World Series.
ref: Bandar Houston menunggu 44 musim bagi Siri Dunia pertama.

src: It comes just two years after Pettitte and Clemens joined their hometown team.
ref: Ia hanya dua tahun selepas Pettitte dan Clemens menyertai pasukan kampung halaman mereka.

src: "What's amazing is it happened so fast," said Pettitte, the left-hander who has pitched in six World Series -- four of them won by the Yankees.
ref: "Apa yang menakjubkan ialah ia berlaku begitu pantas," kata Pettitte, pemain kidal yang membaling dalam enam Siri Dunia - empat daripadanya dimenangi oleh Yankees.

src: "Realistically, I just came home and wanted to help the team win a playoff series."
ref: "Secara realistiknya, saya hanya pulang ke rumah dan mahu membantu pasukan itu memenangi siri perlawanan penentuan."

src: Clemens (3-0, 1.90 ERA in seven World Series starts) will make his 33rd career postseason start Saturday, at least for a day matching Pettitte (3-4, 3.90 in 10 World Series starts) for the most ever.
ref: Clemens (3-0, 1.90 ERA dalam tujuh Siri Dunia bermula) akan menjadi kerjayanya yang ke-33 selepas musim itu mulai hari Sabtu, sekurang-kurangnya selama sehari dalam melawan Pettitte (3-4, 3.90 dalam 10 Siri Dunia bermula) paling banyak dalam sejarah.

src: But Clemens also finished a game this month, going the final three innings in the Astros' 18-inning victory that ended the NL division series against Atlanta.
ref: Tetapi Clemens juga menghabiskan satu pertandingan bulan ini, mencapai tiga pusingan terakhir dalam kemenangan 18 pusingan Astros 'yang menamatkan siri bahagian NL terhadap Atlanta.

src: Oswalt is 4-0 in seven career playoff games (six starts), and will start the first World Series game ever in Houston, Game 3 on Tuesday night.
ref: Oswalt adalah 4-0 dalam tujuh perlawanan profesional playoff (enam bermula), dan akan memulakan perlawanan pertama Siri Dunia dalam sejarah di Houston, Permainan 3 pada malam Selasa.

src: Brandon Backe, without a decision in his three starts this postseason, is scheduled for Game 4, then Clemens, Pettitte and Oswalt would go again, if necessary.
ref: Brandon Backe, tanpa sebarang keputusan di tiga start permainannya selepas musim ini, dijadualkan Permainan 4, maka Clemens, Pettitte dan Oswalt akan bermain sekali lagi, jika perlu.

src: But the right-hander wasn't needed two nights after giving up Albert Pujols' three-run homer with two outs in the ninth inning that gave the Cardinals a 5-4 victory and extended the NLCS.
ref: Tetapi pemain yang menggunakan tangan kanan itu tidak diperlukan selepas dua malam selepas melepaskan peluang 'tiga-run homer dengan dua out Albert Pujols dalam inning kesembilan yang memberikan Kardinal kemenangan 5-4 dan memperluaskan NLCS.

src: "If it had been a one-run game, a two-run game, Brad would have been in," manager Phil Garner said.
ref: "Jika ia adalah suatu permainan satu run, permainan dua run, Brad akan bermain dalamnya," kata pengurus Phil Garner.

src: "If the game is on the line again in any circumstances, he's our guy."
ref: "Jika permainan ini dijadualkan semula dalam apa jua keadaan, dia adalah pemain yang kami inginkan."

src: Before Pujols' mammoth homer, Lidge had saved three straight NLCS games and dominated the Cardinals over a two-year stretch.
ref: Sebelum homer raksasa Pujols, Lidge telah menyelamatkan tiga perlawanan NLCS secara langsung dan menguasai Kardinal selama dua tahun.

src: But he was also pitching in his seventh game in 12 days, including consecutive two-inning appearances.
ref: Tetapi dia juga membaling dalam permainan ketujuhnya dalam tempoh 12 hari, termasuk penampilan dua inning berturut-turut.

src: Now, Lidge is ready to pitch again after the needed rest.
ref: Sekarang, Lidge bersedia untuk membaling sekali lagi selepas rehat yang diperlukan.

src: "I'm going to be so pumped up to get out there in the World Series."
ref: "Saya akan sangat teruja untuk bermain di sana dalam Siri Dunia."

src: Clemens will be in his sixth World Series, having announced his retirement after pitching for the Yankees in the 2003 Fall Classic.
ref: Clemens akan bermain dalam Siri Dunia keenamnya, setelah mengumumkan persaraannya selepas membaling untuk Yankees dalam Clasik Musim Luruh 2003.

src: Urged by his buddy Pettitte to keep pitching, Clemens signed a one-year deal with the Astros.
ref: Didesak oleh rakannya Pettitte untuk terus membaling, Clemens menandatangani kontrak sepanjang setahun dengan Astros.

src: The Rocket signed for another season after he won his seventh Cy Young Award and the Astros got close to the World Series in 2004, when Clemens blew a two-run lead and lost Game 7 of the NLCS against the Cardinals.
ref: Roket menandatangani kontrak untuk satu lagi musim selepas dia memenangi Anugerah Cy Young ketujuhnya dan Astros makin berdekatan dengan Siri Dunia pada tahun 2004, apabila Clemens merosakkan pendahuluan dua run dan tewas dalam Permainan 7 NLCS melawan Kardinal.

src: "I'm glad I made the decision," said Clemens, who led the major leagues with a career-low 1.87 ERA during the regular season.
ref: "Saya gembira saya membuat keputusan itu," kata Clemens, yang mengetuai liga utama itu dengan 1.87 ERA catatan kerjaya yang rendah semasa musim biasa.

src: "Now, we're going to take a deep breath and see if we can keep this thing going."
ref: "Sekarang, kita akan mengambil nafas dalam dan lihat jika kita boleh memastikan perkara ini berterusan."

src: "It's for the entire team, but there are special cases in this."
ref: "Ia untuk seluruh pasukan, tetapi terdapat kes-kes khas dalam hal ini."

src: Such as Craig Biggio and Jeff Bagwell, who have been teammates longer than anybody else in baseball, at 15 seasons.
ref: Seperti Craig Biggio dan Jeff Bagwell, yang telah menjadi rakan sepasukan lebih lama daripada orang lain dalam besbol, dalam 15 musim.

src: "I certainly didn't feel at the beginning of the year that this was going to be the year," Bagwell said.
ref: "Sudah tentu pada awal tahun ini saya tidak berasa akan berlaku apa-apa dalam tahun ini," kata Bagwell.

src: "But it's amazing what a whole bunch of pitching, and a whole bunch of guys who believe in each other, can do."
ref: "Tetapi ia mengagumkan keseluruhan pembalingan, dan semua pemain yang mempercayai satu sama lain, boleh lakukan perkara itu."

src: Bagwell has been limited to pinch-hitting duties since missing 115 games because of shoulder surgery.
ref: Bagwell hanya dibenarkan memukul balingan sejak tewas dalam 115 permainan kerana pembedahan bahu.

src: He'll likely start as the designated hitter in the games at Chicago.
ref: Dia mungkin akan bermula dengan diberikan tugas pemukul dalam perlawanan di Chicago.

src: The final series of the baseball season will be the ultimate North American baseball championship, the World Series, a best of 7-games match-up between the American League pennant winner, the Chicago White Sox, and the National League pennant winner, the Houston Astros.
ref: Siri terakhir musim besbol akan menjadi kejohanan besbol Amerika Utara terakhir, Siri Dunia, yang terbaik daripada 7 pertandingan antara pemenang panji Liga Amerika, Chicago White Sox, dan pemenang panji Liga Negara, Houston Astros.

src: Game 1 of the World Series will start Saturday evening.
ref: Permainan 1 dalam Siri Dunia akan bermula pada petang Sabtu.

src: Moldovan President Vladimir Voronin accused the Transnistrian authorities on Saturday of having supplied Russian weapons to Iraq during the regime of Saddam Hussein, Russian news agencies have said.
ref: Presiden Moldova Vladmir Voronin menuduh pihak berkuasa Transnistria pada hari Sabtu membekalkan senjata Russia ke Iraq semasa rejim Saddam Hussein, agensi berita Russia telah berkata.

src: Chisinau "holds official documents from the chancellery of Saddam Hussein, which show that Transnistria had supplied both arms, and entire weapon manufacturing lines to Iraq," Voronin told a group of Russian journalists, adding that an investigation on this case is under way.
ref: Chisinau "memegang dokumen rasmi daripada Canselori Saddam Hussein, yang menunjukkan bahawa Transnistria telah membekalkan kedua-dua senjata, dan semua senjata ke Iraq," Voronin memberitahu sekumpulan wartawan Russia, menambah lagi bahawa siasatan ke atas kes in akan dijalankan.

src: "Russia's control over this territory is obvious and we must call to account those who do not desire to solve this conflict", Voronin added.
ref: "Kawalan Russia ke atas wilayah ini adalah jelas dan kita harus mempertanggungjawabkan yang tidak berhasrat untuk menyelesaikan konflik ini," tambah Voronin.

src: Being asked what Russia must do to help solve the conflict, the Moldovan President said that it must take the munitions from that territory.
ref: Ditanya apa Russia harus lakukan untuk menyelesaikan konflik, Presiden Moldova berkata ia harus mengambil senjata daripada wilayah itu.

src: "We consider this depot a political shield that supports the Transnistrian regime," the President emphasized.
ref: "Kami menganggap pangkalan ini ialah perisai politik yang menyokong rejim Transnistria," Presiden menekankan.

src: Voronin added Moldova can prove Tiraspol sold weapons to Iraq.
ref: Voronin metambah Moldova boleh membuktikan Tiraspol menjual senjata kepada Iraq.

src: "The document from Hussein's archive that can confirm this is being studied by the Moldovan authorities now," he said.
ref: "Dokumen daripada arkib Hussein yang boleh mengesahkan ini sedang dikaji oleh pihak berkuasa Moldova sekarang," katanya.

src: Voronin accused Moscow to settle this regional conflict, noting that Russian weapons are "a political coverage to protect the Transnistrian regime."
ref: Voronin menuduh Moscow untuk menyelesaikan konflik serantau ini, mengatakan bahawa senjata Russia adalah "perlindungan politik untuk melindungi rejim Transnistria".

src: The Moldovan leader noted that he has sent a package of documents to Russia regarding the activity of 13 Transnistrian military companies.
ref: Pemimpin Moldova berkata dia telah menghantar pakej dokumen - dokumen ke Russia berkenaan aktiviti 13 syarikat tentera Transnistria.

src: On the other hand, Moldovan Premier Vasile Tarlev accused Thursday the Russian troops in Transnistria of supplying weapons to the Chechen region, In reply, Russian Defence Minister Sergei Ivanov said that he "pledges his head" for Russian bases in Moldova, and assured that "no weapons from Transnistria had been sent."
ref: Di sebaliknya, Presiden Moldova Vasile Tarlev pada hari Khamis menuduh, tentera Russia di Transnistria membekalkan senjata ke wilayah Chechen, didalam balasan jawapannya, Menteri Pertahanan Russia Sergei Ivanov berkata bahawa dia "berikrar dengan kepalanya" untuk pangkalan Russia di Moldova, dan memberi jaminan bahawa "tiada senjata dari Transnistria telah dihantar".

src: Ed Miliband — the current leader of the Labour Party and Leader of the Opposition in the United Kingdom — and Justine Thornton, his long-term partner, have announced that they are now engaged to each other.
ref: Ed Miliband - ketua Parti Buruh masa kini dan Ketua pembangkang di United Kingdom - dan Justine Thornron, pasangan janka-panjangnya, telah mengumumkan yang mereka kini telah bertunang kepada satu sama lain.

src: They are anticipated to marry in Nottingham, England on May 27.
ref: Mereka dijangka akan berkahwin di Nottingham, England pada 27 Mei.

src: The couple, who have been in a relationship for five years, currently have two children — Daniel, aged twenty-one months, and Samuel, who was born in November 2010.
ref: Pasangan, yang telah didalam hubungan untuk lima tahun, pada masa ini mempunyai dua anak - Daniel, berusia dua puluh satu bulan, dan Samuel, yang lahir pada November 2010.

src: Until now, they had been "too busy" to perform the act of marriage, due to various occurrences; according to The Daily Telegraph, this includes Ed's work in the 2010 UK general election, the birth of their son Daniel, and Ed's appearance at the 2009 United Nations Climate Change Conference.
ref: Sehingga kini, mereka telah "terlalu sibuk" untuk melaksanakan perkahwinan, akibat banyak kejadian; menurut The Daily Telegraph, ini termasuk kerja Ed dalam pilihanraya umum UK 2010, kelahiran anak lelaki mereka Daniel, dan penampilan Ed pada Persidangan Perubahan Iklim Persatuan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu 2009.

src: 41-year-old Miliband proposed to 40-year-old Thornton at Primrose Hill, a short distance from their residence in the northern area of London, in 2010.
ref: Miliband 41 tahun melamar Thorton 40 tahun di Primrose Hill, berjarak dekat dari kediaman mereka di kawasan utara London, pada 2010.

src: Marion Miliband, the mother of Ed, was the first individual to be notified of this news.
ref: Marion Miliband, ibu kepada Ed, adalah individu pertama yang diberitahu mengenai berita tersebut.

src: David Miliband, his brother and a fellow UK politician, was "the person I told after my mother", Ed stated; he "is delighted for me and he will obviously be there".
ref: David Miliband, abangnya dan juga sahabat ahli politik UK, ialah "orang yang saya berithau selepas ibu saya," Ed menyatakan; dia "gembira untuk saya dan sudah jelas dia akan ada untuk saya."

src: According to Miliband, of all the guests at the wedding, "family and close friends" will be amongst the approximately fifty individuals receiving invitations to "something that has been on our minds for some time", describing the upcoming day as "fun".
ref: Menurut Miliband, dari semua jemputan di perkahwinan mereka, "keluarga dan teman rapat" adalah antara lebih kurang lima puluh individu yang menerima jemputan kepada "sesuatu yang telah dalam fikiran kami untuk seketika," menggambarkan hari mendatang sebagai "menyeronokkan."

src: He has stated there will be no best man present at the ceremony, contrary to speculation that the role would be given to David.
ref: Dia menyatakan yang tiada pengapit lelaki pada majlis tersebut, bertentangan dengan spekulasi yang peranan tersebut akan diberi kepada David.

src: After the wedding, Ed and Justine are intending to have a honeymoon in a secret location.
ref: Selepas perkahwinan, Ed dan Justin akan menghadiri bulan madu di lokasi rahsia.

src: Miliband was asked if he thought it was important to be married in case he becomes the next prime minister.
ref: Miliband ditanya samada dia berfikir yang ianya penting untuk berkahwin sekiranyan dia menjadi perdana menteri seterusnya.

src: He replied: "I think people are pretty relaxed about this."
ref: Dia membalas: "Saya berfikir yang orang ramai agak tenang tentang ini."

src: "I don't think people care one way or the other about what other people do in their lives as long as they show responsibility to each other."
ref: "Saya tidak fikir yang orang ramai peduli yang mana satu atau tentang apa yang orang lain lakukan dalam hidup mereka asalkan mereka menunjukkan tanggungjawab terhadap sesama sendiri."

src: U.S. security officials have cleared a Delta Airlines passenger jet diverted to New Mexico to take off again because "no suspicious items" had been found.
ref: Pegawai keselamatan A.S. telah memeriksa penumpang pesawat Delta Airlines yang dilencongkan ke New Mexico untuk terbang semula kerana "tiada barangan mencurigakan" telah ditemui.

src: The aircraft was reportedly initially diverted after the crew found a note with the word "bomb" written on it in the lavatory, but security officials have declined to comment on the nature of the "potential security threat".
ref: Pesawat tersebut pada mulanya dilaporkan dilencongkan arahnya kerana salah seorang krew pesawat menjumpai nota dengan perkataan "bom" tertulis diatasnya di dalam tandas, tetapi pegawai keselamatan telah menolak untuk memberi sebarang komen mengenai "kemungkinan ancaman kesalamatan."

src: Delta Airlines 1706—a domestic U.S. flight between Detroit and San Diego—diverted to Albuquerque International Sunport in Albuquerque, where the Boeing 737-800 aircraft was taken to a remote area of the airport.
ref: Delta Airlines 1706-penerbangan domestik A.S. antara Detroit dan San Diego-dilencongkan ke Albuquerque Sunport Antarabangsa di Albuquerque, di mana pesawat Boeing 737-800 telah dibawa ke kawasan terpencil di lapangan terbang.

src: Passengers were interviewed by FBI agents, and dogs searched all the luggage on board.
ref: Penumpang telah disoal oleh ejen-ejen FBI, dan anjing memeriksa semua bagasi di atas kapal.

src: No one has yet been arrested, but the note has been determined to be hoax.
ref: Masih belum ada sebarang penangkapan, tetapi nota itu telah disahkan sebagai satu penipuan.

src: One passenger said the captain spoke over the intercom, saying: "We're getting ready to divert."
ref: Seorang penumpang berkata kapten memberitahu melalui interkom, berkata: "Kami sedang bersedia untuk mengubah arah."

src: "It's probably a hoax, but we've got to take this very seriously."
ref: "Ianya mungkin satu ancaman palsu, tetapi kami perlu mengambil serius hal ini."

src: After being cleared of any threat, the aircraft was expected to continue to San Diego.
ref: Selepas disahkan selamat dari sebarang ancaman, pesawat tersebut dijangka akan meneruskan perjalanannya ke San Diego.

src: On Friday evening, an explosion in Chengdu, China caused partial shutdown of a facility operated by Foxconn, one of the world's biggest electronics manufacturers and a major supplier to companies like Hewlett-Packard, Dell, Sony, Apple, Motorola and Nokia.
ref: Pada petang Jumaat, satu letupan di Chengdu, China telah menyebabkan pemberhentian sebahagian operasi kemudahan yang dikendalikan oleh Foxconn, salah satu pengeluar elektronik terbesar di dunia dan pembekal utama untuk syarikat-syarikat seperti Hewlett-Packard, Dell, Sony, Apple, Motorola, dan Nokia.

src: Initial investigations now suggest the explosion was caused by poor ventilation, which lead to high concentrations of combustible dust.
ref: Siasatan awal kini mencadangkan letupan itu disebabkan oleh pengudaraan yang tidak baik, yang menyebabkan peningkatan kepekatan habuk mudah terbakar.

src: The blast happened at 7:18PM, around the time workers change shifts.
ref: Letupan itu berlaku pada 7:18 petang, di sekitar masa pekerja -pekerja bertukar syif.

src: At least three people were killed, at least fifteen injured.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tiga orang terbunuh, sekurang-kurangnya lima belas cedera.

src: Foxconn halted production to investigate, saying "All operations at the affected workshop remain suspended and production at all other workshops that carry out similar processing functions have also been halted pending the results of the investigation. "
ref: Foxconn menghentikan pengeluaran untuk menyiasat, dan berkata "Semua operasi di bengkel yang terjejas kekal tergantung dan pengeluaran di semua bengkel lain yang menjalankan fungsi-fungsi pemprosesan yang serupa juga telah dihentikan sementara menunggu hasil siasatan".

src: "All other production operations in our facilities in China continue operating normally."
ref: "Semua operasi pengeluaran lain dalam kemudahan-kemudahan kami di China terus beroperasi seperti biasa".

src: On Monday, city officials gave the cause as combustible dust in the air at a polishing workshop.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, pegawai bandar raya menjelaskan habuk mudah terbakar di udara di bengkel mengilap sebagai sebab.

src: Hong Kong-based labor rights group Students & Scholars Against Corporate Misbehavior said they reported aluminium dust problems in March when they reviewed working conditions at Foxconn.
ref: Kumpulan hak-hak pekerja Pelajar & Cendekiawan Terhadap Salah laku Korporat yang berpangkalan di Hong Kong berkata mereka telah melaporkan masalah habuk aluminium pada bulan Mac apabila mereka mengkaji keadaan kerja di Foxconn.

src: After the explosion, they commented that workers were complaining "the ventilation of the department is poor. "
ref: Selepas letupan itu, mereka berkata bahawa pekerja - pekerja telah mengadu "pengudaraan jabatan ini tidak baik".

src: "In the process, there is lots of aluminum (aluminium) dust floating in the air. "
ref: "Dalam proses itu, terdapat banyak debu aluminium (aluminium) yang terapung di udara".

src: "Workers always breathe in aluminum dust even though they put on masks. "
ref: "Pekerja-pekerja sentiasa bernafas dalam debu aluminium walaupun mereka memakai topeng".

src: "When workers take off their cotton gloves, their hands are covered with aluminum dust."
ref: "Apabila pekerja menanggalkan sarung tangan kapas, tangan mereka penuh dengan habuk aluminium".

src: Foxconn responded by saying the group was trying to "capitalize on the tragic accident" and misrepresented "Foxconn's commitment to the health and safety of our employees."
ref: Foxconn bertindak balas dengan berkata kumpulan itu cuba "mengambil kesempatan daripada kemalangan tragis" dan memutarbelitkan kenyataan "Komitmen Foxconn untuk kesihatan dan keselamatan para pekerja kami".

src: Research group IHS iSuppli said the explosion may cause loss of production of 500,000 iPads during this quarter of the year.
ref: Kumpulan penyelidikan IHS iSuppli berkata letupan itu boleh menyebabkan kekurangan penghasilan 500,000 iPad pada suku tahun itu.

src: They said there is a larger facility in Shenzhen , but it cannot cope with re-compensating the possible loss.
ref: Mereka berkata terdapat kemudahan yang lebih besar di Shenzhen, tetapi ia tidak dapat menampung - pampasan semula kerugian yang mungkin.

src: In what appeared to be a hostage situation ended in tragedy this afternoon in the quiet Massachusetts town of North Reading when the body of a 72-year old man, Roaldas Baran, and his 65-year old wife, Zinaida Girdauskiene, were found dead in an apparent murder-suicide at 14 Country Club Road.
ref: Dalam apa yang kelihatan seperti situasi tebusan berakhir dengan tragedi tengah hari di bandar North Reading di Massachusetts yang tenang apabila mayat lelaki tua berusia 72 tahun, Roaldas Baran, dan isterinya yang berusia 65 tahun, Zinaida Girdauskiene, yang ditemui mati dalam bunuh diri selepas pembunuhan yang nyata di Jalan Country Club 14.

src: The situation began when a neighbor heard four gunshots and a woman screaming and called 9-1-1.
ref: Situasi bermula apabila jiran mendengar empat tembakan dan jeritan wanita dan telah menghubungi 9-1-1.

src: Police arrived at the home, and encountered the 72-year old man standing over, a brief conversation was held with the man who then went back inside the house.
ref: Polis tiba di rumah, dan menemui lelaki tua berusia 72 tahun itu berdiri, perbualan ringkas diadakan bersama lelaki itu yang kemudiannya masuk semula ke dalam rumah.

src: The SWAT team of the North Eastern Massachusetts Law Enforcement Council was brought in to clear the house and evacuate the surrounding houses.
ref: Kumpulan SWAT dari Majlis Penguatkuasaan Undang-undang Timur Laut Massachusetts SWAT telah dibawa masuk untuk mengosongkan rumah dan memindahkan kawasan persekitaran rumah itu.

src: Martha Coakley, the District Attorney for Middlesex County reported on what was found upon the SWAT team entering the house.
ref: Martha Coakley, Peguam Bandar bagi Middlesex County melaporkan atas apa yang ditemui kumpulan SWAT apabila memasuki rumah itu.

src: "In the bedroom, lying, apparently a victim of several gunshot wounds, was a female."
ref: "Di dalam bilik tidur, terbaring, jelas adalah mangsa dengan beberapa luka tembakan, ialah perempuan."

src: "In the kitchen on the floor, also apparently the victim of a suicide, was a male we know now to be approximately 72-years-old who was her husband."
ref: "Di atas lantai di dapur, juga jelas ialah mangsa bunuh diri, ialah lelaki yang kami tahu berusia lebih kurang 72 tahun yang merupakan suaminya."

src: Emily LaGrassa, Coxley's spokeperson said the man apparently shot the woman and turned the gun on himself.
ref: Emily LaGrassa, jurucakap Coxley berkata lelaki itu jelas menembak wanita itu dan memusingkan pistol ke arah dirinya.

src: North Reading Police had been called to the house once before in August 2004.
ref: Polis Utara Reading telah dihubungi untuk ke rumah itu sekali sebelum ini pada Ogos 2004.

src: Republicans and lobbyists close to President George W. Bush have reported that the White House will propose changing the formula for establishing initial Social Security benefit levels in order to cut guaranteed expenditures on future retirees, according to today's Washington Post.
ref: Republikan dan pelobi-pelobi yang hampir dengan Presiden George W. Bush telah melaporkan bahawa Rumah Putih akan mencadangkan perubahan kepada formula untuk mewujudkan aras faedah awal Keselamatan Sosial bertujuan untuk memberhentikan jaminan perbelajaan ke atas pesara-pesara akan datang, mengikut kepada Washington Post hari ini.

src: The Social Security Administration would no longer use the increase in wages over a worker’s lifetime to calculate retirees’ first-year benefits but would use inflation rates instead.
ref: Pengurusan Keselamatan Sosial akan tidak lagi menggunakan kenaikan gaji setahun sepanjang hayat pekerja untuk mengira faedah tahun pertama para pesara tetapi sebaliknya akan menggunakan kadar inflasi.

src: The new “price indexing” formula will reduce individual benefits and overall Social Security outlays because the inflation rate typically is much lower than the rise in wages.
ref: Formula "harga indeks" baru akan mengurangkan faedah secara individu dan perbelanjaan keseluruhan Keselamatan Sosial kerana kadar inflasi biasanya lebih rendah daripada kenaikan gaji.

src: The full impact of the change will be felt in the middle of the century.
ref: Kesan penuh preubahan akan dapat dirasakan di pertengahan abad.

src: The Bush Administration proposal, which will be offered to Congress in February or March 2005, is part of an overall Social Security reform package that also would create “personal investment accounts” into which individual taxpayers could divert part of their payroll taxes.
ref: Proposal pengurusan Bush, akan dibawa kepada Kongres pada Februari atau Mac 2005, merupakan sebahagian daripada pakej pembaharuan keseluruhan Keselamatan Sosial yang akan juga mewujudkan "akaun pelaburan peribadi" yang mana individu pembayar tax akan memindahkan sebahagian daripada peranan mereka untuk membayar tax.

src: The White House believes that the shortfall in benefits created by the adoption of price indexing would be made up by capital gains from the stocks and bonds held by individual taxpayers in their personal investment accounts.
ref: Rumah Putih percaya bahawa kejatuhan singkat faedah yang diwujudkan oleh adaptasi harga indeks yang akan diperoleh dari keuntungan negara daripada saham dan ikatan yang diadakan oleh individu pembayar tax dalam akaun pelaburan peribadi mereka.

src: The move is akin to the private sector's migration from defined benefit retirement plans to defined contribution benefit plans such as 401(k)s as almost half of a worker’s benefits will not be guaranteed by the year 2075.
ref: Tindakan yang serupa kepada sektor migrasi swasta dari apa yang dimaksudkan pelan faedah persaraan untuk mendefinasikan pelan sumbangan faedah seperti mana 401(k)s di mana separuh daripada faedah pekerja-pekerja tidak akan dapat dijamin pada tahun 2075.

src: President Bush will support the move to price indexing for calculating initial benefits by pointing out that it was the approach recommended by his 2001 Commission to Strengthen Social Security.
ref: Presiden Bush akan menyokong tindakan untuk indeks harga bagi pengiraan keluar di mana ia merupakan pendekatan yang dicadangkan oleh Komision 2001 untuk Penguatan Keselamatan Sosial.

src: Benefits currently are calculated by averaging a worker’s earnings in their 35 highest-paid years and adjusting earnings to factor in cost of living standards at the worker’s retirement age.
ref: Faedah-faedah kini dikira dengan mengira purata pendapatan pekerja dalam 35 tahun pendapatan tertinggi dan penyelarasan pendapatan ke faktor kos kehidupan biasa di usia persaraan para pekerja.

src: Under the Bush proposal, rather than adjusting benefits on the basis of earnings growth, the calculation would be based on the increase in the consumer price index over those years.
ref: Di bawah cadangan Bush, daripada menyelaraskan faedah berasaskan perkembangan pendapatan, kiraan akan dibuat berdasarkan kepada kenaikan indeks harga pengguna sepanjang tahun tersebut.

src: The implementation of "price indexing" would cut future Social Security costs by trillions of dollars.
ref: Implimasi kepada "indeks harga" akan memotong kos masa hadapan Keselamatan Sosial sebanyak beberapa trilion dolar.
