src: However, the cuts in guaranteed benefits for middle-class and some high-income workers would be substantial: 9.9% for workers retiring in 2022, over 25% for workers retiring in 2042, and 46% for workers retiring in 2075.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, pengurangan dalam faedah tetap bagi kelas pertengahan dan beberapa pekerja bergaji tinggi adalah cukup besar: 9.9% untuk pekerja bersara pada 2022, lebih 25% bagi pekerja yang bersara pada 2042, dan 46% bagi pekerja yang bersara pada 2075.

src: Opponents of the price-indexing proposal point out that inflation-based calculations of benefits, by linking benefits to prices but not wage levels, would cut retirees out from future increases in living standards since it is wages and not prices that determine standards of living.
ref: Menentang kepada cadangan penghalaan indeks-harga yang mana pengiraan faedah berasaskan inflasi, dengan menghubungkan faedah kepada harga dan bukan aras gaji, akan membuatkan pesara-pesara terkeluar daripada kenaikan taraf kehidupan pada masa akan datang memandangkan pendapatan yang menetapkan taraf kehidupan dan bukan harga.

src: While American Association of Retired Persons (AARP) Policy Director John Rother concedes that many of the arguments of opponents are valid, price indexing is inevitable and must be viewed in the context of President Bush’s total reform package.
ref: Sementara Direktor Polisi Persatuan Orang-orang Bersara Amerika (AARP), John Rother mengakui bahawa banyak daripada alasan pembakang adalah munasabah, indeks harga ialah suatu yang tidak dapat dielakkan dan mesti dilihat dalam konteks pakej pembaharuan penuh Presiden Bush.

src: Rother points out that Social Security benefits, which currently equal 42 percent of the earnings of an average worker retiring at age 65, would be reduced to 20% of pre-retirement earnings for future retirees, thus potentially freezing retirees into today’s standard of living.
ref: Rother mengetengahkan bahawa faedah Keselamatan Sosial, yang mana kini bersamaan dengan 42 peratus daripada pendapatan purata pekerja yang bersara pada usia 65 tahun, akan dikurangkan kepada 20% daripada pendapatan pra-persaraan untuk pesara akan datang, oleh itu kemungkinan pembekuan persaraan dalam kehidupan normal hari ini.

src: However, Rother says that price indexing has to be linked to Bush’s private investment accounts as income from the accounts give retirees the chance to make up the shortfalls.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Rother berkata bahawa indeks harga perlu dihubungkan kepada akaun pelaburan peribadi Bush kerana pendapatan dari akaun-akaun tersebut memberi pesara-pesara peluang untuk memperbaiki kejatuhan seketika itu.

src: The United Nations (UN) on Friday called on the government of Pakistan to investigate numerous killings and abductions, particularly of journalists.
ref: Pertubuhan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu (PBB) pada hari Jumaat menggesa kerajaan Pakistan untuk menyiasat banyak pembunuhan dan penculikan, terutamanya dikalangan wartawan.

src: "In the past eight days alone we have received reports on the killing of one journalist, Munir Shakir, in Balochistan on August 14 2011, and the disappearance of another journalist, Rehmatullah Daparkhel, three days earlier in North Waziristan on August 11," said spokesperson for the United Nations High Commissioner for Human Rights, Rupert Colville.
ref: "Dalam tempoh lapan hari lepas sahaja kami telah menerima laporan mengenai pembunuhan seorang wartawan, Munir Syakir, di Balochistan pada 14 Ogos 2011, dan kehilangan seorang wartawan lain, Rehmatullah Daparkhel, tiga hari lebih awal di North Waziristan pada 11 Ogos," kata jurucakap Pesuruhjaya Tinggi PBB untuk Hak Asasi Manusia, Rupert Colville.

src: According to the Committee to Protect Journalists, nine journalists have been killed in Pakistan this year, and at least 16 were killed in 2010.
ref: Menurut Jawatankuasa untuk Melindungi Wartawan, sembilan wartawan telah terbunuh di Pakistan tahun ini, dan sekurang-kurangnya 16 terbunuh pada tahun 2010.

src: None of the killings had been investigated satisfactorily, Colville said.
ref: Tiada satu pun daripada kes pembunuhan tersebut telah disiasat dengan sempurna, kata Colville.

src: Colville said that the UN would like to see the government review all of the incidents.
ref: Colville berkata PBB ingin melihat kerajaan mengkaji semula semua kejadian tersebut.

src: "We call on all responsible parties to immediately stop such violations of human rights, and we urge the government to take immediate steps to independently investigate these cases," he said.
ref: "Kami menyeru semua pihak bertanggungjawab untuk segera menghentikan pelanggaran hak asasi manusia, dan kami menggesa kerajaan mengambil langkah segera untuk menyiasat secara bebas kes-kes ini," katanya.

src: Amnesty International has also urged the government of Pakistan to ensure the protection of journalists and media workers in the country.
ref: Amnesty International juga menggesa kerajaan Pakistan untuk memastikan perlindungan wartawan dan pekerja media di negara ini.

src: They have further called upon the Pakistani authorities to investigate attacks on journalists and to try those responsible in line with internationally recognised standards of human rights.
ref: Mereka telah memanggil pihak berkuasa Pakistan untuk menyiasat serangan ke atas wartawan dan mendakwa mereka yang bertanggungjawab selaras dengan piawai hak asasi manusia yang diiktiraf di peringkat antarabangsa.

src: Colville said that the recent attacks on journalists were not uncommon in Pakistan and that many journalist groups regard the country as one of the most dangerous places to work.
ref: Colville berkata bahawa serangan terhadap wartawan di Pakistan baru-baru ini bukanlah perkara baru dan banyak kumpulan wartawan yang menganggap negara ini sebagai salah satu tempat yang paling berbahaya untuk bekerja.

src: Shakir was shot dead after covering a protest organized by a Baloch separatist organization.
ref: Shakir ditembak mati selepas membuat liputan tentang bantahan yang dianjurkan oleh pertubuhan pemisah Baloch.

src: Irshad Matsoi, the bureau chief for the Online News Network where Shakir worked, said that the killing was linked to the journalist’s work.
ref: Irshad Matsoi, Ketua Biro bagi Online News Network di mana Shakir bekerja, berkata pembunuhan itu ada kaitan dengan kerja wartawan terbabit.

src: Journalism in Balochistan is becoming "an endangered profession," Matsoi said.
ref: Bidang kewartawanan di Balochistan menjadi "satu profesion yang terancam," kata Matsoi.

src: Reporters Without Borders (RWB) have appealed for punishment of those responsible for the murder.
ref: Wartawan Tanpa Sempadan (RWB) telah merayu supaya hukuman dijatuhkan kepada mereka yang bertanggungjawab terhadap pembunuhan itu.

src: According to RWB, journalists do not feel free to report in Balochistan, which has led to self-censorship in the region.
ref: Menurut RWB, wartawan tidak bebas untuk membuat liputan di Balochistan, yang telah membawa kepada pengasingan diri di rantau ini.

src: The whereabouts of Daparkhel, kidnapped on August 11, is still unknown.
ref: Keberadaan Daparkhel, diculik pada 11 Ogos, masih tidak diketahui.

src: The worldwide press freedom organization said that the government must do everything they can to find him immediately.
ref: Organisasi hak kebebasan akhbar sedunia berkata kerajaan perlu mencuba sedaya upaya untuk mencari dia dengan segera.

src: "It is unacceptable that local journalists have to do the job of the police and investigate on their own using their contacts," the organization said.
ref: "Adalah tidak boleh diterima untuk wartawan tempatan melakukan tugas polis dan menyiasat sendiri dengan menggunakan hubungan mereka," kata organisasi itu.

src: The Human Rights Commission of Pakistan (HRCP) has condemned the incidents.
ref: Suruhanjaya Hak Asasi Manusia Pakistan (HRCP) telah mengutuk kejadian tersebut.

src: "There is a growing sense of insecurity among media persons who increasingly interpret each attack on journalists as a warning to ‘behave,’" the HRCP said last Monday.
ref: "Perasaan tidak selamat semakin meningkat di kalangan pihak media yang semakin banyak mentafsir setiap serangan ke atas wartawan sebagai amaran kepada mereka supaya 'berkelakuan baik, '" kata HRCP Isnin lepas.

src: The HRCP also said that in almost all cases of violence against journalists in the last few years, those responsible have not been identified or punished.
ref: HRCP juga berkata bahawa dalam hampir semua kes-kes keganasan terhadap wartawan dalam beberapa tahun yang lalu, mereka yang bertanggungjawab tidak dikenal pasti atau dihukum.

src: "The HRCP calls upon the government to respond through effective action and not mere words in the next few days, sending a strong message to the mischief makers that it would no longer stand by as a mere spectator as journalists are killed and snatched," the Commission said.
ref: "HRCP menyeru kerajaan untuk bertindak melalui tindakan yang berkesan dan bukan sekadar kata-kata semata-mata dalam masa beberapa hari akan datang, menghantar mesej yang tegas kepada sesiapa yang mencetuskan masalah ini bahawa mereka tidak akan berdiri sebagai penonton semata-mata sementara ramai wartawan terbunuh dan diculik," kata Suruhanjaya tersebut.

src: Moderate flooding has hit the province of Nakhon Sri Thammarat in southern Thailand.
ref: Banjir tahap sederhana telah melanda wilayah Nakhon Sri Thammarat di selatan Thailand.

src: Moderate to heavy rain persists in the area, further exacerbating the flooding conditions.
ref: Hujan sederhana dan lebat masih turun di kawasan tersebut, memburukkan lagi keadaan banjir.

src: The northeast monsoon has intensified the flow of rainfall-laden air from the Gulf of Thailand.
ref: Monsun Timur Laut menambahkan lagi arus hujan lebat-udara lembap dari Teluk Thailand.

src: Torrential rains have been plaguing the nine southernmost provinces of the country for nearly two weeks and further downpours are forecast for later this week.
ref: Hujan mencurah-curah telah menimpa sembilan wilayah paling selatan negara itu selama hampir dua minggu dan dijangka lebih banyak hujan akan turun akhir minggu ini.

src: Thung Song District in Nakhon Sri Thammarat province is experiencing waist-high floodwaters in downtown shopping areas.
ref: Daerah Thung Sing di wilayah Nakhon Sri Thammarat sedang mengalami banjir setinggi paras pinggang di kawasan beli-belah di pusat bandar.

src: In Songkhla Province, the government has called for steps to be taken to prevent further flooding of the commercial district of Hat Yai.
ref: Di wilayah Songkhla, kerajaan telah mengerahkan supaya langkah-langkah mengekang banjir diambil di daerah komersil Hat Yai.

src: Rail tracks have been lifted in some areas to permit flood waters to leave the city, and the Thai Navy has been ordered to take part in relief efforts.
ref: Laluan rel kereta api telah diangkat di sesetengah kawasan bagi membolehkan air banjir keluar dari bandar, dan Tentera Laut Thai telah diarahkan untuk mengambil bahagian di dalam usaha-usaha bantuan.

src: In Muang District of Nakhon Sri Thammarat, many roads have been closed and sandbags are being deployed to help affected businesses.
ref: Di daerah Muang di Nakhon Sri Thammarat, banyak jalan ditutup dan guni pasir telah diletakkan bagi membantu perniagaan yang terjejas.

src: The Meteorological Department of the Thailand Ministry of Information and Communication Technology issued a weather advisory concerning the flooding, "People in the lower South and navigators in the Gulf of Thailand should exercise caution and small boats should stay from December 15 until December 18."
ref: Jabatan Kaji Cuaca di Kementerian Maklumat dan Teknologi Komunikasi Thailand mengeluarkan nasihat cuaca mengenai banjir, "Rakyat di selatan bawah dan pengemudi kapal di Teluk Thailand perlu berhati-hati dan bot kecil perlu mengelak dari turun ke teluk dari 15 Disember hingga 18 Disember."

src: It is reported that this has left some tourists stranded on smaller resort islands in the Gulf of Thailand.
ref: Turut dilaporkan beberapa pelancong terkandas di pulau-pulau peranginan kecil di Teluk Thailand.

src: Across the border in Malaysia, three are reported to have died and over 10,000 been evacuated as a result of the flooding.
ref: Melepasi sempadan di Malaysia, tiga dilaporkan maut dan lebih 10,000 telah dipindahkan kesan dari banjir kali ini.

src: After he had repeated this publicly, he was arrested and charged with apostasy.
ref: Selepas dia mengulangi perkara umum ini, dia ditahan dan didakwa kerana murtad.

src: Iranian authorities later claimed he was jailed for spying for Israel, but this was contradicted by the court documents.
ref: Pihak berkuasa Iran kemudian mendakwa dia dipenjarakan kerana mengintip untuk Israel, tetapi bercanggah denagn dokumen mahkamah.

src: They say they hold the Iranian authorities responsible for his death and his only crime was belief in his religion.
ref: Mereka berkata mereka memegang tanggungjawab pihak berkuasa Iran untuk kematiannya dan hanya jenayah dia ialah kepercayaan dalam agamanya.

src: The Supreme Leader of North Korea, Kim Jong-il, has died according to the Korean Central News Agency (KCNA).
ref: Pemimpin Tertinggi Korea Utara, Kim Jong-il, telah meninggal dunia menurut Pusat Agensi Berita Korea (KCNA).

src: The cause of death was "advanced acute myocardial infarction, complicated by serious heart shock," commonly known as a heart attack.
ref: Punca kematian adalah "akut lanjut infarksi miokardium, yang dirumitkan dengan kejutan jantung yang serius," yang lebih dikenali sebagai serangan jantung.

src: Kim apparently died two days earlier on December 17 aboard a train.
ref: Kim sebenarnya telah meninggal dunia dua hari sebelum itu pada 17 Disember di dalam sebuah kereta api.

src: However, other records from the former Soviet Union place his age at 70.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, rekod lain dari bekas Kesatuan Soviet meletakkan umurnya pada 70 tahun.

src: At the same time, Kim's son, Kim Jong-un has been named as the "Great Successor" by North Korean state media.
ref: Pada masa yang sama, anak lelaki Kim, Kim Jong-un telah dinamakan sebagai "Pengganti Terbaik" oleh media kerajaan Korea Utara.

src: Citizens are being told they "must faithfully revere respectable comrade Kim Jong-un."
ref: Rakyat telah diberitahu mereka "mesti setia menghormati komrad yang dihormati Kim Jong-un".

src: "At the leadership of comrade Kim Jong-un, we have to change sadness to strength and courage and overcome today's difficulties," according to KCNA.
ref: "Dengan kepimpinan komrad Kim Jong-un, kita perlu mengubah kesedihan kepada kekuatan dan keberanian serta mengatasi kesusahan hari ini," menurut KCNA.

src: According to Yonhap News Agency, South Korea's military is on "emergency alert" following a meeting by South Korean Joint Chiefs of Staff (JCS).
ref: Menurut Agensi Berita Yonhap, tentera Korea Selatan berada pada "amaran kecemasan" berikutan dari mesyuarat dengan Ketua Kakitangan Bersama Korea Selatan (JCS).

src: According to a JCS official, "We're keeping close tabs on the demilitarized zone (DMZ), Joint Security Area (JSA) and Northern Limit Line (NLL) for possibilities of North Korean provocations."
ref: Menurut seorang pegawai JCS, "Kami memerhati tab dalam zon bebas tentera (DMZ), Kawasan Keselamatan Bersama (JSA) dan Had Garis Utara (NLL) untuk kebarangkalian provokasi dari Korea Utara".

src: South Korean President Lee Myung-bak also presided over a meeting.
ref: Presiden Korea Selatan Lee Myung-bak juga mempengerusikan sebuah mesyuarat.

src: A statement from Lee's office said, "The government will remain thoroughly prepared while keeping a close watch over the situation in North Korea."
ref: Satu kenyataan daripada pejabat Lee berkata, "Kerajaan akan kekal bersedia sepenuhnya sementara memantau rapi ke atas keadaan di Korea Utara".

src: "The government will also cooperate closely with the international community to maintain peace and safety on the Korean Peninsula."
ref: "Kerajaan juga akan bekerjasama rapat dengan masyarakat antarabangsa untuk mengekalkan keamanan dan keselamatan di Semenanjung Korea".

src: At approximately 00:26 hrs, on Wednesday, March 22, the British Columbia ferry MV Queen of the North hit a rock near Gil Island in Wright Sound, off the coast of British Columbia, Canada, 75 from the start of ship's scheduled journey from Prince Rupert to Port Hardy on the Northern tip of Vancouver Island.
ref: Pada kira-kira jam 00:26, pada hari Rabu, 22 Mac, British Columbia feri MV Queen of the North terlanggar batu berhampiran Pulau Gil di Wright Sound, di luar pantai British Columbia, Kanada, 75 dari permulaan perjalanan dijadualkan kapal dari Prince Rupert ke Port Hardy di hujung utara Pulau Vancouver.

src: The ship missed a course change and ran agroung off Gil Island.
ref: Kapal itu terlepas perubahan haluan dan tersasar ke luar Pulau Gil.

src: It took about an hour for the ferry to sink, giving passengers time to get out.
ref: Ia mengambil masa kira-kira sejam untuk feri tenggelam, memberi masa penumpang untuk keluar.

src: The vessel was carrying 101 passengers and crew, and all but 2 were accounted for.
ref: Kapal itu membawa 101 penumpang dan anak kapal dan semua tetapi 2 sahaja telah diambil kira.

src: Thanks to quick-response of nearby aboriginal fishing villager of Hartley Bay, and the CCGS Sir Wiflrid Laurier.
ref: Mujurlah tindak balas penduduk orang asli kampung memancing berdekatan Hartley Bay, dan CCGs Sir Wiflrid Laurier.

src: Survivors were quickly fetched from the Queen of the North's lifeboat and brought to Hartley Bay and onboard the coast Guard ship, and eventually back to Prince Rupert onboard the Sir Wilfrid Laurier.
ref: Mangsa pantas diambil dari Ratu bot penyelamat Utara dan dibawa ke Hartley Bay dan menaiki kapal pengawal pantai, dan akhirnya kembali ke Prince Rupert menaiki Sir Wilfrid Laurier.

src: The Queen of the North, is (apx) 9,000 gross ton, motor driven vessel, built in Germany in 1969.
ref: The Queen of the North, (kira-kira) 9,000 tan kasar, kapal motor yang dipandu, dibina di Jerman pada tahun 1969.

src: The Queen of the North had been on this 15 hrs, 274 nautical mile ferry run since late May 1980.
ref: Queen of North telah berada di sini 15 jam, feri berjalan 274 batu nautika sejak akhir bulan Mei 1980.

src: In the summer and on relief work, her smaller sister ship, the Queen of Prince Rupert also performs that run.
ref: Pada musim panas dan kerja-kerja bantuan, kapal yang lebih kecil, Ratu Prince Rupert juga melakukan perjalanan itu.

src: On January 25, 2005, Don Brash, the leader of the New Zealand National Party made a speech to the Orewa Rotary Club where he focussed upon welfare dependency.
ref: Pada 25 Januari, 2005, Don Brash, ketua kepada Party Kebangsaan New Zealand membuat ucapan kepada Kelab Rotari Orewa dimana dia memberi fokus kepada pergantungan kebajikan.

src: He pledged to reduce the number of working-age beneficiaries from the current figure of 300 000 to 200 000 over ten years.
ref: Dia berikrar akan mengurangkan umur-bekerja pewaris dari jumlah kini 300 000 kepada 200 000 dalam sepuluh tahun.

src: His particular target was the 109 000 solo parents on the Domestic Purposes Benefit (DPB).
ref: Sasaran khususnya adalah 109 000 ibu bapa persendirian dalam Tujuan Manfaat Domestik (DPB).

src: Brash suggested a greater role for adoption in reducing this number, and also hinted that mothers who did not name the father, or who had another child while already on the DPB, may be penalised.
ref: Brash mencadangkan peranan yang lebih besar untuk pengambilan anak angkat dalam mengurangkan jumlah ini, dan juga mencadangkan yang ibu yang tidak menamakan bapanya, atau yang memiliki anak lain sementara telah dalam DPB, mungkin dikenakan tindakan.

src: Brash's advocacy of adopting children out has lead to a number of attacks, Prime Minister Helen Clark responded by saying "I think we need to support people to keep their babies".
ref: Cadangan Brash dalam mengambil anak angkat telah membawa kepada beberapa serangan, Perdana Menteri Helen Clark menjawab dengan berkata "Saya berfikir kita perlu menyokong mereka untuk menyimpan anak mereka".

src: British MPs on the Commons Environmental Audit Committee warn Britain could face widespread electrical blackouts if new generating capacity is not added soon.
ref: Ahli Parlimen British dalam Jawatankuasa Audit Alam Sekitar Dewan Rakyat memberi amaran bahawa Britain mungkin menghadapi bekalan elektrik terputus yang meluas jika kapasiti penjanaan baru tidak ditambah tidak lama lagi.

src: Clean and renewable generating methods will be preferred in the Government's energy review, including a return to nuclear power generation.
ref: Kaedah penjanaan bersih dan boleh diperbaharui akan diutamakan dalam kajian tenaga Kerajaan, termasuk kembali ke penjanaan kuasa nuklear.

src: But the committee warned that no new nuclear power plants are expected to come online until at least 2017 with the proposed network not reaching full capacity until as late as 2030.
ref: Tetapi jawatankuasa itu memberi amaran bahawa tiada loji kuasa nuklear baru dijangka berfungsi dalam talian sehingga sekurang-kurangnya tahun 2017 dengan rangkaian yang dicadangkan itu tidak mencapai kapasiti penuh sehingga selewat 2030.

src: Meanwhile nearly a quarter of Britain's current generating capacity is scheduled to go offline by 2016, creating a shortfall described by the committee as a "generation gap" which could not be bridged by nuclear energy.
ref: Sementara itu hampir satu perempat kapasiti penjanaan semasa Britain dijadualkan akan di luar talian sebelum tahun 2016, mewujudkan kekurangan yang digambarkan oleh jawatankuasa itu sebagai "jurang generasi" yang tidak boleh dikurangkan oleh tenaga nuklear.

src: "Very substantial investment in new generating capacity and energy efficiency will be required if the lights are to stay on," committee chairman Conservative MP Tim Yeo said.
ref: "Pelaburan sangat besar dalam penjanaan kapasiti baru dan kecekapan tenaga akan diperlukan supaya lampu terus bernyala," kata Pengerusi Jawatankuasa Konservatif Ahli Parlimen Tim Yeo.

src: The committee stated that an "extensive" building programme of new gas-fired power stations would be needed to meet the predicted shortfall.
ref: Jawatankuasa itu menyatakan bahawa "banyak" program pembinaan stesen tenaga gas baru akan diperlukan untuk memenuhi kekurangan yang diramal.

src: The committee's statement drew some support from environmentalists as well as from some energy sector industries.
ref: Kenyataan jawatankuasa itu mendapat sokongan daripada pencinta alam sekitar dan juga dari beberapa industri sektor tenaga.

src: Friends of the Earth was cautiously cheered by the committee's commitment to energy efficiency, and support of reduced emissions.
ref: Friends of the Earth telah berhati-hati bersorak dengan komitmen jawatankuasa untuk kecekapan tenaga, dan sokongan pelepasan dikurangkan.

src: "...people understand renewables is the next big thing and we should get on with it," said Maf Smith, CEO of Scottish Renewables to BBC.
ref: "...orang ramai memahami tenaga boleh diperbaharui adalah perkara penting akan datang dan kita harus meneruskannya," kata Maf Smith, Ketua Pegawai Eksekutif Tenaga Boleh Diperbaharui Scotland kepada BBC.

src: Pope Shenouda III of Alexandria, the leader of Egypt's Coptic Christian church, has died at the age of 88.
ref: Paus Shenouda III dari Alexandria, pemimpin Gereja Kristian Koptik Mesir, meninggal pada usia 88 tahun.

src: His funeral was held at a packed in Cairo today.
ref: Majlis pengkebumian beliau dijalankan di Kairo hari ini.

src: The mass featured hymns, prayers and incense-burning as crowds in and outside the cathedral paid their respects.
ref: Upacara gereja tersebut memaparkan gita puja, talkin dan pembakaran kemenyan sambil orang ramai di dalam dan luar gereja memberi penghormatan.

src: A large police presence watched over the scenes as mourners wept.
ref: Pihak polis berkumpul untuk mengawasi peristiwa tersebut sementara orang yang berkabung meratap pemergian beliau.

src: Field Marshal , presently leader of Egypt, has made today a day of mourning.
ref: Fil Marsyal, yang merupakan pemimpin Mesir pada ketika ini, telah menjadikan hari ini sebagai hari berkabung.

src: The Coptic Church is among the world's oldest and traces its roots to St Mark in the first century.
ref: Gereja Koptik merupakan antara gereja yang tertua dan mempunyai kesan jejak St. Mark pada abad pertama.

src: Shenouda spent 40 years as pope to the Coptics, who make up the majority of the nation's estimated ten million Christians.
ref: Shenouda menghabiskan 40 tahun sebagai paus Koptik, yang membentuk majoriti negara sehingga mencapai anggaran sepuluh juta penganut Kristian.

src: Much of this time was spent pacifying his followers in the wake of violence and perceived discrimination, whilst working with the majority Muslims.
ref: Kebanyakan masa diluangkan untuk menenangkan pengikutnya berikutan keganasan dan sikap diskriminasi, semasa bekerja dengan majoriti Muslim.

src: He spent three years exiled in the cathedral after claims of sectarian troublemaking from then-President in 1981.
ref: Beliau menghabiskan tiga tahun mengecilkan diri di dalam gereja selepas tuduhan masalah sektaris oleh Presiden ketika itu pada tahun 1981.

src: With Mubarak gone, many Copts are concerned that Islamist political parties gaining new influence could mark a time of trouble for their religion.
ref: Dengan ketiadaan Mubarak, ramai golongan Kopt prihatin terhadap parti politik Islam dalam memperoleh pengaruh baru yang boleh membawa masalah kepada agama mereka.

src: "He left us an example of leadership that we should all follow," a cleric told the congregation at the fourth-century cathedral.
ref: "Beliau meninggalkan kita semua satu contoh kepimpinan yang kita semua harus ikuti," seorang paderi memberitahu jemaah pada abad keempat gereja.

src: "It is because of him that we have national unity with our Muslim brothers".
ref: "Kerana beliaulah kita memperoleh kesatuan dengan saudara Muslim."

src: Traffic was congested around the cathedral, which the pope remained fond of, while services were ongoing today.
ref: Trafik sesak di sekeliling gereja, tempat yang digemari paus, manakala perkhidmatan masih dijalankan sehingga kini.

src: Shenouda was dressed in full regalia, complete with a gold crown.
ref: Shenouda dipakaikan pakaian lengkap yang disempurnakan dengan mahkota emas.

src: His body was taken to a military airfield and was to be taken to desert monastery St Bishoy for burial.
ref: Jasadnya telah dibawa lapangan terbang tentera dan diwa ke padang pasir biara St Bishoy untuk pengebumian.

src: Tributes have been paid to Pope Shenouda as thousands of people mourned his death.
ref: Penghormatan telah diberikan kepada Paus Shenouda demikian beribu orang berkabung atas kematian beliau.

src: President of the United States Barack Obama said in a statement "We will remember Pope Shenouda III as a man of deep faith, a leader of a great faith, and an advocate for unity and reconciliation…" "His commitment to Egypt's national unity is also a testament to what can be accomplished when people of all religions and creeds work together."
ref: Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama berkata dalam satu kenyataan "Kita akan memperingati Paus Shenouda III sebagai seorang lelaki yang penuh setia, pemimpin yang sangat beriman, dan pembela kesatuan dan kedamaian..." "Komitmen beliau dalam kesatuan Mesir merupakan bukti yang boleh diperoleh apabila semua orang dari pelbagai agama dan kepercayaan bekerjasama."

src: A United Nations report has shown that sports footwear companies are making progress towards ending the use of sweatshops and are implementing more worker-friendly codes of practice than clothing companies and retailers.
ref: Laporan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah menunjukkan bahawa syarikat-syarikat kasut sukan mengambil langkah menamatkan penggunaan kilang jahit dan sedang melaksanakan kod amalan yang lebih mesra-pekerja berbanding syarikat-syarikat pakaian dan peruncit.

src: The study, published by the International Labour Organisation, suggests that consumer pressure is behind the changes.
ref: Kajian tersebut, diterbitkan oleh Pertubuhan Buruh Antarabangsa, menunjukkan bahawa tekanan dari pengguna di sebalik perubahan itu.

src: As a result of consumer's concerns, footwear companies have been diverting financial and human resources towards developing and implementing better codes of conduct for suppliers.
ref: Kesan daripada kebimbangan pengguna, syarikat-syarikat kasut telah mengalihkan sumber kewangan dan manusia ke arah membangunkan dan melaksanakan tatakelakuan untuk pembekal.

src: Large teams have been established within companies to work toward the goal of better conditions for factory workers.
ref: Pasukan besar telah ditubuhkan dalam syarikat-syarikat untuk berusaha ke arah matlamat mendapatkan keadaan yang lebih baik untuk pekerja kilang.

src: The study, based upon interviews with hundreds of managers, activists, government officials, factory workers and worker representatives and visits to companies all over the world, goes on to suggest that workers should be given more powers to oversee conditions in their places of work.
ref: Kajian itu, yang berdasarkan temu bual dengan beratus-ratus pengurus, aktivis, pegawai-pegawai kerajaan, pekerja kilang dan wakil-wakil pekerja dan lawatan ke syarikat-syarikat di seluruh dunia, menyarankan bahawa pekerja perlu diberikan lebih banyak kuasa untuk memantau keadaan di tempat kerja mereka.

src: Clothing companies have been failing to make such good progress due the large number of constantly-changing suppliers they use, with the ILO study describing progress as "spotty."
ref: Syarikat-syarikat pakaian telah gagal melakukan perkembangan sebegitu baik kerana jumlah besar pembekal yang mereka gunakan yang sentiasa berubah, dengan kajian ILO menerangkan kemajuan sebagai "turun naik".

src: A major retailer may have a supply base of over 5,000 different companies, making it more difficult to establish stronger, more effective links with supply companies.
ref: Sebuah peruncit utama mungkin mempunyai pangkalan bekalan lebih daripada 5,000 syarikat yang berbeza, menjadikannya lebih sukar untuk menubuhkan pautan yang lebih kuat, dan lebih berkesan dengan syarikat-syarikat bekalan.

src: They have also assigned less manpower to the task of compliance with codes of practice.
ref: Mereka juga telah diberikan kurang tenaga kerja manusia untuk tugas pematuhan tataamalan.

src: In some areas of the retail industry, there has been almost no compliance with codes of practice.
ref: Di sesetengah kawasan industri runcit, terdapat hampir tidak ada pematuhan tataamalan.

src: President Xanana Gusmão has taken special security powers in a bid to quell the violence raging in East Timor.
ref: Presiden Xanana Gusmao mengambil kuasa keselamatan istimewa dalam usaha untuk memadamkan keganasan amuk di Timor Timur.

src: The period of emergency rule, which would last 30 days, was imposed to "prevent violence and avoid further fatalities" and lead to "rapid reestablishment of public order."
ref: Dalam tempoh pemerintahan darurat, yang mana akan kekal selama 30 hari, dikenakan untuk "menghalang keganasan dan mengelakkan lebih banyak kematian" dan membawa kepada "penubuhan semula segera ketenteraman awam".

src: At least 27 people have been killed, criminal documents reported stolen, and looting widespread in the East Timorese capital, Dili during the present period of unrest.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 27 orang telah terbunuh, dokumen-dokumen laporan jenayah telah dicuri, dan rompakan berleluasa di pusat Timorese Timur, Dili ketika tempoh masa pergolakan sekarang.

src: The Australian military commander in East Timor, Brigadier Michael Slater has called the mobs "gutless thugs."
ref: Komander tentera Australia di Timor Timur, Brigadier Michael Slater telah memanggil para perusuh sebagai "samseng tidak berisi perut".

src: Mr Alkatiri was unable to stop the rioting that followed the government's decision in March to lay-off 600 soldiers when they refused to work, complaining of discrimination.
ref: Mr Alkatiri tidak dapat menghentikan rusuhan berikutan keputusan kerajaan pada Mac lalu untuk memberhentikan 600 tentera apabila mereka menolak untuk bekerja, mengadu mengenai pendiskriminasian.

src: As the disorder grew during April and May, East Timor appealed for international assistance.
ref: Gangguan merebak pada April dan May, Timor Timur ke hadapan bagi merayu untuk bantuan antarabangsa.

src: Justice Minister Domingos Sarmento said that Portugal had offered to provide East Timor with 120 security personnel by the weekend.
ref: Menteri Kehakiman Domingos Sarmento berkata bahawa Portugal telah menawarkan untuk membekalkan Timor Timur dengan 120 anggota keselamatan pada hujung minggu ini.

src: Since Saddam Hussein was toppled in the allied invasion of Iraq in 2003, Iraqi oil production figures have been bleak.
ref: Semenjak Saddam Hussein dijatuhkan dalam serangan penyatuan di Iraq pada 2003, angka pengeluaran minyak Iraq telah merosot.

src: However, new signs are being revealed that Iraqi oil output is at its best since the fall of Hussein.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, tanda baru telah didedahkan bahawa hasil keluaran minyak Iraq merupakan yang terbaik sejak kejatuhan Hussein.

src: The Iraqi oil minister, Hussain al-Shahristani, stated that about 2.5 million barrels of oil are now produced per day, a figure that has seen a rise lately.
ref: Menteri minyak Iraq, Hussain al-Shahristani, menyatakan bahawa lebih kurang 2.5 milion tong minyak kini dihasilkan setiap hari, satu angka yang dilihat meningkat akhir-akhir ini.

src: During the invasion of Iraq, lead by the United States, oil output was at about 2 million barrels per day (bpd) and before the invasion oil production ranged from 3 million to, at its peak, 3.5 million bpd.
ref: Ketika serangan di Iraq, yang diketuai oleh Amerika Syarikat, hasil keluaran minyak adalah lebih kurang 2 milion tong setiap hari (bpd) dan sebelum serangan produksi minyak berkadar dari 3 milion ke, tahap tertingginya, 3.5 milion bpd.

src: A retired Canadian military major, Michel Pilon, saw the man and two of his friends urinate on the memorial at about 11 p.m. Saturday.
ref: Seorang mejar tentera Kanada yang bersara, Michel Pilon, nampak seorang lelaki dan dua rakannya membuang air kecil pada tugu peringatan itu pada kira-kira 11 p.m. hari Sabtu.

src: The man was photographed urinating on the National War Memorial in Ottawa.
ref: Lelaki itu diambil gambar membuang air kecil di Tugu Peringatan Perang Kebangsaan di Ottawa.

src: The 23-year-old was pictured smiling and making a hand gesture toward the camera.
ref: Lelaki berusia 23 tahun itu ditangkap gambar dengan gaya senyum dan membuat isyarat tangan ke arah kamera.

src: Ottawa police are looking for the 23-year-old Montreal man and his two friends, both under the age of 18.
ref: Polis Ottawa sedang mencari lelaki dari Montreal berusia 23 tahun itu dan dua rakannya, kedua-duanya berusia di bawah umur 18 tahun.

src: "This is a shrine to people who fought for us in the wars."
ref: "Ini adalah sebuah keramat bagi orang-orang yang berjuang untuk kita semua dalam peperangan".

src: They could be charged with public urination or behaving in an offensive manner, and fined $125 or required to do a day of community work.
ref: Mereka boleh didakwa atas membuang air kecil di tempat awam atau berkelakuan tidak senonoh, dan didenda $125 atau dikehendaki membuat kerja-kerja kemasyarakatan seharian.

src: Around twelve people were killed in Iraq today while they were playing football on a makeshift pitch in a predominantly Shi'a area in west Baghdad.
ref: Seramai dua belas orang terbunuh di Iraq hari ini semasa mereka sedang bermain bola sepak di atas padang sementara di kawasan Shi'a si Barat Baghdad.

src: According to police, two bombs, which had been planted in the middle of the pitch, were detonated.
ref: Menurut polis, dua bom, yang ditanam di tengah padang itu, diletupkan.

src: Earlier today, Iraq’s President revealed Iraqi troops would take over safekeeping of the entire country from American troops by the end of 2006.
ref: Awal pagi tadi, Presiden Iraq mengesahkan bahawa angkatan tentera Iraq akan mengambil alih untuk keselamatan negara dari askar Amerika pada penghujung 2006.

src: He said the takeover would occur gradually but would be complete by the start of 2007.
ref: Beliau berkata ambil alih itu akan berlaku secara berperingkat tetapi akan ditamatkan pada awal 2007.

src: Yesterday, more than fifty people were killed across the country.
ref: Semalam, lebih dari lima puluh orang terbunuh seluruh negara.

src: Australia has defeated New Zealand by 44 runs in the one off Twenty20 international match at Eden Park.
ref: Australia telah menewaskan New Zealand dengan 44 larian di dalam perlawanan antarabangsa sekali beri Twenty20 di Eden Park.

src: This victory, in the first full international Twenty20 match, gave Australia a unique treble having won the first ever test match and then the first ever limited overs international.
ref: Kemenangan ini, di dalam perlawanan penuh antarabangsa pertama Twenty20, telah memberi Australia trebel unik dengan memenangi perlawanan cubaan yang paling pertama dan kemudian perlawanan antarabangsa satu hari yang paling pertama juga.

src: Batting first, Australia set a total of 214, with Australian captain Ricky Ponting top scoring with 98 runs from 55 balls, including 8 fours and 5 sixes.
ref: Memula pukulan dahulu, Australia meletakkan set berjumlah 214, dengan kapten Australia Ricky Ponting mendapat mata tertinggi dengan 98 larian dari 55 bola, termasuk 8 fours dan 5 sixes.

src: New Zealand's Kyle Mills led the bowling attack with 3 for 44.
ref: Kyle Mills dari New Zealand mendahului serangan balingan dengan 3 untuk 44.

src: Scott Styris top scored for New Zealand with 66 runs from 39 balls.
ref: Scott Styris mendapat mata tertinggi bagi New Zealand dengan 66 larian dari 39 bola.

src: Australian paceman Michael Kasprowicz finished the match with figures of 4 for 29 from his 4 overs.
ref: Pembaling laju Australia Michael Kasprowicz menamatkan perlawanan dengan angka 4 untuk 29 daripada 4 overs.

src: The New Zealand team had dressed in the 1980s beige uniform for the occasion.
ref: Pasukan New Zealand telah memakai uniform berwarna kuning air dari tahun 1980-an untuk upacara tersebut.

src: Many had also grown facial hair suiting the 1980s for the match.
ref: Ramai juga telah membiarkan bulu roma muka tumbuh bersesuaian dengan 1980-an untuk perlawanan itu.

src: The teams now go on to play a one-day series followed by a test match series.
ref: Semua pasukan sekarang akan bersambung untuk bermain siri satu hari diikuti dengan siri perlawanan percubaan.

src: A 6.5 magnitude earthquake has hit the Indonesian island of Sulawesi, according to the U.S. Geological Survey.
ref: Gempa bumi bermagnitud 6.5 telah menggegarkan pulau Indonesia Sulawesi, menurut Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat.

src: The tremor, lasting about 2 minutes, sparked panic in numerous seaside communities on the island.
ref: Gegaran itu, selama kira-kira 2 minit, mencetuskan panik kepada beberapa komuniti tepi pantai di pulau itu.

src: According to officials, no injuries have been reported but sea water levels have risen up to four meters in areas.
ref: Menurut pegawai, tiada kecederaan dilaporkan tetapi paras air laut telah meningkat sehingga empat meter di kawasan itu.

src: Though precise details of the earthquake are still unclear, the US Geological Survey has said the tremor just after 0800 local time (0000 UTC) was 10km (6 mi) beneath the sea bed.
ref: Walaupun butiran terperinci gempa bumi masih tidak jelas, Kajian Geologi Amerika Syarikat berkata gegaran selepas 0800 waktu tempatan (0000 UTC) adalah 10 kilometer (6 batu) di bawah dasar laut.

src: Local meteorological officials have reported to the Associated Press news agency the earthquake had been 37km (23 mi) under the Sea of Flores.
ref: Pegawai meteorologi tempatan telah melaporkan kepada agensi berita Associated Press bahawa gempa bumi itu ialah 37 km (23 batu) di bawah Laut Flores.

src: Following confirmation by Thailand's caretaker cabinet, a proposal to create a 77th province to honour the king's 80th birthday, will be the subject of a feasibility study.
ref: Berikutan pengesahan oleh kabinet sementara Thailand, satu cadangan untuk mewujudkan sebuah daerah ke-77 untuk memberi penghormatan ulang tahun ke-80 raja, akan menjadi subjek kajian kebolehlaksanaan.

src: Currently the country consists of 75 provinces, it is expected that the 76th province will be around the Suvarnabhumi International Airport which opens in September 2006.
ref: Pada masa ini negara tersebut terdiri daripada 75 wilayah, dijangkakan bahawa wilayah ke-76 akan terletak di sekitar Lapangan Terbang Antarabangsa Suvarnabhumi yang dibuka pada bulan September 2006.

src: Recently Canadian MP Belinda Stronach had an affair with Tie Domi, a former NHL player.
ref: Baru-baru ini Ahli Parlimen Kanada Belinda Stronach menmpunyai hubungan dengan Tie Domi, bekas pemain NHL.

src: She had refused to answer direct questions about her personal life.
ref: Beliau enggan menjawab soalan-soalan berkenaan kehidupan peribadinya.

src: Now for the first time since her affair, with Tie Domi, she sat down with CBC's George Stroumboulopoulos on his show The Hour to answer his questions about the affair, politics, and other topics during the nine minute chat, on October 9th.
ref: Kini buat pertama kalinya sejak hubungan itu, dengan Tie Domi, beliau duduk bersama pengacara CBC George Stroumboulopoulos di rancangannya The Hour untuk menjawab soalannya berkenaan hubungan itu, politik, dan topik lain dalam wawancara sembilan minit, pada 9 Oktober.

src: No transcripts of this interview are officially available but, a video (see CBC source below) can be viewed.
ref: Tiada transkrip untuk wawancara ini yang boleh diperoleh secara rasmi tetapi, satu video (lihat sumber CBC bawah) boleh ditonton.

src: Internet users on the Chinese-forums.com website report that the longtime block of Wikipedia by China has been at least temporarily lifted.
ref: Pengguna internet di laman Chinese-forums.com melaporkan bahawa sekatan panjang terhadap Wikipedia oleh China sekurang-kurangnya telah ditarik sementara.

src: Absent an announcement from the Chinese government, it's unclear what the conditions were that caused the site to be accessible from within China.
ref: Ketidakhadiran pengumuman dari kerajaan China, ia masih tidak jelas keadaan yang menyebabkan laman itu boleh dilayari dari dalam China.

src: A blog by Wikipedia contributor Andrew Lih says that someone in "Beijing emailed me saying he could suddenly start using Wikipedia again.
ref: Blog dari penyumbang Wikipedia Andrew Lih berkata bahawa seseorang di "Beijing menghantar email kepadanya mengatakan dia tiba-tiba boleh mula menggunakan Wikipedia semula.

src: He continued that "from a Beijing China Netcom's residential DSL connection, the English language and other foreign language versions are now accessible, but the Chinese version is still blocked", noting that the Chinese-language version is the most important one to most Wikipedians in the country.
ref: Dia meneruskan bahawa "dari sambungan kediaman DSL Beijing China Netcom, versi bahasa Inggeris dan bahasa asing kini dapat dilayari, tetapi versi bahasa Cina masih lagi dihalang," mencatatkan bahawa Wikipedia versi bahasa-Cina ialah yang paling penting di negara ini.

src: The blog entry goes on to explain the finer points of China's blocking system, which is more complex than most media outlets suggest.
ref: Entri blog diteruskan untuk menjelaskan perkara yang lebih halus terhadap sistem halangan yang dikenakan China, yang mana lebih kompleks berbanding kebanyakan cadangan pasaran media lain.

src: Wikimedia head Jimmy Wales told Moneycontrol.com yesterday that, "We don't know what they took offense to."
ref: Peneraju Wikimedia Jimmy Wales memberitahu Moneycontrol.com semalam bahawa, "Kami tidak tahu apa yang mereka cuba sembunyikan".

src: "We really don't intend to compromise the way Google did."
ref: "Kami betul-betul tidak mahu untuk berkrompomi dengan cara yang dilakukan Google".

src: "I am trying to set up high-level meetings in China to state our case and explain why we should be unblocked."
ref: "Saya cuba utuk menubuhkan mesyuarat di peringkat tinggi China untuk menjelaskan kes dan menerangkan mengapa kami tidak patut dihalang".

src: "We have no idea what the result of that would be."
ref: "Kami tidak mempunyai idea mengenai apa keputusan yang akan keluar".

src: "Wikipedia is not a haven for dissidents but an encyclopedia."
ref: "Wikipedia bukanlah syurga bagi penentang-penentang tetapi ensiklopedia".

src: "About 99.9 percent of Wikipedia has topics that are not of interest to the Chinese Government."
ref: "Lebih kurang 99.9 peratus daripada Wikipedia merupakan topik-topik yang tidak diminati oleh Kerajaan China".

src: He also told the outlet, he stressed how such bans were blocking Chinese perspectives in the global media.
ref: Beliau juga berkata kepada outlet, beliau menekankan bagaimana halangan sebegitu menghalang persepektif China dalam media global.

src: The third block of Wikipedia, which was implemented 19 October 2005, was issued without explanation or an expected length.
ref: Halangan ketiga Wikipedia, yang diimplimentasi pada 19 Oktober 2005, telah pun diisukan tanpa penjelasan atau tempoh jangkaan masa.

src: Wikipedia has been blocked twice before, the first from 2-21 June 2004, due to the 15th anniversary of the Tian'anmen Square Incident.
ref: Wikipedia telah dihalang dua kali sebelum ini, pertamanya dari 2-21 Jun 2004, akibat ulang tahun ke-15 Kejadian Tian'anmen Square.

src: A website called baidu.com runs a self-censored wiki-based encyclopedia website, called baidubaike.com, launched in April of this year.
ref: Laman web yang dipanggil baidu.com menjalankan tapisan diri berdasarkan laman web ensiklopedia, dipanggil baidubaike.com, yang dilancarkan pada April tahun ini.

src: Wikipedia is a project of the Wikimedia Foundation, a non-profit organisation based out of St. Petersberg, Florida.
ref: Wikipedia merupakan projekWikimedia Foundation, organisasi tanpa keuntungan berasaskan kepada St. Petersberg, Florida.

src: Its 2007 annual convention, Wikimania, is set to take place in Taipei.
ref: Ia merupakan kenvensyen tahunan 2007, Wikimania, yang dirancang untuk mengambil tempat di Taipei.

src: A Palestinian teenager was killed and seven others, including six children, injured in an Israeli airstrike near a school in the town of Beit Lahiya, according to Dr. Muawiya Hassanin, a local emergency services official.
ref: Seorang remaja Palestin terbunuh dan tujuh yang lain, termasuk enam kanak-kanak, cedera dalam serangan udara Israel berhampiran dengan sebuah sekolah di bandar Beit Lahiya, menurut Dr Muawiya Hassanin, seorang pegawai perkhidmatan kecemasan tempatan.

src: Israeli military officials said that the strike targeted militants who were retrieving a device used to fire missiles.
ref: Pegawai tentera Israel berkata bahawa sasaran serangan ialah militan yang telah mendapatkan semula alat yang digunakan untuk melancar peluru berpandu api.

src: Israel's incursions into northern Gaza, which are aimed at curbing rocket attacks by Palestinian militants, have killed over 50 people over the last six days.
ref: Serangan Israel ke utara Gaza, bertujuan untuk membendung serangan roket oleh pejuang Palestin, telah membunuh lebih dari 50 orang dalam tempoh enam hari yang lalu.

src: Friday saw 17 killings, including the gunning down of two women outside a mosque in Beit Hanoun.
ref: Jumaat menyaksikan 17 pembunuhan, termasuk pembunuhan dua wanita di luar sebuah masjid di Beit Hanoun.

src: At least seven people, including a 12-year-old girl were killed by Israeli action on Saturday, and three others yesterday.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya tujuh orang, termasuk seorang gadis berusia 12 tahun telah dibunuh oleh tindakan Israel pada hari Sabtu, dan tiga yang lain semalam.

src: The Israeli Prime Minister Ehud Olmert denied that his country was planning to re-occupy Gaza, and said that the offensive is aimed at stopping rockets from being fired into Israel by Hamas militants.
ref: Perdana Menteri Israel, Ehud Olmert menafikan bahawa negaranya bercadang untuk menduduki semula Gaza, dan berkata bahawa serangan itu bertujuan menghentikan roket daripada ditembak ke Israel oleh militan Hamas.

src: Palestinian Authority President Mahmoud Abbas has termed the incidents "massacres" and has called for the UN Security Council to discuss the issue.
ref: Presiden Palestin Mahmoud Abbas telah menyebut insiden tersebut sebagai "pembunuhan beramai-ramai" dan menggesa Majlis Keselamatan PBB untuk membincangkan isu itu.

src: Israeli troops have regularly made incursions into Gaza following the capture of Gilad Shalit in June this year.
ref: Tentera Israel telah kerap membuat serangan ke Gaza selepas penangkapan Gilad Shalit pada Jun tahun ini.

src: The BBC's political debate show Question Time aired a special edition from Shanghai yesterday.
ref: Rancangan perdebatan politik BBC Question Time telah menyiarkan edisi khas dari Shanghai semalam.

src: This was the first time that a political show from the West was made in China.
ref: Ini adalah kali pertama sebuah rancangan politik dari Barat dihasilkan di China.

src: The show was broadcast on BBC One and BBC World; however, it wasn't shown in China, as a condition of the programme amid fears that it would be inflammatory and present negative views of the government.
ref: Rancangan ini telah disiarkan di BBC One dan BBC World; tetapi, ia tidak ditayangkan di China, sebagai syarat rancangan itu ditengah-tengah kekhuatiran yang ia akan mengapi-apikan dan menunjukkan pandangan negatif kerajaan tersebut.

src: The panel contained the Chinese politician Liu Jianchao,who is the Chinese foreign ministry spokesman and Long Yongtu who is General Secretary for the Boao Forum for Asia, together with Chris Patten, the last Governor of Hong Kong, Isobel Hilton, a writer who has a large knowledge of China & David Tang, fashion designer.
ref: Panel tersebut melibatkan ahli politik China Liu Jianchao, jurucakap kementerian luar negeri China dan Long Yongtu, Setiausaha Agung Forum Boao untuk Asia, bersama dengan Chris Patten, Gabenor Hong Kong yang terakhir, Isobel Hilton, seorang penulis yang mempunyai pengetahuan yang luas tentang China & David Tang, pereka fesyen.

src: The audience contained a mixture of Chinese and Westerners together with people invited by the government.
ref: Penonton terdiri daripada campuran orang China dan orang Barat bersama dengan orang-orang yang dijemput oleh kerajaan.

src: The questions concerned, among other things, the next chief-executive of Hong Kong, China's attitudes toward Taiwan, whether China has growing problems concerning spoilt children, the growing human rights question, and whether China will economically overtake America in 20 years time.
ref: Soalan-soalan yang dibincangkan, di antara yang lain, adalah ketua eksekutif Hong Kong yang baru, pendirian China terhadap Taiwan, sama ada China mempunyai masalah yang semakin berat berkenaan anak-anak yang terlalu dimanjakan, persoalan hak-hak asasi manusia yang semakin meningkat, dan sama ada China akan memintas Amerika dari segi ekonomi dalam masa 20 tahun.

src: Many members of the audience liked the show and hoped a similar show will be broadcast in China, in a few years time.
ref: Ramai di kalangan penonton menyukai rancangan itu dan berharap rancangan yang serupa akan disiarkan di China, di dalam masa beberapa tahun.

src: The program, which was part of a week-long BBC focus on China, was hailed as a sign that China was becoming more liberal and accommodating to Western media presence and involvement in China.
ref: Rancangan itu, yang merupakan sebahagian daripada fokus BBC terhadap China selama seminggu, telah dialu-alukan sebagai petanda yang China telah menjadi lebih liberal dan bertolak ansur terhadap kewujudan dan penglibatan media Barat di China.

src: The New Zealand Department of Corrections is currently investigating allegations at the Rimutaka prison in Wellington, New Zealand.
ref: Jabatan Penjara New Zealand kini sedang menyiasat tuduhan di penjara Rimutaka di Wellington, New Zealand.

src: The prison guards have allegedly accepted monetary bribes from prisoners in exchange for drugs and cellphones.
ref: Pengawal penjara didakwa menerima wang sogokan daripada banduan sebagai tukaran untuk dadah dan telefon bimbit.

src: Two former officers, Ingrid and Mark Rijniers, have handed over a collection of documents on their encounters while working at Rimutaka prison.
ref: Dua bekas pegawai, Ingrid dan Mark Rijiniers, telah menyerahkan koleksi dokumen-dokumen berkenaan pernemuan mereka ketika bekerja di penjara Rimutaka.

src: The pair, who were transferred from Holland, claim that Rimutaka prison is run by gang members who dominate the prison guards.
ref: Pasangan tersebut, yang dipindahkan dari Holland, mendakwa bahawa penjara Rimutaka dikendalikan oleh ahli-ahli kumpulan yang mana menguasai para pengawal penjara.

src: They also claim that if the gang members don't get what they want they will intimidate and threaten the guards with their lives.
ref: Mereka juga mendakwa bahawa jika ahli kumpulan itu tidak mendapat apa yang mereka mahukan mereka akan mengugut dan menakutkan para pengawal dengan nyawa mereka.

src: However, Ingrid Rijniers is refusing to co-operate with the department because they refused to give her the money to return to Holland.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Ingrid Rijniers enggan bekerjasama dengan jabatan kerana mereka enggan memberikannya wang untuk pulang ke Holland.

src: The New Zealand Corrections Department says it is taking these claims seriously but has not yet found sufficient evidence to back up the claims.
ref: Jabatan Penjara New Zealand berkata mereka mengambil serius dakwaan ini tetapi masih belum menemui bukti yang cukup untuk menyokong dakwaan itu.

src: Simon Power, justice and corrections spokesman for the National party, said that the allegations are appalling and reflect heavily on the Corrections Department.
ref: Simon Power, jurucakap keadilan dan penjara bagi parti Kebangsaan, berkata bahawa dakwaan itu mengejutkan dan memberi gambaran yang berat ke atas Jabatan Penjara.

src: Mr Powers said that Barry Matthews, chief executive of the Department of Corrections, does not know what is happening in his prisons.
ref: Encik Powers menyatakan bahawa Barry Matthews, pengurusi eksekutif Jabatan Penjara, tidak mengetahui apa yang berlaku di penjaranya.

src: "That means the Minister, Damien O'Connor, will be equally clueless."
ref: "Itu bermakna Menteri, Damien O'Connor, juga sama-sama tidak tahu".

src: Twelve percent of 1,043 prisoners who were tested for drugs from the start of this year until June, tested positive for drugs.
ref: Dua belas peratus dari 1,043 banduan yang diperiksa untuk dadah dari awal tahun ini hingga Jun, disahkan positif dadah.

src: Most of the drugs taken was marijuana while fourteen tested positive for "P".
ref: Kebanyakan dadah yang diambil ialah marijuana sementara empat belas disahkan positif untuk "P".

src: In addition, a teenage prisoner, Liam Ashley, was recently strangled to death in a prison van by a much older adult prisoner.
ref: Sebagai tambahan, banduan remaja, Liam Ashley, baru-baru ini dijerut hingga mati di van penjara oleh banduan yang lebih dewasa.

src: Mr Power said that with all these new claims emerging, Mr O'Conner should resign as the minister of corrections.
ref: Mr Power berkata dengan semua dakwaan baru yang timbul ini, Mr O'Connor perlu meletak jawatan sebagai menteri penjara.

src: The Pentagon has confirmed that US forces began an on-going operation of airstrikes in southern Somalia on Monday, and that the attacks, targeted at Islamic militia, are continuing.
ref: Pentagon telah mengesahkan bahawa tentera AS telah memulakan sebuah operasi serangan udara berterusan di selatan Somalia pada hari Isnin, dan serangan itu, disasarkan kepada militia Islam, sedang berterusan.

src: Somalia's president had earlier said that the United States was pursuing suspects of the 1998 United States embassy bombings.
ref: Presiden Somalia telah terlebih dahulu berkata bahawa Amerika Syarikat telah memburu orang-orang yang disyaki dari pengeboman kedutaan Amerika Syarikat 1998.

src: It is believed that the militants are sheltering the suspects.
ref: Ia dipercayai bahawa pihak militan sedang menyembunyikan orang-orang yang disyaki.

src: An attack against Ras Kamboni — a remote island near the Kenyan border, represents the first American involvement in the tumultuous country since the the 1993 operation that resulted in the deaths of as many as 1,500 Somali militiamen and civilians.
ref: Sebuah serangan terhadap Ras Kamboni - sebuah pulau terpencil berdekatan sempadan Kenya, mewakili penglibatan Amerika yang pertama di dalam negara yang huru-hara itu sejak operasi 1993 yang menyebabkan kematian sebanyak 1,500 orang anggota militia dan orang awam.

src: A Somali Defence Ministry official has additionally reported that American helicopters launched an attack against ICU fighters in Afmadow, a city near the Kenyan border, 350 kilometres southwest of Mogadishu.
ref: Seorang pegawai Kementerian Pertahanan Somali telah menambah laporan bahawa helikopter Amerika melancarkan serangan terhadap pejuang ICU di Afmadow, sebuah bandar berdekatan sempadan Kenya 350 kilometer barat daya Mogadishu.

src: The AC-130 gunship attack killed an unknown number of civilians, alternatingly reported as 4, 19 or 31.
ref: Serangan gunship AC-130 membunuh orang awam dengan jumlah yang tidak dapat dikenalpasti, secara bersilih ganti dilaporkan sebagai 4, 19 atau 31.

src: Villagers near the town of Goroka in the jungle-covered highlands about 400 kilometres north of the capital Port Moresby in Papua New Guinea killed four women they believed to be witches.
ref: Penduduk kampung berhampiran pekan Goroka di kawasan tanah tinggi yang diliputi hutan kira-kira 400 kilometer ke utara ibu negara Port Moresby di Papua New Guinea membunuh empat wanita mereka percaya adalah ahli sihir.

src: They tortured the women by stabbing them with hot rods so they would confess to causing a road crash using sorcery.
ref: Mereka menyeksa wanita-wanita itu dengan menikam mereka dengan rod panas supaya mereka mengaku terbabit dalam kemalangan jalan raya dengan menggunakan sihir.

src: The accident had resulted in the death of three prison guards.
ref: Kemalangan itu telah menyebabkan kematian tiga pengawal penjara.

src: With the help of some village elders, police have now discovered these murders which occurred in October of last year.
ref: Dengan bantuan beberapa orang tua kampung, polis kini telah mengetahui pembunuhan ini yang berlaku pada bulan Oktober tahun lepas.

src: BBC News reports human rights campaigners saying that it is not uncommon in Papua New Guinea for women suspected of engaging in black magic to be killed, often by hanging or burning.
ref: BBC News melaporkan kempen hak asasi manusia mengatakan bahawa ia bukan luar biasa di Papua New Guinea untuk wanita disyaki terlibat dalam ilmu hitam dibunuh, selalunya dengan gantungan atau kebakaran.

src: At least 19 people have been killed in central Florida in the city of Lady Lake and Paisley after severe storms and a tornado ripped through the cities in the middle of the night.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya 19 orang telah terbunuh dipusat Florida dibandar Lady Lake dan Paisley setelah beberapa ribut dan puting beliung memusnahkan bandar-bandar tersebut ditengah malam.

src: Eleven of those killed were in Paisley and three were in Lady Lake.
ref: Sebelas dari yang terbunuh adalah di Paisley dan tiga di Lady Lake.

src: The death toll is expected to rise as rescue crews resume tomorrow morning.
ref: Jumlah kematian adalah dijangka akan meningkat apabila anggota penyelamat diteruskan pagi esok.

src: Volusia, Sumter, Lake and Seminole counties have all been declared a state of an emergency as dozens of houses, mobile homes and a church were destroyed.
ref: Daerah Volusia, Sumter, Lake dan Seminole telah diisytiharkan keadaan kecemasan memandangkan berdozen rumah, rumah bergerak dan sebuah gereja telah termusnah.

src: Clothes and furniture are scattered around the wrecked houses and pieces of trees are scattered about.
ref: Pakaian dan perabot bersepah disekitar rumah yang ranap dan bahagian-bahagian pokok yang musnah disekelilingnya.

src: Cars are reported to have been turned over or thrown around in the air.
ref: Kereta dilaporkan telah diterbalikkan atau dilontarkan ke udara.

src: "Our priority today is search and rescue," said Gov.
ref: "Keutamaan kami hari ini adalah mencari dan menyelamat," kata Gov.

src: of Florida, Charlie Crist.
ref: Florida, Charlie Crist.

src: Rescuers are still looking through the wreckage to find survivors of those who might have been killed.
ref: Penyelamat masih mencari disebalik kemusnahan untuk menemui mangsa terselamat daripada mereka yang mungkin terbunuh.

src: A spokeman for the emergency response team of Lake county, Chris Patton calls the damage "devastating" and worse than "hurricanes in 2004."
ref: Seorang jurucakap kepada pasukan tindakan kecemasan daerah Lake, Chris Patton memanggil kemusnahan itu "menghancurkan" dan lebih teruk dari "taufan pada 2004."

src: "We have complete devastation of homes, of businesses, religious institutions.
ref: "Kami mengalami kemusnahan sepenuhnya rumah, perniagaan, institusi keagamaan.

src: It was unlike even perhaps the hurricanes of 2004 when we had minor roof damage, screen damage, pool damage.
ref: Tidak seperti taufan 2004 apabila kami mengalami kemusnahan kecil atap, kerosakan skrin, kerosakan kolam.

src: There are at least two big winners in Tuesday night's US$370 million Mega Millions lottery drawing which is held in 12 U.S. states.
ref: Terdapat sekurang-kurangnya dua pemenang besar untuk cabutan loteri Mega Million Malam Selasa $370 Juta yang diadakan di 12 negeri Amerika Syarikat.

src: The two winning tickets were sold in Georgia and New Jersey, but lottery officials say that no one has come forward to claim their millions.
ref: Kedua-dua tiket yang menang telah dijual di Georgia dan New Jersey, tetapi pegawai-pegawai loteri mengatakan bahawa tiada siapa yang telah tampil ke hadapan untuk menuntut hadiah berjuta-juta mereka.

src: One ticket was sold at a store called Campark Liquors, which is located in Woodbine, New Jersey.
ref: Satu tiket telah dijual di kedai yang dipanggil Campark Liquors, yang terletak di Woodbine, New Jersey.

src: The other ticket was sold at what is called the Favorite Market, located in Dalton, Georgia.
ref: Tiket yang lain telah dijual di apa yang dikenali sebagai Pasaran kegemaran, bertempat di Dalton, Georgia.

src: The drawing, the biggest in Mega Millions history, was moved from its usual location in Atlanta, Georgia to Times Square, New York because at one point, according to New York's lottery commissioner, Robert McLaughlin, at least 1,000,000 tickets an hour were being sold in the state of New York.
ref: Cabutan, yang terbesar dalam sejarah Mega Millions, telah dipindahkan dari lokasi biasa di Atlanta, Georgia ke Times Square, New York kerana pada satu ketika, menurut Pesuruhjaya loteri New York, Robert McLaughlin, sekurang-kurangnya 1,000,000 tiket telah dijual dalam satu jam di negeri New York.

src: In fact, the state's lottery system, for reasons still not known, went off-line at 10:25 p.m., just over a half hour before the drawing was to be held.
ref: Malah, sistem loteri di negeri ini, atas sebab-sebab masih tidak diketahui, putus talian pada 10:25 p.m., hanya lebih setengah jam sebelum cabutan itu akan dimulakan.

src: At least one person was one number away from winning the jackpot, matching five of the six numbers.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya satu orang kurang satu nombor dari memenangi jackpot, di mana lima daripada enam nombor sepadan.

src: That ticket is worth $250,000 and was bought at Burtonsville Crown Beer & Wine in Montgomery County, Maryland.
ref: Tiket tersebut bernilai $ 250,000 dan telah dibeli di Burtonsville Crown Beer & Wine di Montgomery County, Maryland.

src: The previous record for the highest multi-state lottery was set back in 2006 when the Power Ball jackpot paid out at least $365 million dollars to eight people in Nebraska.
ref: Rekod sebelum ini untuk loteri pelbagai negeri di rekodkan pada tahun 2006 apabila jackpot Power Ball membayar sekurang-kurangnya $365 juta dolar untuk lapan orang di Nebraska.

src: Another multi-state lottery, The Big Game (which was later named Mega Millions) has the third highest jackpot of $363 million dollars which was paid out in 2000.
ref: Satu lagi loteri pelbagai negeri, Big Game (yang kemudiannya dinamakan Mega Million) mempunyai jackpot tertinggi ketiga $363 juta dolar yang dibayar pada tahun 2000.

src: The Montreal Heart Institute (MHI) notified the public, through a news release Wednesday, that a recent high volume of patients has put a strain on the hospital's resources.
ref: Institut Jantung Montreal (MHI) memberitahu orang ramai, melalui satu kenyataan akhbar hari Rabu, bahawa jumlah pesakit yang tinggi baru-baru ini telah meletakkan tekanan kepada sumber hospital.

src: The MHI requested that the public avoid its emergency department and find alternate care, if possible.
ref: Pihak MHI meminta agar orang ramai mengelakkan jabatan kecemasannya dan mencari rawatan alternatif, jika boleh.

src: It did indicate that acute care emergency patients would not be turned away.
ref: Mereka ada menyatakan bahawa pesakit kritikal rawatan kecemasan tidak akan ditolak.

src: The notice was to be in place for 24 hours from Wednesday.
ref: Notis itu akan berkuat kuasa selama 24 jam dari hari Rabu.

src: On Thursday, the MHI issued a extension to the public notice for an additional 24-hour period.
ref: Pada hari Khamis, MHI telah mengeluarkan lanjutan kepada notis tersebut untuk tambahan 24-jam.

src: The number of patients that visited the MHI over the past few months had been abnormally high and reached a peak in the past two weeks, according to the head of emergency services.
ref: Bilangan pesakit yang melawat MHI sejak beberapa bulan yang lalu adalah terlalu tinggi dan mencapai puncak dalam dua minggu lalu, menurut ketua perkhidmatan kecemasan.

src: Alain Vadeboncoeur indicated that it was unusual for the MHI to put out such an advisory, but assured the public that the hospital would "always take the big emergencies."
ref: Alain Vadeboncoeur menyatakan bahawa ia adalah luar biasa untuk MHI untuk mengeluarkan surat makluman seperti itu, tetapi memberi jaminan kepada orang ramai bahawa hospital itu akan "sentiasa mengambil kes kecemasan yang besar".

src: The hospital treats 45 to 50 emergency patients per day, typically, but that number jumped to as many as 70 patients per day in the past two weeks.
ref: Hospital ini merawat 45 hingga 50 pesakit kecemasan sehari, biasanya, tetapi jumlah itu melonjak kepada seramai 70 pesakit bagi setiap hari dalam tempoh dua minggu yang lalu.

src: The MHI maintains 153 beds, including 42 in medical intensive care and 29 in surgical intensive care and performs 1,850 cardiac surgeries yearly.
ref: MHI mengekalkan 153 katil, termasuk 42 di unit rawatan rapi perubatan dan 29 di unit rawatan rapi pembedahan dan melakukan 1,850 pembedahan jantung setiap tahun.

src: It was suggested by the MHI that people requiring non-emergency care contact their regional Info-Santé for telephone-based advice, or visit a local clinic.
ref: Ia telah dicadangkan oleh MHI bahawa sesiapa yang memerlukan rawatan bukan kecemasan menghubungi Info-Santé kawasan mereka untuk mendapatkan nasihat melalui telefon, atau mengunjungi klinik tempatan.

src: Founded in 1954, the MHI specializes in cardiovascular treatment, with an emphasis on prevention, specialized care, research, and assessment of new technologies.
ref: Ditubuhkan pada tahun 1954, MHI pakar dalam rawatan kardiovaskular, dengan penekanan kepada pencegahan, penjagaan khusus, penyelidikan, dan penilaian teknologi baru.

src: The MHI is a teaching facility affiliated with the University of Montreal.
ref: MHI adalah fasiliti pengajaran yang bergabung dengan Universiti Montreal.

src: The man accused of killing a Laval, Quebec police officer on March 2, 2007 was released Tuesday on a CA$200,000 bail.
ref: Lelaki yang dituduh membunuh seorang pegawai polis Laval, Quebec pada 2 Mac 2007 telah dibebaskan pada hari Selasa dengan ikat jamin CA$200,000.

src: Basil Parasiris has been charged with several offences stemming from a drug raid carried out by police in the early morning hours of March 2.
ref: Basil Parasiris didakwa atas beberapa kesalahan yang berpunca daripada serbuan dadah yang dijalankan oleh pihak polis pada awal pagi 2 Mac.

src: Among the alleged offences are a first-degree murder charge in the shooting death of Constable Daniel Tessier, attempted murder in the wounding of Tessier's partner, Stephane Forbes, and several weapons offences.
ref: Antara kesalahan yang dikatakan itu adalah tuduhan membunuh darjah pertama dalam kematian penembakan Konstabel Daniel Tessier, cubaan membunuh dalam pada mencederakan rakan kongsi Tessier, Stephane Forbes, dan beberapa kesalahan senjata.

src: Parasiris will remain free on bail pending a preliminary hearing to be held in August of this year.
ref: Parasiris akan kekal bebas dengan ikat jamin sementara menunggu perbicaraan awal yang akan diadakan pada bulan Ogos tahun ini.

src: For his part, Parasiris has not denied that the shooting took place, and has apologized to Tessier's family.
ref: Bagi pihaknya, Parasiris tidak menafikan bahawa penembakan itu telah berlaku, dan telah memohon maaf kepada keluarga Tessier.

src: He claims that he was acting in self defence, as he didn't know that it was police entering his house in a planned raid, and instead believed intruders had broken in.
ref: Dia mendakwa bahawa dia telah bertindak untuk mempertahankan diri, kerana dia tidak tahu bahawa polis memasuki rumahnya dalam satu serbuan yang dirancang, dan sebaliknya percaya penceroboh telah menceroboh masuk.

src: My condolences to the Tessier family," Parasiris told CTV News.
ref: Takziah kepada keluarga Tessier," Parasiris memberitahu CTV News.

src: "I honestly thought there was a home invasion or something."
ref: "Saya secara jujur fikir ada pencerobohan rumah atau sesuatu."

src: The judge overseeing the bail proceedings, ruled that Parasiris would not pose an immediate threat to society, but did place strict conditions on his release.
ref: Hakim mengawasi prosiding jaminan, memutuskan bahawa Parasiris tidak akan menimbulkan ancaman segera kepada masyarakat, tetapi hanya mengenakan syarat yang lebih ketat ke atas pembebasannya.

src: While awaiting trial, Parasiris, 41, will have to live with his father, obey a curfew, and not travel outside Canada.
ref: Sementara menunggu perbicaraan, Parasiris, 41, akan terpaksa hidup dengan bapanya, patuhi perintah berkurung, dan tidak keluar dari Kanada.

src: In what is believed to be the first ruling of its kind in Canada, releasing on bail a defendant charged with killing a policeman, the judge criticized some of the police tactics used during the raid.
ref: Dalam apa yang dipercayai sebagai peraturan pertama seumpamanya di Kanada, membebaskan dengan jaminan seorang defendan yang didakwa membunuh seorang anggota polis, hakim mengkritik beberapa taktik polis gunakan dalam serbuan itu.

src: Justice Jean-Guy Boilard of the Quebec Superior Court noted that the police didn't use a "knock notice" before entering Parasiris' house, but rather used a battering ram to break down the door.
ref: Hakim Jean-Guy Boilard dari Mahkamah Atasan Quebec menyatakan bahawa pihak polis tidak menggunakan "notis ketukan" sebelum memasuki rumah Parasiris, tetapi sebaliknya menggunakan pelantak untuk memecahkan pintu.

src: When serving a warrant under normal conditions, police are to knock at the door and identify themselves.
ref: Apabila mengeledah berdasarkan waran di bawah keadaan biasa, polis harus mengetuk di pintu dan memperkenalkan diri mereka.

src: Jacques Larochelle, Parasiris' lawyer, indicated that he will contest the warrant's legality.
ref: Jacques Larochelle, peguam Parasiris, membayangkan dia akan melawan kesahihan waran itu.

src: The prosecution argued that, even if it was not clear to Parasiris that police were entering his home, he should not have been so reckless with a gun.
ref: Pihak pendakwaan berhujah bahawa, walaupun tidak jelas bagi Parasiris bahawa polis telah memasuki rumahnya, dia tidak sepatutnya begitu melulu dengan pistol.

src: During the fatal raid on the Parasiris home in March, police collected four loaded handguns, as well as a small amount of drugs and cash.
ref: Dalam serbuan maut di rumah Parasiris pada bulan Mac, polis mengumpul empat pistol berpeluru, serta sejumlah kecil dadah dan wang tunai.

src: According to reports, the 357-magnum handgun allegedly used by Parasiris to shoot the officers was legally registered.
ref: Menurut laporan, pistol 357-magnum yang didakwa digunakan oleh Parasiris untuk menembak pegawai telah didaftarkan secara sah.

src: According to BBC News Online more than 300 people were detained and at least 10 hurt after a second night of riots in Estonia's capital, Tallinn.
ref: Menurut Berita BBC atas talian lebih 300 orang telah ditahan dan sekurang-kurangnya 10 tercedera selepas malam kedua rusuhan di ibu negara Estonia, Tallin.

src: Clashes began last night after Estonian authorities removed a controversial Soviet monument, the Bronze Soldier of Tallinn, which Russian-speaking Estonians see as a symbol of the liberation of Eastern Europe from Nazism, while Estonian nationalists view it as a reminder of Soviet occupation.
ref: Pertempuran bermula semalam selepas pihak berkuasa Estonia menghapuskan satu tugu berkontroversi, Askar Gangsa Tallin, yang dilihat sebagai simbol pembebasan Eropah Timur daripada Nazisme oleh orang Estonia berbahasa Rusia, manakala bagi nasionalis Estonia melihat sebagai tanda peringatan pendudukan Soviet.

src: The official results of the 2007 Ontario General Election now show that the Ontario Liberal Party has been re-elected.
ref: Keputusan rasmi Pilihan Raya Umum Ontario 2007 kini menunjukkan bahawa Parti Liberal Ontario telah dipilih semula.

src: The Liberal Party lead by Dalton McGuinty will spend the next four years in a majority government.
ref: Parti Liberal yang diketuai oleh Dalton McGuinty akan menghabiskan empat tahun akan datang sebagai kerajaan majoriti.

src: McGuinty is the first Liberal premier to have back-to-back majorities since Mitchell Hepburn, who held office from 1934-1942, with his second majority starting in 1937.
ref: McGuinty adalah perdana menteri Liberal yang pertama untuk mempunyai majoriti berturutan sejak Mitchell Hepburn, yang memegang jawatan daripada 1934-1942, dengan majoriti keduanya bermula pada tahun 1937.

src: Hepburn's government legacy includes the Queen Elizabeth Way and Rainbow Bridge to Niagara Falls, New York.
ref: Legasi kerajaan Hepburn merangkumi Queen Elizabeth Way dan Jambatan Rainbow ke Air Terjun Niagara, New York.

src: A package of six media reform bills introduced last week before Australia's Parliament — including one proposing appointing a Public Interest Media Advocate (PIMA) to monitor print and online sectors — was shelved yesterday by the Australian Labor Party, with only two passed before a seven week break for the country's legislative body.
ref: Satu pakej membentuk enam rang media diperkenalkan minggu lalu kepada Parlimen Australia - termasuk satu mencadangkan melantik Peguam Bela Media Berkepentingan Awam (PIMA) untuk mengawas sektor bercetak dan dalam jaringan - ditangguhkan semalam oleh Party Buruh Australia, dengan hanya dua diterima sebelum cuti tujuh minggu oleh badan perundangan negara tersebut.

src: Stephen Conroy, the Minister for Broadband, Communications and the Digital Economy, had hoped to see the legislation package passed by the end of the week.
ref: Stephen Conroy, Menteri Jalur Lebar, Komunikasi dan Ekonomi Digital, telah berharap untuk melihat pakej undang-undang tersebut diterima sebelum hujung minggu tersebut.

src: The Parliament of Australia summarized Public Interest Media Advocate Bill 2013 as, "Part of a package of six bills in relation to the media sector, the bill: creates the independent statutory office of the Public Interest Media Advocate (PIMA); provides for the functions, appointment, and terms and conditions of PIMA; and requires an annual report to be prepared on PIMA’s activities and other specified matters."
ref: Parlimen Australia merumuskan Rang Undang-Undang Peguam Bela Media Berkepentingan Awam 2013 sebagai, "Sebahagian dari pakej kepada enam rang undang-undang berkaitan sektor media, rang undang-undang tersebut: memberikan kanun kebebasan kepada pejabat Peguam Bela Media Berkepentingan Awam (PIMA); memenuhi fungsi, perlantikan, dan terma dan kondisi PIMA; dan perlu menyediakan laporan tahunan aktiviti dan lain-lain perkara tertentu PIMA."

src: Other bills in the package delineate what PIMA's role would be.
ref: Rang undang-undang lain dalam pakej tersebut memaparkan apakah fungsi PIMA.

src: Broadcasting Legislation Amendment (Convergence Review and Other Measures) Bill 2013 and Television Licence Fees Amendment Bill 2013 both had their second reading on Tuesday in the House and were the only bills to pass both houses of parliament.
ref: Kedua-dua Pindaan Rang Undang-Undang Perundangan Penyiaran (Penumpuan Ulasan dan Lain-lain Langkah) 2013 dan Pindaan Rang Undang-Undang Bayaran Lesen Televisyen 2013 telah diberi bacaan kedua pada Selasa di Parlimen dan satu-satunya rang undang-undang yang perlu melalui kedua-dua dewan parlimen.

src: Unlike the other bills in the package which have not had a third reading before being shelved, the former bill deals primarily with the Australian Broadcasting Corporation and Special Broadcasting Service, while the latter bill increased licensing fees for television stations.
ref: Tidak seperti rang undang-undang lain dalam pakej tersebut yang tidak mempunyai bacaan ketiga sebelum diterima sebelum ini, rang undang-undang yang telah dinyatakan dahulunya menangani terutamanya dengan Perbadanan Penyiaran Australia dan Servis Penyiaran Istimewa, manakala rang undang-undang yang dinyatakan kemudiannya meningkatkan bayaran lesen untuk stesyen televisyen.

src: On Monday, the Australian Associated Press (AAP) released a statement saying such government oversight is not required.
ref: Pada hari Isnin, Perikatan Media Australia (AAP) mengeluarkan kenyataan mengatakan pengawasan kerajaan tersebut tidak diperlukan.

src: Australia's The Daily Telegraph is quoted by the Brisbane Times describing this legislation as an "aggressive attempt to silence your media."
ref: The Daily Telegraph Australia dipetik oleh Brisbane Times menggambarkan undang-undang ini sebagai "cubaan agresif untuk mendiamkan media anda."
