src: Speaking before a Senate committee about media reform, AAP chief Bruce Davidson said, "We simply do not believe that there is a problem with the conduct of the media in Australia, and certainly not that of AAP, that warrants further oversight by a minister-appointed body [...]" "Any hidden perception, I believe, of government interference is simply a dangerous precedent that may lead to control, may lead to interference [...]" "The aims may be noble, Mr Chairman, but the potential for potential misuse and changes of that legislation as presented to us, I think, is a dangerous thing to contemplate."
ref: Bercakap dihadapan jawatankuasa Senat mengenai pembaharuan media, ketua AAP Bruce Davidson berkata, "Kami sekadar tidak percaya yang terdapat masalah dengan urusan media di Australia, dan pastinya terhadap AAP, waran itu menambahkan pengawasan kepada badan yang dilatik menteri [...]" "Sebarang persepsi tersembunyi, saya percaya, terhadap campurtangan kerajaan hanyalah pendahuluan berbahaya yang mungkin membawa kepada kawalan, mungkin membawa kepada campurtangan [...]" "Matlamatnya mungkin mulia, Encik Pengerusi, tetapi potensi kepada salahguna potensi dan perubahan kepada undang-undang tersebut seperti yang dikemukakan kepada kita, saya fikir, suatu benda berbahaya untuk direnung."

src: Former federal court judge Ray Finkelstein oversaw an inquiry into the Australian print media in 2011.
ref: Bekas peguam mahkamah persekutuan Ray Finkelstein penyelia kepada permintaan terhadap media bercetak Australia pada 2011.

src: He told a government inquiry, "There are no powerful groups in society that can come along to governments or anybody and say 'we can do what we like when we like and there's nothing you should do about it'."
ref: Dia memberitahu permintaan kerajaan, "Tiada kumpulan berkuasa didalam masyarakat yang dapat datang kepada kerajaan atau sesiapa dan berkata 'kami dapat lakukan apa yang kami suka pada masa yang kami suka dan tiada apa yang kamu patut lakukan mengenainya'."

src: Finkelstein is also on the record as stating that self regulation by the industry through their own organization has failed.
ref: Finkelstein juga didalam rekod mengatakan yang perundangan sendiri oleh industri tersebut melalui organisasi mereka telah gagal.

src: Three people were hospitalized with injuries after a series of explosions at Southwest Industrial Gases, Inc., a gas facility in Dallas, Texas.
ref: Tiga orang dimasukkan ke hospital kerana kecederaan selepas beberapa siri letupan di Southwest Gas Industri, Inc., kemudahan gas di Dallas, Texas.

src: Tanks of oxygen, helium and acetylene began to explode after a connector used to join acetylene tanks during the filling process malfunctioned.
ref: Tangki oksigen, helium dan asetilena mula meletup selepas satu penyambung digunakan untuk menyambung tangki asetilena semasa proses pengisian berfungsi.

src: The explosions sent flaming debris into the air and onto buildings and expressways.
ref: Letupan itu menyebabkan serpihan berapi terbang ke udara dan ke bangunan dan lebuh raya.

src: Black smoke that could be seen for miles billowed from the facility.
ref: Asap hitam yang berawan asap boleh dilihat untuk berbatu jauhnya dari kemudahan tersebut.

src: The problem began around 9:30 a.m CDT (UTC-5) at a loading dock, according to Dallas Fire Department Lt. Joel Lavender, and then spread to a trailer housing some 100,000 cubic feet (approximately 28,300 cubic metres) of gas.
ref: Masalah itu bermula sekitar 9:30 pagi CDT (UTC-5) pada dok angkutan, menurut Jabatan Bomba Dallas Lt. Joel Lavender, dan kemudian merebak ke perumahan treler kira-kira 100,000 kaki padu (lebih kurang 28,300 meter padu) gas.

src: Authorities evacuated an area that was one-half of a mile (approximately 800 m) wide.
ref: Pihak Berkuasa mengosongkan kawasan yang berlebar setengah batu (kira-kira 800 m).

src: Portions of Interstate 35 and Interstate 30 were shut down.
ref: Bahagian Interstate 35 dan Interstate 30 telah ditutup.

src: Flaming debris ignited small grass fires next to the roads.
ref: Serpihan berapi mennyalakan rumput dan menyebabkan kebakaran kecil yang bersebelahan dengan jalan raya.

src: Tanks were reported to have landed as far away as four blocks.
ref: Tangki dilaporkan telah mendarat sejauh empat lorong jauhnya.

src: Officials for the Environmental Protection Agency, as well as local and state environmental officials, have deemed air quality levels acceptable following the blast.
ref: Pegawai Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar, sekali dengan pegawai-pegawai alam sekitar tempatan dan negeri, telah menganggap tahap kualiti udara boleh diterima berikutan letupan itu.

src: Hazardous material crews have blocked water used in the fire from entering the Dallas storm drains.
ref: Kru bahan berbahaya telah menghalang air yang digunakan di dalam kebakaran itu daripada mengalir ke longkang Dallas.

src: "I just advised my teams to get out," said Eddy Parker of Airgas which operates right next to Southwest Industrial.
ref: "Saya hanya menasihatkan pasukan saya supaya keluar," kata Eddy Parker daripada Airgas yang beroperasi di sebelah Barat Daya Industri.

src: "Then we turned and ran and just kept hearing explosions."
ref: "Kemudian kita berpusing dan lari dan terus mendengar suara letupan".

src: "Given the fact that there haven’t been any fatalities, it seems like our fire department and emergency responders did a great job."
ref: "Memandangkan hakikat bahawa tiada apa-apa kemalangan maut, nampaknya jabatan bomba dan tindak balas kecemasan kami melakukan kerja yang hebat".

src: "But we need to let the fire department look at why this is occurring there in that area," said City Councilman Steve Salazar.
ref: "Tetapi kita perlu membiarkan jabatan bomba siasat mengapa ini berlaku di kawasan itu," kata anggota majlis bandar Steve Salazar.

src: Two of the injured men, Randal Bibb, 52, and Daniel McMurry, 56, were taken to Parkland Memorial Hospital to be treated for upper-body burns.
ref: Dua daripada lelaki yang tercedera, Randal Bibb, 52, dan Daniel McMurry, 56, telah dibawa ke Hospital Memorial Parkland untuk merawat luka bakar bahagian atas badan.

src: The third, an unidentified truck-driver, was treated and released at Methodist Dallas Medical Center.
ref: Mangsa ketiga yang tidak dikenali, pemandu trak, dirawat dan keluar daripada Pusat Perubatan Methodist Dallas.

src: He hurt his back when he jumped from the cab of his truck.
ref: Dia cedera belakangnya apabila dia melompat dari bahagian angkutan lori itu.

src: In the hills of Weiswampach, Luxembourg yesterday, the 12th International Wämper Triathlon became the setting for the national championship Olympic distance (1,5 km swimming, 40 km cycling, 10 km running) triathlon for both Belgium and Luxembourg.
ref: Di bukit Weiswampach, Luxembourg semalam, Triathlon Antarabangsa Wämper ke-12 menjadi penetapan triathlon berjarak kejohanan kebangsaan Olimpik (1.5 km berenang, berbasikal 40 km, 10 km berjalan) untuk kedua-dua Belgium dan Luxembourg.

src: The Belgian championship was scheduled to take place in Vilvoorde, Belgium, but because the concentration of Salmonella bacteria in the water was too high, the Belgians moved to Luxembourg.
ref: Kejohanan Belgium telah dijadualkan berlangsung di Vilvoorde, Belgium, tetapi kerana kepekatan bakteria Salmonella dalam air terlalu tinggi, kejohanan Belgium berpindah ke Luxembourg.

src: On Saturday, an event for children and for the handicapped took place, along with the 10 kilometre running event.
ref: Pada hari Sabtu, acara untuk kanak-kanak dan untuk orang kurang upaya berlangsung, bersama-sama dengan acara berjalan 10 kilometer.

src: On Sunday, the Juniors and the athletes for the Promotion race started the day, followed at 15:00 by the elite athletes.
ref: Pada hari Ahad, Juniors dan atlet untuk perlumbaan Promosi memulakan hari itu, diikuti pada jam 15:00 oleh atlet elit.

src: Even though dark clouds hung over Weiswampach most of the afternoon, there was only a short rain shower during the cycling course.
ref: Walaupun awan gelap meliputi Weiswampach kebanyakan waktu sebelah petang, hanya ada sedikit hujan panas semasa perlumbaan basikal.

src: In the men's race, Peter Croes (Belgium, Atriac team) and Dirk Bockel (Luxembourg, Celtic Diekirck team) started together for the final 10 kilometre run, but Bockel managed to outrun Croes by 23 seconds, prolonging his victory of last year.
ref: Dalam perlumbaan lelaki, Peter Croes (Belgium, pasukan Atriac) dan Dirk Bockel (Luxembourg, pasukan Celtic Diekirck) bermula bersama-sama untuk perlawanan akhir lumba lari 10 kilometer, tetapi Bockel berjaya mengalahkan Croes sebanyak 23 saat, memanjangkan kemenangannya tahun lepas.

src: Last year's winner, Stijn Goris from Belgium (LTTL team), came in third, followed closely by Bas Diederen from the Netherlands.
ref: Pemenang tahun lalu, Stijn Goris dari Belgium (pasukan LTTL), di tempat ketiga, diikuti dengan Bas Diederen dari Belanda.

src: In the women's race, the top two athletes remained the same as last year; Elisabeth "Liz" May from Luxembourg managed to stay ahead of a pursuing group the entire race, and finished first ahead of Jessica Mayon.
ref: Dalam perlumbaan wanita, kedua-dua atlet kekal seperti tahun lepas; Elisabeth "Liz" May dari Luxembourg berjaya mendahului kumpulan pelumba yang mengejar di belakang dalam keseluruhan perlumbaan, dan menduduki tempat pertama di hadapan Jessica Mayon.

src: Mayon secured the title of Belgian 1/4 Triathlon champion, in addition to the previously won Sprint Triathlon and Long Distance championships.
ref: Mayon mendapat gelaran juara Triathlon 1/4 Belgium, tambahan kepada kejohanan Sprint Triathlon dan Jarak Panjang yang dimenangi sebelum ini.

src: Thoroughbred horse racing has been cancelled indefinitely in the Australian states of New South Wales and Queensland due to an outbreak of Equine Influenza.
ref: Lumba Kuda Belima telah dibatalkan tanpa ditetapkan masanya di negeri Australia New South Wales dan Queensland disebabkan oleh wabak Equine Influenza.

src: An Australia-wide ban on the movement of horses, donkeys and mules which was due to expire on Wednesday has been extended until Friday.
ref: Pengharaman seluruh Australia pada pergerakan kuda, keldai dan baghal yang dijangkakan tamat pada hari Rabu telah dilanjutkan sehingga hari Jumaat.

src: So far the virus only appears to have infected horses in NSW and Queensland, with 51 confirmed cases and another 400 suspected.
ref: Setakat ini virus nampaknya hanya menjangkiti di NSW dan Queensland, dengan 51 kes disahkan dan 400 yang lain disyaki.

src: So far all those infected appear to be horses used for recreational purposes and not thoroughbred race horses.
ref: Setakat ini semua yang dijangkiti dilihat kuda yang digunakan untuk tujuan rekreasi dan bukan baka kuda lumba.

src: Despite the bans on racing and horse movements, track work will recommence in NSW and Queensland today.
ref: Walaupun pengharaman terhadap lumba dan pergerakan kuda, kerja trek akan dimulakan semula di NSW dan Queensland hari ini.

src: It had been feared yesterday that four race horses at Randwick Racecourse in Sydney had been struck down by the virus, but the horses later tested negative to the virus.
ref: Ianya ditakuti semalam bahawa empat kuda lumba di Randwick Racecourse di Sydney telah dijangkiti oleh virus itu, tetapi kemudiannya kuda-kuda didapati negatif kepada virus itu.

src: If an outbreak were to occur at Randwick it could affect up to 700 race horses stabled there.
ref: Jika wabak berlaku di Randwick, ia boleh menjejaskan 700 kuda lumba yang dibela di sana.

src: The outbreak comes at a bad time for the industry, as it prepares for the lucrative spring racing season in Sydney and Melbourne.
ref: Wabak itu tibad pada waktu yang tidak baik untuk industri, kerana industri bersedia untuk musim perlumbaan musim bunga yang lumayan di Sydney dan Melbourne.

src: The AUD$1 million Golden Rose event at Rosehill has been cancelled, although it is expected that Melbourne's spring racing carnival will resume on Saturday as no cases of the flu have been seen in Victoria.
ref: Acara Golden Rose AUD$1 juta di Rosehill telah dibatalkan, walaupun ia dijangka bahawa karnival perlumbaan musim bunga Melbourne akan disambung semula pada hari Sabtu kerana tiada kes selsema dilihat di Victoria.

src: Racing Victoria has also said the Melbourne Cup will go ahead as planned despite the outbreak, even if no interstate or international horses can attend.
ref: Racing Victoria juga telah berkata bahawa Piala Melbourne akan diteruskan seperti yang dirancang walaupun wabak itu, walaupun jika tiada kuda negeri lain atau antarabangsa yang boleh hadir.

src: Despite fines of up to $44,000 and 12 months imprisonment in NSW there have been reports that more than 100 horse owners have been caught moving their horses.
ref: Walaupun denda sehingga $44,000 dan 12 bulan penjara di NSW, terdapat laporan bahawa lebih daripada 100 pemilik kuda telah ditangkap menggerakkan kuda mereka.

src: The NSW Primary Industries Minister Ian Macdonald, said it was "absolutely vital that no-one moves a horse in this state".
ref: Industri Utama Menteri NSW Ian Macdonald, berkata ia adalah "amat penting bahawa tiada siapa menggerakkan kuda di negeri ini".

src: "We will be working with police to ensure horses are at a standstill," he said.
ref: "Kami akan bekerjasama dengan polis untuk memastikan kuda tiada pergerakan," katanya.

src: The racing bans have cost gaming companies Tabcorp and Tattersall's millions, with Tabcorp losing $65 million in revenue on the weekend.
ref: Pengharaman lumba telah mengakibatkan syarikat perjudian Tabcorp dan Tattersall berjuta-juta, dengan Tabcorp kerugian $65juta hasil pada hujung minggu.

src: Tabcorp expects to lose around $150 million in turnover this week.
ref: Tabcorp menjangka kehilangan sekitar $150 juta dalam perolehan minggu ini.

src: Tattersall's has also said it expects to lose around $2 million in revenue per week due to the outbreak.
ref: Tattersall juga telah berkata ia menjangka untuk kehilangan sekitar $2 juta dalam pendapatan setiap minggu kerana wabak.

src: Investors reacted to the news, slashing 3 percent of the price of Tattersall's shares and over 4 percent of those of Tabcorp.
ref: Pelabur-pelabur memberi reaksi terhadap berita, pemotongan 3 peratus daripada harga saham Tattersall dan lebih 4 peratus daripada saham Tabcorp.

src: It has been confirmed that eight thoroughbred race horses at Randwick Racecourse in Sydney have been infected with equine influenza.
ref: Telah disahkan bahawa lapan kuda lumba thoroughbred di Tapak Lumba Randwick di Sydney telah dijangkiti influenza kuda.

src: Randwick has been locked down, and is expected to remain so for up to two months.
ref: Randwick telah pun ditutup, dan dijangka akan kekal begitu sehingga dua bulan.

src: It is expected that the virulent flu will affect the majority of the 700 horses stabled at Randwick.
ref: Dijangkakan selsema virulent itu akan mempengaruhi majoriti 700 kuda dibangsal kuda di Randwick.

src: NSW Minister for Primary Industries said the facility would be quarantined until 30 days after the last sign of the flu.
ref: Menteri Industri Utama NSW berkata bahawa pusat itu akan dikuarantin sehingga 30 hari dari tanda terakhir influenza tersebut.

src: The cases are the first infections of race horses, despite infecting dozens of recreational horses across NSW and Queensland.
ref: Kes tersebut merupakan jangkitan pertama kuda lumba, walaupun menjangkiti berdozen kuda rekreasi seluruh NSW dan Queensland.

src: The flu is highly contagious but cannot be transmitted to humans.
ref: Influenza tersebut sangat berjangkit tetapi tidak boleh dipindahkan kepada manusia.

src: The national racing shutdown was costing the industry tens of millions of dollars every day.
ref: Penutupan perlumbaan negara mengakibatkan industri itu kos puluhan juta dolar setiap hari.

src: Chief Executive of Racing NSW, Peter V'Landys said while racing had been disrupted since a ban on horse movements last weekend today was a "grim, black day" for the racing industry in NSW.
ref: Ketua pengarah perlumbaan NSW, Peter V'landys berkata bahawa perlawanan telah terganggu sejak larangan terhadap pergerakan kuda sejak hujung minggu lalu hari ini adalah "suram, dari gelap" kepada industri perlumbaan di NSW.

src: Racing is expected to resume in all Australian states except NSW and Queensland on the weekend.
ref: Perlumbaan dijangkakan akan disambung di seluruh negeri Australia kecuali NSW and Queensland pada hujung minggu.

src: While Sydney's spring racing carnival has been canceled, Melbourne's is expected to kick off this weekend with the Caufield Cup.
ref: Sementara perlumbaan karnival musim bunga Sydney telah dibatalkan, Melbourne dijangkakan akan bermula hujung minggu ini dengan Piala Caufield.

src: The cup will be ran with special precautions in place to attempt to keep the state free of the virus.
ref: Piala ini akan berlangsung dengan langkah berjaga-jaga khas dalam usaha memastikan negeri tersebut bebas dari virus tersebut.

src: Contact between the general public and those working with the horses will be banned and Sydney-based jockeys Darren Beadman and Hugh Bowman and a number of interstate trainers including Bart Cummings are not allowed to take part.
ref: Hubungan diantara orang awam dan mereka yang bekerja dengan kuda akan dilarang dan joki berpusat di Sydney Darren Beadman dan Hugh Bowman dan beberapa pelatih antara negeri termasuk Bart Cummings tidak dibenarkan mengambil bahagian.

src: Federal Minister for Agriculture, Peter McGauran said the spring carnival in Melbourne will remain "largely intact" despite losing some of the biggest names in Australian racing.
ref: Menteri Pertanian Persekutuan, Peter McGauran berkata karnival musim bunga Melbourne akan kekal "tidak terjejas" walaupun kehilangan beberapa nama besar dalam perlumbaan Australia.

src: In the 2007 Rugby World Cup, New Zealand overwhelmed tournament newcomers Portugal.
ref: Di dalam Piala Dunia Ragbi 2007, New Zealand telah mengalahkan pendatang baru Portugal dalam perlawanan.

src: The All Blacks scored more than 100 points and 16 tries in their 108-13 victory to hold their position at the top of Pool C. A dominant first half display from Australia saw them defeat Wales in Cardiff.
ref: All Blacks telah memperoleh lebih dari 100 mata dan 16 cubaan di dalam kemenangan 108-13 bagi mengekalkan posisi mereka di tempat teratas Kumpulan C. Perlawanan dominan separuh pertama dari Australia membawa mereka mengalahkan Wales di Cardiff.

src: A strong finish by Wales was not enough to prevent the Wallabies, who lead Pool B, winning 32-20 and picking up a bonus point.
ref: Satu pengakhiran yang kuat dari Wales tidak mencukupi untuk menghalang Wallabies, yang mendahului Kumpulan B, dengan memenangi 32-20 dan mendapat satu mata tambahan.

src: Ireland came from behind to defeat a strong Georgian team 14-10 in Pool D. Georgia led early in the second half and were threatening to score late in the match but Ireland's defence held to secure the four point victory.
ref: Ireland tiba dari belakang untuk menewaskan satu pasukan Georgian yang kuat 14-10 di Kumpulan D. Georgia mendahului di permulaan separuh kedua dan mengancam untuk memperoleh mata di akhir perlawanan tetapi pertahanan Ireland berjaya memegang kemenangan empat mata.

src: New Zealand, one of the tournament favourites, defeated Portugal by 95 points.
ref: New Zealand, salah satu pasukan kegemaran perlawanan, telah mengalahkan Portugal dengan 95 mata.

src: Joe Rokocoko scored two tries to open the scoring for New Zealand.
ref: Joe Rokocoko telah memperoleh dua cubaan untuk memulakan perolehan mata bagi New Zealand.

src: Isaia Toeava, Ali Williams, Aaron Mauger, Jerry Collins, Chris Masoe and Andrew Hore each added tries as New Zealand ended the half with a 52-3 lead.
ref: Joe Toeva, Ali Williams, Aaron Mauger, Jerry Collins, Cris Masoe dan Andrew Hore masing-masing telah menambah cubaan dengan New Zealand menamatkan separuh lagi dengan 52-3 di hadapan.

src: Rui Cordeiro scored Portugal's only try of the match shortly after the restart, which was converted by Duarte Cardoso Pinto.
ref: Rui Cordeiro telah memperoleh satu-satunya cubaan Portugal di dalam perlawanan sejurus selepas permulaan semula, yang telah diubah oleh Duarte Cardoso Pinto.

src: However tries from Brendon Leonard, Nick Evans, Andrew Ellis, Leon MacDonald, Carl Hayman and two from Conrad Smith completed New Zealand's victory.
ref: Bagaimanapun semua cubaan dari Brendon Leonard, Nick Evans, Andrew Ellis, Leon MacDonald, Carl Hayman dan dua dari Conrad Smith telah menyempurnakan kemenangan New Zealand.

src: Duarte Cardoso Pinto added a penalty for Portugal in the 75th minute.
ref: Duarte Cardoso Pinto telah menambah satu penalti bagi Portugal di dalam minit ke75.

src: Nicky Evans scored 33 points in total for New Zealand, converting 14 tries and scoring one of his own.
ref: Nicky Evans memperoleh sejumlah 33 mata buat New Zealand, menukar 14 cubaan dan memperoleh satu dari dirinya.

src: New Zealand are top of Pool C with ten points, ahead of Scotland with 5 and Italy with 4.
ref: New Zealand adalah teratas di dalam Kumpulan C dengan sepuluh mata, di hadapan Scotland dengan 5 dan Itali dengan 4.

src: Australia took the lead immediately after a second minute penalty from Stirling Mortlock, but Wales equalised five minutes later through Stephen Jones.
ref: Australia mendahului dengan serta merta selepas beberapa saat penalti dari Striling Mortlock, tetapi Wales menyamakannya lima minit kemudian melalui Stephen Jones.

src: Australia dominated the first half, and led 25-3 at half time after tries from Matt Giteau, Stirling Mortlock and Chris Latham and a drop goal from Berrick Barnes.
ref: Australia telah mendominasi pada separuh pertama, dan mendahului 25-3 pada separuh masa selepas cubaan dari Matt Giteau, Stirling Mortlock dan Chris Latham dan satu gol sepakan dari Berrick Barnes.

src: Jonathan Thomas scored a try and James Hook added the conversion and a penalty to cut the deficit to twelve points.
ref: Jonathan Thomas memperoleh satu cubaan dan James Hook menambah pertukaran dan satu penalti bagi memotong defisit kepada dua belas mata.

src: However Chris Latham scored his second try of the match, and Australia's fourth, to restore their hold of the game and secure a bonus point.
ref: Bagaimanapun Chris Latham memperoleh cubaan keduanya di dalam perlawanan, dan keempat Australia, bagi memulihkan kedudukan mereka di dalam perlawanan dan menjamin mata tambahan.

src: Shane Williams scored a try for Wales in the 76th minute after a strong finish, but it came too late and Australia won by twelve points.
ref: Shane Williams memperoleh satu cubaan bagi Wales di dalam minit ke76 selepas penamat yang kuat, tetapi ianya tiba lewat dan Australia telah menang dengan dua belas mata.

src: Wales are second with five points, ahead of Fiji on points difference, while Japan have one point and Canada are bottom of the group with no points.
ref: Wales di tempat kedua dengan lima mata, di hadapan Fiji dengan perbezaan mata, sementara Jepun mempunyai satu mata dan Kanada di tempat terbawah kumpulan itu dengan tanpa mata.

src: Rory Best scored the only try of the first half in the 17th minute, which Ronan O'Gara converted.
ref: Rory Best memperoleh satu-satunya cubaan dalam separuh pertama di minit ke17, di mana Ronan O'Gara telah menukarnya.

src: Merab Kvirikashvili scored a penalty late in the first half for Georgia, taking the score to just 7-3 at half time.
ref: Merab Kvirikashvili memperoleh satu penalti lewat separuh pertama bagi Georgia, menjadikan mata kepada hanya 7-3 di separuh masa.

src: Georgia took a shock lead early in the second half, when Georgi Shkinin scored a try in the 45th minute.
ref: Georgia mendapat pendahuluan yang mengejutkan di separuh kedua, apabila Georgi Shkinin memperoleh satu cubaan di minit ke45.

src: Girvan Dempsey regained the lead for Ireland and another Ronan O'Gara conversion made the score 14-10.
ref: Girvan Dempsey mendapatkan semula pendahuluan bagi Ireland dan satu lagi pertukaran oleh Ronan O'Gara dibuat menjadikan mata sebanyak 14-10.

src: Georgia kept up the pressure on Ireland in the late stages of the game, twice reaching Ireland's try line, but they could not get through and Ireland managed to scrape through with a four point lead.
ref: Georgia terus memberi tekanan kepada Ireland di tahap akhir perlawanan, dua kali menghampiri garis cubaan Ireland, tetapi mereka tidak dapat menembusinya dan Ireland berjaya memenangi dengan empat mata di hadapan.

src: Ireland are second in Pool D with eight points, behind Argentina on nine.
ref: Ireland berada di tempat kedua di Kumpulan D dengan lapan mata, di belakang Argentina dengan sembilan mata.

src: France are third with one point from their single match, while Georgia have one point from two defeats.
ref: Perancis berada di tempat ketiga dengan satu mata dari perlawanan tunggal, sementara Georgia mempunyai satu mata dari dua kekalahan.

src: Jean Chrétien, one of Canada's former prime ministers, received quadruple heart bypass surgery yesterday at Montreal's Heart Institute.
ref: Jean Chrétien, salah seorang bekas perdana menteri Kanada, menerima pembedahan pintasan jantung kuadrupel semalam di Institut Jantung Montreal.

src: He's well and he's recuperating very well at the moment.
ref: Dia dalam keadaan baik dan beransur sembuh dengan baik pada masa ini.

src: "His outcome is excellent," said Chief of surgery, Dr. Michel Pellerin.
ref: "Hasilnya adalah sangat baik," kata Ketua pembedahan, Dr. Michel Pellerin.

src: He could have risked his life as he was diagnosed with unstable angina.
ref: Dia mungkin membahayakan nyawanya kerana dia telah disahkan menghidap angina tidak stabil.

src: It is caused by obstructed arteries, which causes heart pain in a person's body.
ref: Ia adalah disebabkan oleh arteri terhalang, yang menyebabkan sakit jantung dalam badan seseorang.

src: The golfer told him to see a doctor as soon as possible.
ref: Pemain golf itu memberitahunya supaya berjumpa doktor dengan secepat mungkin.

src: "He had a bit of discomfort and mentioned it because there was a doctor there," said a friend of Chrétien, Eddie Goldenberg.
ref: "Dia berasa sedikit tidak selesa dan mengatakannya kerana ada seorang doktor di sana," kata seorang kawan Chrétien, Eddie Goldenberg.

src: "The doctor asked him a couple of questions and said, 'You better come and see me.'"
ref: "Doktor tersebut bertanya beberapa soalan kepadanya dan berkata, 'Lebih baik kamu datang dan berjumpa dengan saya.

src: He had to postpone his speech at the Asia-Pacific mining conference in Vancouver, B.C..
ref: '" Dia terpaksa menangguhkan ucapannya di persidangan perlombongan Asia Pasifik di Vancouver, B.C.

src: 5,580 Hong Kong citizens participated in a umbrella unfurling campaign, which was organized by the pan-democrats in order to support having full universal suffrage in 2012.
ref: 5,580 warga Hong Kong mengambil bahagian dalam kempen membabarkan payung, yang telah dianjurkan oleh pan-demokrat bagi menyokong mempunyai hak mengundi bebas sepenuhnya pada tahun 2012.

src: The participants gathered in Victoria Park and unfurled yellow umbrellas forming the numbers 2012 against a background of blue umbrellas.
ref: Para peserta berkumpul di Victoria Park dan mengibarkan payung kuning membentuk nombor 2012 terhadap latar belakang payung biru.

src: The organizers had prepared 10,080 umbrellas, 3,144 in yellow and 6,936 in blue.
ref: Pihak penganjur telah menyediakan 10,080 payung, 3144 dalam kuning dan 6936 dengan warna biru.

src: However, since the event was not as popular as expected, about four thousand blue ones were left undistributed.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kerana acara itu tidak sepopular seperti yang diharapkan, kira-kira empat ribu yang biru dibiarkan tidak diagihkan.

src: Nevertheless, Ronny Tong, an organizer from Civic Party, said he was satisfied with the turnout.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, Ronny Tong, penganjur dari Parti Civic, berkata beliau berpuas hati dengan jumlah yang keluar mengundi.

src: Anson Chan, the former Chief Secretary and one of the candidates of the upcoming by-election in the Legislative Council, also participated in this event.
ref: Anson Chan, bekas Ketua Setiausaha dan salah satu calon yang akan datang pilihan raya kecil di Majlis Mesyuarat Negara, turut mengambil bahagian dalam acara ini.

src: Currently, the Chief Executive of Hong Kong is elected by a election committee of 800 people, and most of them heavily favour PRC government.
ref: Pada masa ini, Ketua Eksekutif Hong Kong dipilih oleh jawatankuasa pemilihan 800 orang, dan kebanyakan mereka sangat memihak kepada kerajaan Republik Rakyat China.

src: Also, only half of the seats in Legislative Council is directly elected, and another half is elected by less than 5% of citizens.
ref: Juga, hanya separuh daripada kerusi dalam Majlis Perundangan dipilih secara langsung, dan separuh lagi dipilih oleh kurang daripada 5% daripada rakyat.

src: Therefore, the pan-democrats in Hong Kong demand to have universal suffrage in the next elections in 2012.
ref: Oleh itu, permintaan pan-demokrat Hong Kong mempunyai hak mengundi bebas dalam pilihan raya yang akan datang pada tahun 2012.

src: Chicago Fire advanced to the Eastern Conference Final after a 3-2 aggregate win against DC United on a pair of goals that were scored within two minutes of each other.
ref: Chicago Fire mara ke Pusingan Akhir Wilayah Timur selepas memenangi agreget 3-2 menentang DC United dengan sepasang gol yang dijaringkan dalam selang masa dua minit.

src: Chicago Fire plays the winner of the New England Revolution/New York Red Bulls 2 Leg affair which is currently tied 0-0.
ref: Chicago Fire akan menentang pemenang perlawanan 2 pusingan antara New England Revolution/New York Red Bulls yang kini terikat 0-0.

src: He said that $100 dollars per barrel was a "fair" price and remembered that when he assumed presidency of Venezuela in 1999, the price went up to about ten dollars.
ref: Dia pernah berkata bahawa $100 dolar bagi setiap tong adalah harga yang "berpatutan" dan masih mengingatinya apabila dia menjadi presiden Venezuela pada tahun 1999, harga setiap tong naik sebanyak sepuluh dolar.

src: The prices of raw oil approached $100 last week before settling down again.
ref: Harga bagi minyak mentah mencecah $100 minggu lepas sebelum ianya turun kembali.

src: Some observers think it is possible that the $100 barrier may be broken.
ref: Sesetengah pemerhati merasakan bahawa $100 halangan mungkin boleh dipecahkan.

src: During the trading session following this two-day summit, that is expected to result in the "Declaration of Riyadh", the price of petroleum rose $0.80 in the New York market and $0.66 in London.
ref: Semasa sesi dagangan di sidang kemuncak dua hari, yang dijangka akan menyebabkan "Pengisytiharan Riyadh," harga petroleum telah meningkat sebanyak $0.80 di pasaran New York dan $0.66 di pasaran London.

src: Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.
ref: Fabio Capello telah muncul sebagai kegemaran baru untuk memenangi Steve McClaren sebagai ketua jurulatih baru pasukan bola sepak England selepas Jose Mourinho menarik diri dari mengambil kerja tersebut.

src: The former Chelsea manager had been widely regarded as a favourite for the job but after he admitted yesterday that he is no longer interested in it, Capello became the new favourite.
ref: Bekas pengurus Chelsea itu secara meluas telah dianggap sebagai kegemaran untuk kerja tersebut tetapi setelah beliau menyatakan semalam tidak lagi berminat untuk itu, Capello menjadi pilihan terbaru.

src: The Italian, who has previously managed Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus and Roma, would regard the England job as the highlight of his career according to sources close to him and is ready to open talks.
ref: Warga Itali itu, yang mana sebelum ini pernah menguruskan Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus dan Roma, menurut sumber-sumber rapatnya, beliau menganggap tugas England ini sebagai kemuncak dalam kariernya dan bersedia membuka meja perundingan.

src: Other candidates for the job include fellow Italian Marcello Lippi, former Germany coach Jurgen Klinsmann and Aston Villa manager Martin O'Neill.
ref: Calon-calon lain untuk tugas ini adalah termasuk rakan Itali Marcello Lippi, bekas jurulatih German Jurge Klinsmann dan pengurus Aston Villa Martin O'Neill.

src: On Friday, May 27, 2005, 9 trains on the New York City Subway will make their final run, ending rush-hour skip-stop service on the IRT Broadway-Seventh Avenue Line north of 137th Street-City College.
ref: Pada hari Jumaat, 27 Mei, 2005, 9 kereta api kereta api bawah tanah New York City akan bergerak untuk kali terakhir, mengakhiri perkhidmatan waktu sibuk dan pemberhentian di stesen tertentu di IRT Broadway - Seventh Avenue Line utara 137th Street-City College.

src: During rush hours, the 9 is a skip-stop supplement to the 1, running the same route but skipping some stops in Upper Manhattan and the Bronx.
ref: Semasa waktu puncak, 9 adalah tambahan perkhidmatan pemberhentian di stesen tertentu untuk 1, berjalan laluan yang sama tetapi melangkau beberapa perhentian di Upper Manhattan dan Bronx.

src: At the same time, the 1 skips other stops, which are only served by the 9 at rush hours; some stops are served by all trains.
ref: Pada masa yang sama, 1 melangkau hentian lain, yang hanya boleh sampai dengan menggunakan 9 pada waktu sibuk; beberapa hentian boleh sampai dengan menggunakan semua kereta api.

src: This service pattern results in slightly faster trains, but longer waits for those going to or from skipped stations.
ref: Corak perkhidmatan in menghasilkan kereta api yang lebih cepat sedikit, tetapi waktu menunggu yang lebih lama untuk mereka yang pergi ke atau dari stesen dilangkau.

src: 9 service was started on December 12, 1988, at first running during rush hours and middays.
ref: Perkhidmatan 9 telah dimulakan pada 12 Disember 1988, pada mulanya berjalan pada waktu sibuk dan tengah hari.

src: United States President George Bush has arrived in Saudi Arabia, where he is expected to attempt to encourage support for Israeli-Palestinian peace talks and U.S.-led efforts to contain Iran.
ref: Presiden Amerika Syarikat George Bush telah tiba di Arab Saudi, di mana beliau dijangka cuba menggalakkan sokongan bagi rundingan keamanan Israel-Palestin dan Pakatan A.S. untuk menmbendung Iran.

src: Mr. Bush is using this tour of the Middle East to ask Arab allies of the USA to provide diplomatic and financial backing to Palestinian leaders involved in negotiations with Israel.
ref: Encik Bush menggunakan lawatan Timur Tengah ini untuk memohon sekutu A.S. di Arab untuk memberikan sokongan diplomatik dan kewangan kepada pemimpin Palestin yang terlibat dalam rundingan dengan Israel.

src: In a speech on Sunday in Abu Dhabi, the president also urged Gulf states to join Washington in confronting Iran, which he called "the world's leading state sponsor of terror."
ref: Dalam satu ucapan pada hari Ahad di Abu Dhabi, presiden itu juga mendesak negara-Negara Teluk untuk menyertai Washington dalam menghadapi Iran yang beliau panggil sebagai "penaja keganasan utama dunia".

src: Sunni Arab Gulf states have maintained relations with Iran despite their concerns about the Shi'ite country's regional influence.
ref: Negara-Negara Teluk Sunni Arab mengekalkan hubungan dengan Iran mahupun mereka bimbang aka pengaruh negara serantau negara Shi'ite itu.

src: Mr. Bush's talks with Saudi leaders also are expected to cover arms sales.
ref: Ucapan Encik Bush bersama pemimpin Saudi juga dijangka merangkumi penjualan senjata.

src: Before heading to Saudi Arabia, Mr. Bush visited Dubai briefly.
ref: Sebelum menuju ke Arab Saudi, Encik Bush telah melawat Dubai untuk jangka masa pendek.

src: He told a round table of young Arab leaders there that America respects their religion and wants to work together in peace.
ref: Beliau memberitahu sekumpulan pemimpin muda Arab bahawa Amerika menghormati agama mereka dan ingin bekerjasama dalam keamanan.

src: Sunday, in Abu Dhabi, Mr. Bush accused Iran of sending arms or financial support to militants in Iraq, Afghanistan, Lebanon and the Palestinian territories.
ref: Ahad, di Abu Dhabi, Encik Bush menuduh Iran menghantar senjata atau bantuan kewangan kepada kumpulan militan di Iraq, Afghanistan, Lebanon dan wilayah Palestin.

src: Iran denies such allegations and accuses Washington of trying to spread anti-Iranian sentiment in the region.
ref: Iran menafikan tuduhan tersebut dan menuduh Washington cuba menyebarkan sentimen anti-Iran di wilayah tersebut.

src: According to many reporters George Bush has kept a strong relationship with the Saudi royal family, who are often considered as allies of the United States.
ref: Menurut ramai pemberita George Bush mengekalkan hubungan rapat dengan keluarga diraja Saudi, yang sering dianggap sebagai sekutu Amerika Syarikat.

src: President Bush is due to leave Saudi Arabia on Tuesday for Egypt, the final stop on his Mideast tour before his return to Washington, D.C. on Wednesday.
ref: Presiden Bush dijangka meninggalkan Arab Saudi pada hari Khamis untuk menuju ke Mesir, destinasi terakhir bagi lawatan Timur Tengah sebelum berangkat pulang ke Washington, D.C. pada Rabu.

src: Four male members of the paparazzi were arrested and charged on Wednesday with reckless driving in Mission Hills, California after following Britney Spears back to her mansion.
ref: Empat orang ahli lelaki paparazi telah ditangkap dan didakwa pada hari Rabu dengan pemanduan secara semberono di Mission Hills, California selepas mengekori Britney Spears kembali ke rumah agamnya.

src: At least four others were also stopped by police, but were not arrested.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya empat yang lain turut dihentikan polis, tetapi tidak ditangkap.

src: According to reports, police witnessed the entire incident saying that a fleet of paparazzi were following Spears at a high rate of speed around 11:20 p.m. PST (UTC-8).
ref: Menurut laporan, polis telah menyaksikan seluruh kejadian itu dengan menyatakan satu gerombolan paparazi telah mengekori Spears dengan kelajuan yang tinggi sekitar jam 11:20 p.m. PST (UTC-8).

src: They also say they followed her too closely and made unsafe lane changes in order to follow her.
ref: Mereka turut berkata yang mereka mengekorinya dengan terlalu rapat dan membuat tukaran laluan berbahaya untuk mengekorinya.

src: Police also say that at least one of cars following Spears, who was driving her car, tried to run her off the road, but she was not able to identify the vehicle or the occupants.
ref: Polis turut menyatakan yang sekurang-kurangnya sebuah kereta yang mengekori Spears, yang sedang memandu keretanya, telah cuba untuk menolaknya keluar dari jalan, tetapi dia tidak dapat mengenalpasti kenderaan tersebut atau mereka yang menaikinya.

src: They are reported to have verified her identity, and released her.
ref: Mereka turut melaporkan sudah mengesahkan identitinya dan melepaskannya.

src: TMZ.com reports that police were checking to see if her license was valid, and was surprised that it was.
ref: TMZ.com melaporkan yang polis sedang memeriksa jika lesennya masih sah, dan terkejut yang ia masih sah untuk digunakan.

src: Spears was not charged with anything and despite the paparazzis' recklessness, Spears did not want the men arrested.
ref: Spears tidak didakwa dengan apa-apa dan walaupun dengan kecuaian paparazi itu, Spears tidak mahu semua lelaki itu ditahan.

src: "Britney Spears was part of the group, but was not driving recklessly," said spokeswoman for the Los Angeles Police Department, Sara Faden.
ref: "Britney Spears termasuk di dalam kumpulan tersebut, tetapi tidak memandu dengan cuai," kata jurucakap bagi Jabatan Polis Los Angeles, Sara Faden.

src: The National Hockey League has announced in a press conference earlier this week that it will open the 2008-09 NHL season with two series' in Europe.
ref: Liga Hoki Kebangsaan telah diumumkan dalam satu sidang media awal minggu ini bahawa ia akan membuka musim NHL 2008-09 dengan dua siri di Eropah.

src: On October 4 and October 5, the New York Rangers and Tampa Bay Lightning will play in Prague, Czech Republic at the Sazka Arena, and the Ottawa Senators and Pittsburgh Penguins will play in Stockholm, Sweden at the Stockholm Globe Arena.
ref: Pada 4 Oktober dan 5 Oktober, New York Rangers dan Tampa Bay Lightning akan bermain di Prague, Republik Czech di Arena Sazka, dan Ottawa Senators dan Pittsburgh Penguins akan bermain di Stockholm, Sweden di Stockholm Globe Arena.

src: Each of the four teams will also play exhibition games in Europe.
ref: Setiap satu daripada empat pasukan juga akan bermain perlawanan pameran di Eropah.

src: The Rangers will play against Metallurg Magnitogorsk of Russia's elite league in the IIHF-sanctioned Victoria Cup.
ref: Rangers akan bermain menentang Metallurg Magnitogorsk daripada Liga elit Rusia dalam Piala Victoria yang dipersetujui IIHF.

src: The Senators will play against Frolunda of Sweden's elite league.
ref: Senators akan bermain menentang Frolunda dari liga elit Sweden.

src: The Lightning and Penguins will play exhibition games in Germany and Finland respectively.
ref: Lightning dan Penguins akan bermain perlawanan pameran di Germany dan Finland masing-masing.

src: This will be the second season in a row that the NHL season kicks off with regular season games being played in Europe; at the start of the current 2007-08 season, the Los Angeles Kings and Anaheim Ducks played games at London's O2 September 28 and September 29.
ref: Ini akan menjadi musim kedua berturut-turut musim NHL yang bermula dengan permainan musim biasa yang dimainkan di Eropah; pada permulaan semasa 2007-08 musim, Los Angeles Kings dan Anaheim Ducks bermain permainan di O2 di London pada 28 September dan 29 September.

src: The 2008 Taipei Game Show, organized by the Taipei Computer Association (TCA), ended on Monday, and was different from shows of past years.
ref: Rancangan Permainan Taipei 2008, yang dianjurkan oleh Persatuan Komputer Taipei (TCA), berakhir pada hari Isnin, dan berbeza daripada rancangan tahun lalu.

src: This could be seen in the gaming population, industry, and exhibition arrangements.
ref: Ini dapat dilihat dalam pengaturan populasi permainan, industri, dan pameran.

src: The fourth day of New York Fashion Week debuted few daring designs even from designers known for such work.
ref: Hari keempat Minggu Fesyen New York mempergayakan beberapa reka bentuk yang menjolok mata buat kali pertamanya meskipun daripada pereka yang terkenal dengan gaya itu.

src: With few exceptions, the overwhelming theme was "old is new" and that the '70s were even more in fashion than the shows on Sunday suggested.
ref: Dengan beberapa pengecualian, tema yang amat menarik itu adalah "lama adalah baru" dan 70-an makin dalam fesyen berbanding pertunjukan pada hari Ahad yang dicadangkan.

src: Among the designers to unveil their Fall 2008 lines on Monday were Oscar de la Renta, Carolina Herrera, Betsey Johnson, Proenza Schouler and a rejuvenated Halston line, under the direction of designer Marco Zanini.
ref: Antara pereka untuk mempamerkan koleksi Musim Luruh 2008 mereka pada hari Isnin adalah Oscar de la Renta, Carolina Herrera, Betsey Johnson, Proenza Schouler dan koleksi Halston yang diberikan nafas baru, di bawah arahan pereka Marco Zanini.

src: Both global warming and the slowing economy have been cited as reasons for the overwhelming use of lighter fabrics over heavier attire.
ref: Kedua-dua pemanasan global dan ekonomi yang semakin lembap telah dinamakan sebagai alasan untuk kegunaan fabrik ringan yang amat lebih berbanding dengan fabrik yang lebih berat.

src: Also, retro designs and continuing trends have been used in effort to save money, like the tights that were expected to go out of fashion this year.
ref: Juga, reka bentuk retro dan perkembangan berterusan telah digunakan dalam usaha untuk menjimat wang, seperti pakaian ketat yang dijangka keluar dari fesyen tahun ini.

src: Even in the glamorous world of high-end fashion, money has been tight, and with the world economies in a collective downturn, major designers have been more wary of continuing to churn out the stream of couture designs that past Fashion Weeks have seen.
ref: Walaupun dalam dunia glamor fesyen mewah, wang berkurangan, dan dengan ekonomi dunia dalam kemerosotan kolektif, pereka utama lebih berhati-hati untuk terus melahirkan aliran reka bentuk anggun yang diperlihatkan dalam Minggu Fesyen lepas.

src: The lone daring designer for the day was Carolina Herrera, who discarded the furs she promoted in the Fall 2007 show to focus on a Peter Pan theme, with earth tones and bird feathers.
ref: Pereka perseorangan pakaian menjolok mata untuk hari itu merupakan Carolina Herrera, yang membuang bulu yang dia promosikan dalam pertunjukan Musim Luruh 2007 untuk memberi tumpuan kepada tema Peter Pan, dengan warna-warna tanah dan bulu burung.

src: To further the "flying Peter Pan" motif, models donned such designs as a chiffon dress with ostrich feathers and a taffeta gown with a feather waistband.
ref: Untuk melanjutkan motif "terbang Peter Pan," model memakai reka bentuk seperti pakaian chiffon dengan bulu burung unta dan gaun kain taf dengan pinggang bulu.

src: Oscar de la Renta opted for more traditional blacks, golds and grays, debuting lines for men and women in fabrics he is familiar with.
ref: Oscar de la Renta memilih untuk warna tradisional, hitam, emas dan kelabu, memperkenalkan koleksi untuk lelaki dan wanita dalam kain dia kenali buat kali pertamanya.

src: Men were outfitted in tweed while women were fitted in dresses that experimented with embroidery and tulle, both shades of past collections.
ref: Lelaki telah dipakaikan tweed manakala wanita telah dipakaikan pakaian yang bereksperimen dengan sulaman dan tulle, kedua-dua warna koleksi musim lalu.

src: Among others, labels Badgley Mischka, Diesel, and Vivienne Tam unveil their newest collections on Tuesday.
ref: Antara lain, label Badgley Mischka, Diesel, dan Vivienne Tam memperkenalkan koleksi terbaru mereka pada hari Selasa.

src: Iran's Minister of Justice Gholam-Hossein Elham has requested that Dutch politician Geert Wilders' Qur'an film named Fitna should be prohibited by the Dutch government, Iranian press-agency IRNA reports.
ref: Menteri Keadilan Iran Gholam-Hossein Elham telah meminta agar filem ahli politik Belanda Geert Wilders agar filem berasaskan Quran bernama Fitna diharamkan oleh kerajaan Belanda, agensi akhbar Iran IRNA melaporkan.

src: Elham wrote a letter to his Dutch colleague Ernst Hirsch Ballin stating that: "you can stop the process of this satanic and conspiracy movement based on the European Convention on Human Rights".
ref: Elham menulis surat kepada rakan sejawatnya di Belanda Ernst Hirsch Ballin menyatakan bahawa: "anda boleh menghentikan perbuatan jahat dan pergerakan berkonspirasi ini berdasarkan Konvensyen Eropah mengenai Hak Asasi Manusia".

src: Freedom of speech cannot be the reason to allow this film, they say.
ref: Kebebasan bersuara tidak boleh dijadikan sebab untuk membenarkan filem ini, kata mereka.

src: "We also respect freedom of speech, but the insult of holy and ethical values is totally unacceptable," Elham writes.
ref: "Kami juga menghormati kebebasan bersuara, tetapi menghina kesucian dan nilai etika sama sekali tidak boleh diterima," Elham menulis.

src: "The rights of Muslims all over the world are violated by this blaspheming movie."
ref: "Hak-hak umat Islam di seluruh dunia sedang dilanggar oleh filem yang mendorong kepada kekufuran ini".

src: The Qur'an is the holy book for some 1.5 billion Muslims worldwide.
ref: Al-Quran adalah kitab suci untuk kira-kira 1.5 bilion umat Islam di seluruh dunia.

src: Wilders announced his "shocking" movie to be ready in March 2008.
ref: Wilders mengumumkan filem beliau yang "mengejutkan" ini akan siap pada Mac 2008.

src: On Wednesday North Korea's official media dropped Kim Jong Il's honourific title "Dear leader", reported Japan's Radiopress.
ref: Pada Rabu media rasmi Korea Utara menurunkan gelaran terhormat "Pemimpin kesayangan," lapor Radiopress Jepun.

src: It was only days after the Russian news agency Itar-Tass reported that portraits of Kim Jong Il have recently been removed from public display in North Korea.
ref: Ia hanya beberapa hari selepas agensi berita Rusia Itar-Tass melaporkan yang potret Kim Jong Il baru-baru ini telah dialihkan dari paparan awam di Korea Utara.

src: According to Radiopress, a Japanese news agency that monitors North Korea's radio broadcasts, the North's Korean Central Broadcasting Station, as well as the Korean Central News Agency and other North Korean media, have stopped using the term "Dear leader" when referring to Kim Jong Il, the country's supreme leader.
ref: Menurut Radiopress, sebuah agensi berita Jepun yang memantau siaran radio Korea Utara, Stesen Siaran Pusat Korea Utara, serta Agensi Berita Pusat Korea dan lain-lain media Korea Utara, telah berhenti menggunakan istilah "Pemimpin kesayangan" apabila merujuk kepada Kim Jong Il, pemimpin tertinggi negara tersebut.

src: Now the media in North Korea only use the official titles "General Secretary of the Workers' Party of Korea", " the Chairman of the DPRK National Defense Commission" and/or "Supreme Commander of the Korean People's Army" when referring to Kim.
ref: Kini media di Korea Utara hanya menggunakan gelaran-gelaran rasmi "Ketua Setiausaha Parti Pekerja Korea," "Pengerusi kepada Suruhanjaya Pertahanan Negara DPRK" dan/atau "Komander Tertinggi kepada Tentera Rakyat Korea" apabila merujuk kepada Kim.

src: Earlier Itar-Tass also reported that according to an unnamed foreign diplomat in Pyongyang, Kim Jong Il's portraits have recently been taken down from public display secretly and without explanation.
ref: Sebelum ini Itar-Tass turut melaporkan yang menurut seorang diplomat asing tidak dinamakan di Pyongyang, potret Kim Jong Il baru-baru ini telah diturunkan dari pameran awan secara rahsia dan tanpa sebarang penjelasan.

src: However, the portraits of Kim's father, Kim Il Sung, still remain, according to the same report.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, potret bapa Kim, Kim Il Sung, masih kekal, menurut laporan yang sama.

src: This report has been confirmed by some expatriates living in the country.
ref: Laporan ini telah disahkan oleh seorang pekerja asing yang tinggal didalam negara tersebut.

src: This recent development in North Korea has given rise to speculation among analysts, some of whom suspected that these may be a sign that Kim is losing power, or that a power struggle is going on among the top leaders of the totalitarian state.
ref: Perkembangan terkini di Korea Utara ini telah menimbulkan spekulasi dikalangan penganalisis, yang sebahagiannya mengesyaki bahawa ini petanda yang Kim sedang kehilangan kuasa, atau perjuangan kuasa sedang berlaku diantara pemimpin tertinggi negara totalitarian tersebut.

src: But most observers believe that the portraits were taken down by the order of Kim Jong Il himself, who might be trying to downsize his own personality cult.
ref: Tetapi kebanyakan pemerhati percaya yang penurunan potret tersebut adalah atas arahan Kim Jong Il sendiri, yang mungkin cuba mengurangkan pemujaan terhadap personalitinya.

src: "We believe the change was made at his will to soften his image as a leader of a personality cult, although it is hard to determine what his real intentions are," said Shinya Kato, the editor of Radiopress.
ref: "Kami percaya perubahan itu dibuat atas kehendaknya untuk melembutkan imejnya sebagai pemimpin dengan pemujaan personaliti, walaubagaimanapun ia agak sukar untuk menentukan apakah niat utamanya," kata Kato Shinya, editor Radiopress.

src: South Korean officials are not yet speculating on the matter, saying the portrait removals "may be for various reasons."
ref: Pegawai Korea Selatan belum lagi membuat spekulasi berkenaan perkara tersebut, mengatakan pengalihan potret tersebut "mungkin kerana pelbagai alasan".

src: North Korea is one of the few Stalinist states that still exist today, and the political control in the country remains tight.
ref: Korea Utara adalah antara beberapa negara Stalinis yang masih wujud hari ini, dan penguasaan politik didalam negara tersebut kekal ketat.

src: In recent years North Korea underwent several minor reforms that did not appear to significantly improve quality of life.
ref: Dalam beberapa tahun kebelakangan ini Korea Utara melalui beberapa pembaharuan kecil yang tidak kelihatan banyak memperbaiki kualiti hidup.

src: It has also remained largely mysterious and secretive to the outside world, as few foreign correspondents are allowed to visit and stay in the country.
ref: Ia juga kekal sangat misteri dan berahsia kepada negara luar, kerana hanya beberapa wartawan luar dibenarkan untuk melawat dan tinggal didalam negara tersebut.
